Friends,

I have bad news.

I’m getting attacked left and right by Career Politician Mo Brooks and Chief of Staff Katie Boyd Britt who have both built a career in the swamp. I’m also getting severely outraised.

**Brooks and Britt have the support of the establishment machine** – the talking heads and special interest groups. Brooks and Britt have the Career Politicians on their side, so money is pouring into their campaigns to make sure that no political outsider like me can catch up.
I’m humbly asking you.
Can you support my campaign?
[**I need your help to catch up >>>**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=8dd103c0e09f4a0bb7906f69867af1a7&_e=a27x_f15gZ-Aghwl7EBVcQIUx2coTgQDSSq5s3_T5khHl_i1lAEDVaezKMujL080XmWH5pMMZdcQWL0inWkS8pMcDgNacrHCXMFnU_lQA6C3coPRzGGgX4ynQ3UXWH1Qnjfb9UsJkpyPflaWH7Pzvwn2INeflTAMAt0WvTIGuWWUSYUoxPNUiw1jHBsU38DYAyp-jDLtrX8RZ9evxIYRaCra92l7IFlp0zz2UvR2oXv_ZDOf-KKQXSUYWChVP2hk5Zx5U7h5iY9SHKf8-Q1Kzgqh5QZUcpGZUBrGGoEZVqILgnwfav0A3ZZNasotDVMERKDApq8dWtf4RzldWPmRX7Ov-tySbfj9LldoKAIhc2853TY0JgKxlQetLy1yrO7Cet_kVZcOvPsenrkbBHJFGVUKnin2V2xlr4ZUdYrERhD_5hDT9LkNrQIAQGyeQEurovHEKOHRJzNF4FsIDUmmAE6VrOVB-3Mh23cAWpP5c9VOvai9NokKns-ysNOu4cPsWgGWvp-i3OqU49hIwougpjY7OtZuNREkBxsEyQH9cuDA6crkRrCPZrY-Ni4u53Y1)
Quarter 4 fundraising numbers were just made public, and you can see how much they’re outraising our campaign. We have to step up our game in order to match these numbers.

**Chief of Staff Katie Boyd Britt raised $1.2 million.
Career Politician Mo Brooks raised $382,000.
Me? I only raised $165,000.**

I knew that this campaign wouldn’t be easy. But I’ve never been one to go the easy route. I’ve always fought for what I believed in and fought for America.

I really need you to chip in today. We have to catch up. We can’t send any more Career Politicians to Washington.

PRAY, MT
TRADITIONAL BOWHUNTERS OF MONTANA
Jack spoke at the TBM’s annual winter banquet at Chico Hot Springs about being a hunter on public lands today, while sharing entertaining bowhunting stories from his childhood.

SIDNEY, MT
RICHLAND COUNTY DEMOCRATS

Jack also spoke via Zoom to the Big Timber Democrats and Broadwater County Democrats.

FARM BUREAU
FEDERATION

| | | HUMAN RIGHTS ADVOCATE AND FORMER STATE SENATOR KEN TOOLE ENDORSES JACK!
---
"Jack Ballard will represent working Montanans in Congress because he is one of them. He's a Montanan through and through - working four jobs to pay his bills. Jack understands that the ultra-rich and corporations must pay fair taxes, like the vast majority of working people, to build infrastructure, provide affordable healthcare, raise wages for workers and make sure farmers and ranchers get a fair price for the food they produce by enforcing anti-trust laws. Montana needs a real Montanan in Congress, and Jack Ballard is that person. I'm proud to endorse him. I know he'll make an excellent Congressman."
_\- KEN TOOLE, Montana State Senator, District 41, 2001-2005_

body:
A total of over $861,000 in advertising – on television and online – has been reserved. A total of over $861,000 in advertising - on television and online - has been reserved. |
---
**BREAKING: Democrat Launches 1st Statewide Ad**
Fellow American - Our Democrat opponent has launched his first advertising barrage of the 2022 Senate campaign.

**His campaign has purchased $726,000 in statewide TV ads that launched yesterday, AND he _already_ spent $135,000 on Facebook ads in the last 30 days. **

**That's a total of $861,000 in ads, and it's still 10 months before the election.**

Fellow American, this race in Georgia is going to be one of the most expensive Senate campaigns in American history, and our opponent isn't wasting any time using the $23 million he has in his campaign coffers.

Since we declared our candidacy in August, we've been sounding the alarm every chance we get that **our Democrat opponent is likely to _outraise_ us.**

**But we guarantee you this - _our opponent is never going to outwork us._**

We're going to keep this message very short: we need your help to keep pace with what our opponent is doing. **[That's why we're kindly asking you to chip in $3, $5, or even $7 today to help us fill our advertising fund.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=6ba3485434e84bc7ab4ddba3368c2e55&_e=ycfJq1HiJ0IychHDyl4J4rJS6YGoRjtjrX6xZ2VXn-QV9a_XJeBeCfmyA6v-PP0RtVQXKg3WjU_LLb0wOxfVQ50lEAbvyy-9wP4f_79razMrm83YTmJK4s23pl8297QOOiSWNd6HXmvQlEDQccF9J90EROQv8ur8LdegjtTdzHNH0mYnVWYAzhlCOHU2_IUz_yKfDNtMaYqooyhaTOZN9XhE-wBqfM_xgPT2Frn-5tX7Zc1jXE88DK1EMjJjekD_Luu9oWNxN49R5XXz7WlcEndAqjww6Bsmyatme9BcP9Ma8vkEokc1tXb4Lqlu0bXY8sRPQqxuxsOxLqBBCGzn3-rxKCnnkdacZVZJQEmmSYRBKO2te8skVlRhivUO6PnM9O4E8IfrGXdXQTnGHd1FQ1KJB80QnehTJ7e5yMp33bP_JsZ8QbsGTnhVlyP3e6POCXitVCVXpYchGj4-moFzsw%3D%3D)**

We're counting on you to help fuel this campaign!

Thank you,

subject: California Criminals: No prison, just therapy!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Support the Recall of District Attorney George Gascon
body:
DA Gascón wants social workers to calm down a bank robber or rapist Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=23a42375f66b46809c7dad86833a91f3&_e=Y9ycH7p5TKn65JimlJiu7YhzUDieCKHprEOENH6ijb18fLFsrdQlOi6-eqM6MpH6Cb0HyJXDahUOwWJ6EEj6kwamn9Bg4k0Q3I1Gr3Jas6cmCECqDm41IX8K-WdspAjx9Gh11ggXH8wuQLjiNF1KjMFrPZKCM9otXW8s7e6HHoau24LjlZcsFE6L4UTlgeIzjMZRB8Td2cKUlKJ01ITTm0jDZT7lFx4-nHpTcZccwyhSCzsWvFZDMFeks3FT1z5OqURTOUkatWof7zvkmCG7u4Bardt4U5JU0mQ0FyFylpy9asD_dP8kGzPW0tIiiFqDCcTkqFekz3-KlgjUiKPDwNOrhA1RwoRWWw-TqwlDrDgew7qPYafW5uDjSRa51iTpXOeifuG5JIJmgyPSxY6Z8kBr435brQ8VVjdA8TnVTJsii5H6_pWeRT4HM6xTblvp)
---
Friend,

People used to travel to Los Angeles to see Hollywood stars, beautiful beaches and an exciting, growing city. But that was then, and this is now...

What changed? Los Angeles County elected District Attorney George Gascón in 2020 and he has spent every day in office endangering the very residents that elected him.

Gascón has embraced radical, pro-criminal, anti-law endorsement policies to fulfill his dangerous ideology. His policies have ratcheted down punishment to its bare minimum and significantly reduced the prosecution of crime. _And what’s been the result?_

**Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime rates have skyrocketed.**

Instead of cops, Gascón wants social workers to calm down a bank robber or rapist. Then, instead of prison, he wants the criminals to get therapy instead of a cell.

George Gascón is redesigning the entire criminal justice system to the benefit of criminals at the expense of victims of the crime and at the expense of every resident in Los Angeles County.

Thanks for your support, Team Cranley-Fedor \----Original Message---- From: Team Cranley-Fedor Date: February 5th, 2022 Subject: Sign on to DEMAND fair maps, friend >>> Friend, Last year, Republicans passed redistricting maps — signed off by Mike DeWine — that were so blatantly gerrymandered that the Ohio Supreme Court threw them out. Ohio Republicans have enjoyed blatant corruption in Columbus for decades, weaponizing it to pass their radical, far-right agenda. subject: The Latest: McConnell Condemns RNC Action, Offers Hope

body:
I've been saying for quite a while that Trump's influence is fading and you just saw a great example of that this week. [](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=00f7ceda22794a7a82a2ebb8a08df17f&_e=RhwNH5S24B6OnPtYOY9IOn_G8TcQE7sCAgEELB84JVptlUvmr7RudPfETvelwPukmPb5XrLbLjTDuxK-T9Fz-SYAf5BiH_0y8tx4HQHCQxMLolOppREYHWxYHsRilR8jnL5NUAWSGirM8uc0uVWh9K2W0qOlAtRlnH3hQ-5E9NQop40drxFXfJ5Z08nogr8ee_pXPojrGbNZ7pkpHRP2uf-bmb6v5DHErI0P3atWjRis6pyer5EjyU_dzwxGpPIf2HN9pyg00zzvGHynkybHTQ%3D%3D) Peter, I've been saying for quite a while that Trump's influence is fading and you just saw a great example of that this week. The Republican National Committee (RNC) censured Reps. Cheney & Kinzinger for serving on the bipartisan Jan. 6th investigative committee and more importantly, included language that labeled the 1/6/21 insurrection as "legitimate political discourse." Mitch McConnell and many other Republican leaders, some who have been silent about this in the past, spoke out condemning the RNC and stated plainly the truth that January 6th was really a violent attempt to stop the peaceful transfer of power after a presidential election. [Take a listen for yourself here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=00f7ceda22794a7a82a2ebb8a08df17f&_e=RhwNH5S24B6OnPtYOY9IOsc36w8HXyfUx86bbUOXzMYW-M157dsa7-kPwFI34w2LH83rNlBcTtcwBFJzdzY7b2_KHXZhNFUV1XvKKVMkI-CYjkOZxfjE-fHLgO0LmRZu3DmoUkm_nXUtQ5zjFpZe1wNWw7m8UaOrgraV-fFxanf9HZUdf_W1e5SHQROw-SDCufGIMG7wnDGI0TIgCLGnlYSy0A6rCr68xzejVmzkJ8lZ9Y0N57BST4QdBI41aLO09Z9qbykW94KuoyREQ7rwLAOyUsQgfOQB4wFM2koYy5SXTK6iXiL09-JbIojJ_d5lACBZF-p0twgXAv2LHQfgS8k76xLpe_XhXVxsBc4b9Y2Sc6x_vvuelqXzieVvJ6_b). **As the cracks in Trump's influence widen, we can expect to see more and more Republicans speak out against his lying and toxic attempts to continue dividing America for his own personal gain**. Sure, we wish they would have stood up to him years ago, but it's good to see more people finding their voice and speaking the truth about the events that day. **I spoke about this on CNN last evening**. [Give it a listen here](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=00f7ceda22794a7a82a2ebb8a08df17f&_e=RhwNH5S24B6OnPtYOY9IOr-sWNQYfFnhHDDFvAmmP1ZQJK6OmD8Tc0JfCFfoDOckaOyOKOsynR_Kt2dvWp_ACyI7L18nQTAr1NzSUgGuYhFIIAzZJqJJuK2Cm6W55tXR5j6pQjT8Q1Zou2bLtEPPFsj5u9m2N-ECyAhgmOvkdOnY5iPLczZsTW7MXD1VH9MyCbHV2_PscEJ-3nOWeP4j6L3OVYQI6kABoX958QsN4k0Z83LuVMEP7ZRpR-dsefBKkJy5mdXZNoqeZmeQTv4vwBJ_S09yutKgI4BaCBpF1kQ6D0Nng1eVp_cHgDiQJfbvrhMu0pgStclrJit9AO7CMLsi2PCIhJ35tPTxm5ew0q8%3D). I believe that in large part due to gerrymandering, Republicans stand a good chance at winning back the U.S. House this year, but I'm not so sure about the U.S. Senate, and Trump is increasingly looking like a liability to that goal. That is why you are seeing McConnell and others speaking out so forcefully about moving on from Trump's 2020 loss and focusing on the future of the Republican Party. **Peter, these recent years haven't been easy but I continue to have faith that our hard work fighting for civility, truth and a common purpose as Americans will prevail**. Real change comes from the ground up, not the top down, and we are making a real difference together. If you would like to chip in to help us keep up the fight, [please consider making a generous donation now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=00f7ceda22794a7a82a2ebb8a08df17f&_e=RhwNH5S24B6OnPtYOY9IOu0KvSip3DrdNJzXVqxfuYyxGKpjSxP13KJ4tji-G0NliDMiTuGPdPl-Fbwq3mVVGcKC2eE9qCsPc6GQmhS8YBx7ECw2ukOmmlqCpyLZux9ND2rA61n9uCEa4joNwNKDWJ6aWHLiS0LHc4vKj_jK2KOV8-nZ7Ir8qmZyB5Dwtd8fZa-dU_EdVMTaITNDueYAGlWvwdnQRUPAKJZppxYNCKKnD5OOo4DR79UInPGCh-o7o_cnCjyIpOuh7ZBhGsbt4A%3D%3D) to help us pay for the tools that allow us to get this message out and grow support for our mission. [Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=00f7ceda22794a7a82a2ebb8a08df17f&_e=RhwNH5S24B6OnPtYOY9IOu0KvSip3DrdNJzXVqxfuYyxGKpjSxP13KJ4tji-G0Nl0sfOr4ruXv1dDmQfbtrZhOJreikLBVLq75RTOrpnnFTGrbwf55tJcX_Msx82THNBT0cHHeknFyoqi4w0LGrumDgAqx-NXrE0DM3k-00QGta0jF2-dPKtro-t0B_NWBXi2-besK-xgvfvvhhMZ3ODyuXsSqYuFZNqsPviv3RahTewNFLvde7YzD2nzjNuLEroebLOWtJsQ3LlArQrEMAo7g%3D%3D) I'm so proud to have you on the team and cannot thank you enough for all that you're doing to help heal America! -John | |

name: Tim Ryan
subject: This was a risky decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5697?t=6&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB) Hello,

In a minute, [I’ll ask you to add a critically important donation to my campaign](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5698?t=7&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB)— a race that will decide Senate control. But first, can I have just a moment of your time to explain why your support today is so important?

Coming out against the filibuster was a risky decision. I knew the moment I supported abolishing the filibuster, right-wing groups would start flooding Ohio with cash and slamming our campaign with nasty attacks.

**But it was the right thing to do. What’s the point of having a Democratic majority if we can’t accomplish anything?** I’m proud of my decision and I won’t let anything stand in the way of delivering for hardworking Ohioans.

But let me be clear: this makes us the GOP’s top target. They’re already spending upwards of $40 million (with millions more on the way) to make sure Ohio’s open Senate seat stays red. **Abolishing the filibuster is the right thing to do, but it makes us especially vulnerable to right-wing attacks.[That’s why I’m personally asking you to chip in today to help us fight back against the GOP and flip Ohio blue so we can make progress for Ohioans and all Americans.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5698?t=8&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5699?t=9&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5700?t=10&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5701?t=11&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5702?t=12&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/5697?t=13&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB)
Political experts are saying we’re one of the seats most likely to flip blue, but I can’t win this race without your support. That’s why I’m counting on your grassroots donation today.

Thank you. I really mean it.

— Tim
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=1246%2E878179%2ECXTARB).**

subject: TX Law Enforcement Supports Van Taylor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Van Taylor Campaign
body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=a4417d98fa&e=9920087750)
---
| Peter,

We are blessed in the Third Congressional District of Texas. Our district is one of the best places to live, work, and raise a family and our law enforcement works around the clock each and every day to make sure our loved ones, homes, and businesses are protected.

I am excited and humbled to announce endorsements from the Texas Municipal Police Association and the Combined Law Enforcement Association of Texas. I am grateful for the opportunity to continue serving the place I love and will continue to support those who put their lives on the line to keep our communities safe.
---
| [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=feca834020&e=9920087750)
---
| _"TMPA is proud to endorse Congressman Van Taylor as he has shown support for Law Enforcement as an elected official from the Texas House and Senate to the halls of Congress."_
\- Travis Hammond, TMPA President
---
| [ ](https://vantaylor.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=04792877e7849664175862700&id=9a324da6ee&e=9920087750)
---
| _"Because of your commitment to law enforcement and your public position regarding issues that will impact the rank and file officers of the state, the Combined Law Enforcement Associations of Texas, or CLEAT, has endorsed your candidacy for Texas’ Third Congressional District."_
\- CLEAT PAC
---
| | Rest assured, I will continue to back those who protect and serve our communities.

Semper fi,
Congressman Van Taylor

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Iran openly threatened President Trump
body:
Even they think Biden is a joke [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cudlitt-yddjllujiu-r/) [Stand With Grothman >> Protect America](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cudlitt-yddjllujiu-j/) _Did you see that Iran's Ayatollah Ali Khamenei posted an animated video on his website depicting the ASSASSINATION of President Trump?_Since Joe Biden took office, respect for our great nation continues to dwindle.This is unacceptable and dangerous. **We need to take back Congress and have a long, hard look at our nation's priorities. ** [Take Back The House, Take Back Our Respect](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cudlitt-yddjllujiu-t/) While Joe Biden makes hollow promises on the filibuster and voting without an ID, **_North Korea is launching rockets and grounding planes, hypersonic Chinese missiles circle the globe, and now Iran OPENLY THREATENS a former President._****We need to take back the House and do what Joe Biden can't:_restore respect for our great nation before it's too late. _**[_**Help me fight for our nation!**_](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cudlitt-yddjllujiu-i/) We need to demand respect NOW, before the missiles launched by our enemies become more than just 'tests.'-Glenn Grothman [Help Me Fight For You](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cudlitt-yddjllujiu-d/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-cudlitt-yddjllujiu-h/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-cudlitt-yddjllujiu-k/)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michelle=20Benson?=
subject: Can we trust Scott Jensen?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MICHELLE FOR MINNESOTA COMMITTEE
body:
Being a conservative is more than just talk | | | | [ ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=78ebaf9f6c&e=9d6926af69)
---
| | | **Senator Michelle Benson is the consistent conservative leader our state needs for Governor.

When Scott Jensen was a Senator, he didn’t serve as a conservative. Can we trust him as Governor? **
[](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=14c881a956&e=9d6926af69)
**Life** : Sen. Michelle Benson has a 100% voting record from Minnesota Citizens Concerned for Life.

As a teen, she began her pro-life activism by giving speeches and volunteering.

[Scott Jensen worked with Planned Parenthood. ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=4bf65b4d4a&e=9d6926af69)

**Left-wing agenda** : Sen. Michelle Benson has been a steadfast leader on public safety and supports our police.

[Scott Jensen held a Town Hall with anti-cop ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=636ebcc2c3&e=9d6926af69)[legislator John Thompson. ](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=e07db910d5&e=9d6926af69)

**Taxes:** Sen. Michelle Benson has a lifetime rating of a B+ from the Minnesota Taxpayers League.

[Scott Jensen has a lifetime rating of a D-.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=b9ff9e1b14&e=9d6926af69)

**Conservative Values** : Sen. Michelle Benson has been a fighter of conservative values her entire life, even running against a moderate Republican in her first campaign, bringing our values back to St. Paul.

Benson has the highest lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union of any of the candidates.

[Scott Jensen has a C-](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=5c96ed63f6&e=9d6926af69)

**2nd Amendment:** Sen. Michelle Benson has never wavered on her support of your Second Amendment rights earning an ‘A’ rating from the Minnesota Gun Owners Caucus.

[Scott Jensen has flip flopped and supported gun control while in the legislature](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=81b479163f&e=9d6926af69)[ earning a negative grade from the Minnesota Gun Owners Caucus.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=10fcdd9e51&e=9d6926af69)

**Healthcare: **Sen. Michelle Benson has consistently fought against attempts by liberal politicians to takeover your healthcare.

[Scott Jensen, as Senator, was the tie-breaking vote in the](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=2c05c713bf&e=9d6926af69)[ Senate to support the Dayton Single-Payer Healthcare Plan.](https://michelle4mn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e599d2cf739987622330d245&id=0c67b5aac1&e=9d6926af69)

subject: I lived the American Dream. Now I’m running to save it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Chuck Morse

| |

| | | | [ ](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODgyMjc0MDk5Mzk3NDAwOTA4JmM9cTBiNSZlPTAmYj05MDI0Mzc4MjkmZD1uNnQydzFp.CqHbb3CxgNcu1RKWXeHLuUrNwLfHjwhIHq3D6nYmyK4)
---
| | | Friend, This is Chuck Morse here, U.S. Senate candidate from the great state of New Hampshire.
If you’ve ever felt that the priorities of progressive, liberal Democrats in our nation’s capital have been holding the rest of us back, you’re not alone...**
****In fact, I’m running for the United States Senate this year to fix exactly that - Washington is out of control right now, attacking our very way of life with their radical spending and policies!**
I know that only strong leaders are going to stop this - but before I tell you why, let me first tell you a little bit about me... I grew up from humble beginnings. My father was disabled, a veteran who struggled with mental health challenges that made holding a job difficult. And my mother worked multiple jobs just to support us.
I did the same - I did everything from cleaning my church to working at Dairy Queen to starting my own lawn mowing business.
Eventually, I worked my way through college and was able to live the American Dream.
So the first chance I got, I worked to give back to my state and community - first volunteering on local boards, then serving on the Board of Selectmen, as Town Moderator, as a State Representative, and now as State Senate President.
In case you haven’t heard, we’ve been able to accomplish some pretty incredible things here in New Hampshire... We cut taxes, delivered the most conservative budget in New Hampshire’s history, made sure our state had the lowest poverty rate in the country, and the Granite State even ranks at the top for freedom nationwide.
It’s been one success after another - the only thing that’s been holding us back has been the far-left priorities of Washington and our federal delegation led by the likes of Maggie Hassan.
They threaten to undo all of our hard work... **If it were up to them, they would spend us into bankruptcy to finance pet-projects like the Green New Deal, strip us of our energy independence, and reshape our government with a crop of far-left activists!**
I’m not just going to do nothing while they destroy the American Dream that I lived.
That’s why I’m running for the U.S. Senate this year to stop Maggie Hassan and the D.C. Democrats this year before it’s too late. I know I can’t do it alone, so I hope to have your support along the way.

---
---
| |
---
| | [DONATE NOW TO SUPPORT MY RACE](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODgyMjc0MDk5Mzk3NDAwOTA4JmM9cTBiNSZlPTAmYj05MDI0Mzc4NDcmZD1kOGM3ejhz.yTbyBvy8KhneBPgtrAEctLuG0FE9TB0hZ0TSZoYdTZU)
---
---

**[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODgyMjc0MDk5Mzk3NDAwOTA4JmM9cTBiNSZlPTAmYj05MDI0Mzc4NTkmZD13Mmc1azZz.fB_PKmjzYsvgsNXSSjAZhsqccRFMqw16ePglBQcCcng)**** _[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xODgyMjc0MDk5Mzk3NDAwOTA4JmM9cTBiNSZlPTAmYj05MDI0Mzc4NzcmZD1oM201bjd0.Ja_EGZ5zKhvZHvtHeJvZj3rUgcj3Ecxj0MWrFbf1hjE)_**

A GREAT Time Of Food, Friends & Fun! | | | |

|
# **Newsletter-February 11 Vol. 2, #4**
---
| | |
##
11 February 22
**It's Time To Celebrate! **

**You're invited to the Jeff Warner For Congress
Campaign Kick-Off Celebration!**

Saturday, February 26
5-7p
Severna Park Elks Lodge
160 Truck House Road, Severna Park, 21146
This is a time primarily intended to inspire, motivate and encourage you as you meet others who share our mutual concern for the direction of the District and of the nation. We'll share a pasta meal together, hear briefly from Jeff, and have a great time socializing.

We have intentionally kept the cost low solely to cover our costs. **We don't want finances to stop anyone from attending.** We want to fill the hall, so please tell your friends, family, and other like-minded people about this!

**Minimum suggested donations to cover our costs are listed below.** Please make whatever donation you can in order to attend. We want a great fun-filled evening that will be refreshing and we can’t do that without you there!
* Single Adult - $15
* Couple - $30
* Family - $40 (A family is a parent/guardian with legal child(ren))
* Additional Campaign donations are appreciated
* The campaign will make a solicitation for funds at the event, but please don't feel compelled to give.

[**RSVP HERE**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=49408d600c&e=12a37459a2)
Your participation is important since it will send a strong message regarding the uniqueness of our movement. Please use this event as an opportunity to invite others to attend who share our mutual concern for the District and for the nation.

**Please RSVP by Monday night, February 21.** If you miss this deadline, be sure to reach out to see if openings remain.

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---

You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=5e02080d95) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=5e02080d95).

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: You're Invited! Come Celebrate!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
A GREAT Time Of Food, Friends & Fun! | | | |
---
|
# **Newsletter-February 11 Vol. 2, #4**
---
| | |
##
11 February 22
**It's Time To Celebrate! **

**You're invited to the Jeff Warner For Congress
Campaign Kick-Off Celebration!**

Saturday, February 26
5-7p
Severna Park Elks Lodge
160 Truck House Road, Severna Park, 21146
This is a time primarily intended to inspire, motivate and encourage you as you meet others who share our mutual concern for the direction of the District and of the nation. We'll share a pasta meal together, hear briefly from Jeff, and have a great time socializing.

We have intentionally kept the cost low solely to cover our costs. **We don't want finances to stop anyone from attending.** We want to fill the hall, so please tell your friends, family, and other like-minded people about this!

**Minimum suggested donations to cover our costs are listed below.** Please make whatever donation you can in order to attend. We want a great fun-filled evening that will be refreshing and we can’t do that without you there!
* Single Adult - $15
* Couple - $30
* Family - $40 (A family is a parent/guardian with legal child(ren))
* Additional Campaign donations are appreciated
* The campaign will make a solicitation for funds at the event, but please don't feel compelled to give.

[**RSVP HERE**](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=39b3b51d7d&e=12a37459a2)
Your participation is important since it will send a strong message regarding the uniqueness of our movement. Please use this event as an opportunity to invite others to attend who share our mutual concern for the District and for the nation.

**Please RSVP by Monday night, February 21.** If you miss this deadline, be sure to reach out to see if openings remain.

Remember, Jeff Warner is standing with you and for you. Enough is Enough! Together, "We The People" can make a real difference. Now is our time to act. There is hope.

Standing with you,

Jeff
---
| [Jeff Warner For Congress Website](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=627af5bd21&e=12a37459a2 "Jeff Warner For Congress Website")
---
|
---

**Our mailing address is:**
P.O. Box 634 Greenbelt, MD 20768

[info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com](mailto: info@jeffwarnerforcongress.com)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/profile?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=4ac6e9e076) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e2b757c427e67a891eab3e1b8&id=e50c016c4c&e=12a37459a2&c=4ac6e9e076).

name: Pro Life Update
subject: STOP the killing of unborn babies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Mo Brooks for Senate Committee |
body:
Abortion is often at the forefront of political discussions, especially in more recent times. When the Supreme Court refused to
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpeqint2ilrqecd29pgff8tsisv77bgaqbknckk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6sbhekp76tlme6q3dd9j6iojcspm6pom0obimqqb5dljm9ij3c5imtj6edjlc1jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddic1rm0phmcapmadtgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeopq1l88lkj4qvi9a4ens58h7g6udrkqidvnag0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth2bs) | |
---
Friend,

Abortion is often at the forefront of political discussions, especially in more recent times.

When the Supreme Court refused to intervene and halt Texas’ pro-life law, abortion zealots were furious!

**Many of us smiled that day because it meant even more innocent unborn lives were saved.**

But we’re now faced with an incredible threat...

**Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring. And if socialist Democrats get their way, his replacement could push the Supreme Court even**** _further_****to the Left, solidifying**** _Roe_****for generations to come.**

The ONLY way to stop them in their tracks and protect our most vulnerable is for conservatives to fight back and retake the Senate! With the majority, we can refuse to confirm any justices that _refuse_ to overturn _Roe._
[**STAND WITH MO: DEFEND LIFE >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6r520b35v1kggdckb88n5co4pkngfk38mcent70_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth2bs)
You see, friend, abortion is one of those black and white issues for me. You’re either pro-life or pro-abortion. There is no in-between.

I have thought _long and hard_ about the issue of killing an innocent unborn child, and I always come to the same conclusions:_life begins at conception._

**Because of that realization, I am and always have been adamantly pro-life.**

I will stand on the side of otherwise defenseless unborn children... _always._

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqj1a5c2rss4p59c7ea6ml40395ir98g8ukmu25o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth2bs)

I have always voted to stop taxpayer funds from being used for abortion subsidies throughout my time in public service.

I have vowed to be a voice for the voiceless, and it’s a commitment I take seriously.

My voting record speaks for itself. It’s why I have a 100% rating from the National Right to Life and an A+ rating from the Susan B. Anthony List.

But I’m concerned, friend.

**Progressive Democrats are**** _determined_****to allow abortion at every stage of pregnancy...**** _up to and including the point of birth._**
[**STAND WITH MO AND UNBORN BABIES >>**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcd62hlleafbjqr38jj9469at0ec9e3lg5q783tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth2bs)
We are on the verge of a socialist nightmare in the United States – and abortion is just the issue the Left is most vocal about.

Right now, the Democrats run completely UNCHECKED in Washington. They are DRUNK on their own power!

_The Democrats have..._

❌ overturned the Hyde amendment, which prevents taxpayer-funded abortions.

❌ blocked born-alive bills providing medical treatment to babies who survived botched abortions.

❌ supported and cheered infanticide.

❌ cheered and supported radical progressives taking abortion pills outside of the Supreme Court, all in the name of supporting abortion.

I have a proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative principles – and the accolades to back up:
* A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List
* 100% rating from the National Right to Life
* 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union
* 98% rating from Heritage Action for America
* 93% rating from FreedomWorks
* 93% rating from the NRA
* 86% rating from Club for Growth
* U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award
* 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze60nj7rj50qvede52vm6ueiec62jo20092ttq1g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth2bs)

And I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters:
* President Donald Trump
* Sen. Ted Cruz
* Sen. Rand Paul

[**JOIN THEM: SUPPORT MO BROOKS >> **](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr1iu213sm2hf68rrrqvhu1d56l4pum12l02f238_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth2bs)

I’ve fought for the America First agenda in the House of Representatives, but I know there’s more work to be done... this time in the Senate.

And I know I’m the man for the job.

I was raised in Huntsville –– the same city I represent in Washington today! My parents, Jack and Betty Brooks, taught me the importance of standing up for what’s right, which is why I’ve spent my entire career fighting for the principles that made this country great.

After graduating from law school, I worked as a prosecutor, where I earned the reputation of being “tough on crime” and then ran for the Alabama House of Representatives. I spent 20 years in private law practice and creating jobs. I later served as Madison County’s District Attorney and as County Commissioner.

**But I knew I had more to give, which is why I ran for Congress in 2010, becoming the first Republican elected in the 5th District in more than 130 years.**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze9jg95p5dr2q9ale3cs5f1k0bl7ci26sff9hj78_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o76cth2bs)

Since 2010, I have fought against Socialist Democrats in Congress and their freedom-hating policies. I have stood for America First at every step and against policies that would allow illegal aliens to flood this country. And I’ve taken on the debt junkies in Congress who would sacrifice our children’s and grandchildren’s future.

clean_body: Abortion is often at the forefront of political discussions, especially in more recent times. When the Supreme Court refused to | | Friend, Abortion is often at the forefront of political discussions, especially in more recent times. When the Supreme Court refused to intervene and halt Texas’ pro-life law, abortion zealots were furious! Many of us smiled that day because it meant even more innocent unborn lives were saved. But we’re now faced with an incredible threat... Justice Stephen Breyer is retiring. And if socialist Democrats get their way, his replacement could push the Supreme Court even furtherto the Left, solidifying Roefor generations to come. The ONLY way to stop them in their tracks and protect our most vulnerable is for conservatives to fight back and retake the Senate! With the majority, we can refuse to confirm any justices that refuse to overturn Roe. You see, friend, abortion is one of those black and white issues for me. You’re either pro-life or pro-abortion. There is no in-between. I have thought long and hard about the issue of killing an innocent unborn child, and I always come to the same conclusions:life begins at conception. Because of that realization, I am and always have been adamantly pro-life. I will stand on the side of otherwise defenseless unborn children... always. I have always voted to stop taxpayer funds from being used for abortion subsidies throughout my time in public service. I have vowed to be a voice for the voiceless, and it’s a commitment I take seriously. My voting record speaks for itself. It’s why I have a 100% rating from the National Right to Life and an A+ rating from the Susan B. Anthony List. But I’m concerned, friend. Progressive Democrats are determinedto allow abortion at every stage of pregnancy... up to and including the point of birth. We are on the verge of a socialist nightmare in the United States – and abortion is just the issue the Left is most vocal about. Right now, the Democrats run completely UNCHECKED in Washington. They are DRUNK on their own power! The Democrats have... ❌ overturned the Hyde amendment, which prevents taxpayer-funded abortions. ❌ blocked born-alive bills providing medical treatment to babies who survived botched abortions. ❌ supported and cheered infanticide. ❌ cheered and supported radical progressives taking abortion pills outside of the Supreme Court, all in the name of supporting abortion. I have a proven track record of standing up and fighting for conservative principles – and the accolades to back up: A+ national pro-life scorecard rating from Susan B. Anthony List 100% rating from the National Right to Life 91% lifetime rating from the American Conservative Union 98% rating from Heritage Action for America 93% rating from FreedomWorks 93% rating from the NRA 86% rating from Club for Growth U.S. Chamber of Commerce Spirit of Enterprise Award 2018 American Trade Hero Award from Coalition for a Prosperous America And I’ve received endorsements from well-respected conservative hard-hitters: President Donald Trump Sen. Ted Cruz Sen. Rand Paul I’ve fought for the America First agenda in the House of Representatives, but I know there’s more work to be done... this time in the Senate. And I know I’m the man for the job. I was raised in Huntsville –– the same city I represent in Washington today! My parents, Jack and Betty Brooks, taught me the importance of standing up for what’s right, which is why I’ve spent my entire career fighting for the principles that made this country great. After graduating from law school, I worked as a prosecutor, where I earned the reputation of being “tough on crime” and then ran for the Alabama House of Representatives. I spent 20 years in private law practice and creating jobs. I later served as Madison County’s District Attorney and as County Commissioner. But I knew I had more to give, which is why I ran for Congress in 2010, becoming the first Republican elected in the 5th District in more than 130 years. Since 2010, I have fought against Socialist Democrats in Congress and their freedom-hating policies. I have stood for America First at every step and against policies that would allow illegal aliens to flood this country. And I’ve taken on the debt junkies in Congress who would sacrifice our children’s and grandchildren’s future. It’s up to all of us to take a stand for freedom-loving principles –– which is why I decided to run for the U.S. Senate. Chuck Schumer knows I’ll be a nightmare for his Socialist Democrat agenda in the Senate, which is why he’ll do everything to stop me. I appreciate you reading this entire email. I hope you’ll take the time to stand with me today. name: Don Huffines
subject: our best defense against the swamp
body:
will you stand with me? [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-r/) Fellow Patriot, Yesterday, I signed the U.S. Term Limits pledge, which reiterates my commitment __**to term limit every elected official in Texas.**__ The first bills I filed during my time in the Texas Senate were proposals to limit the terms of the governor, statewide officials, and members of the Texas Legislature. [STAND WITH ME](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-y/) Term limits are our best defense against career politicians and the Austin Swamp. In fact, Plank 76 of the Texas GOP platform says that, "we support term limits of twelve years for federal and state offices."For far too long, career politicians have promised to secure our border, lower our taxes, and protect our elections, __**and nothing ever gets done.**__ When I am Governor of Texas, I will prioritize the passage of legislation to limit the terms of every elected office in the state. [STAND WITH ME](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-j/) For liberty, [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-t/) **Don Huffines for Governor****An Actual Republican** [STAND WITH ME](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-i/) [](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-d/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-h/)[](https://dhcampaign.cmail20.com/t/t-l-qlhzjk-yuddtktydi-o/) | _Copyright(C) 2021 Don Huffines Campaign, All rights reserved._You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website. **Our Mailing Address:**

body:
You’ll likely be dead before the FDA releases all their vaxxine data...
---
| If you like firearms, then you're in the right place. Remember you can _[unsubscribe](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/321/56327/beb9f15bae0c05e80f0f64bf0dd2da8aab4689c2/ceef490fe7d17ae2dac4b707c299e90f7e25ffb6)_ here at any time. | | | |

Scary news,

Turns out the FDA is **_refusing to release_** the safety testing data it used to approve today’s vaxxines **_until the year 2076!!_**

That means if you’re over 40... you’ll likely be dead before the FDA releases all their vaxxine data.

Even worse...

**_That’s not all the FDA is hiding._**

Experts are now sounding the alarm bells that a **_second, far deadlier pandemic_** is set to EXPLODE in the next few months.

But to avoid “mass hysteria”... **the FDA wants to sweep their warnings under the rug!**

That’s why bestselling author Damian Campbell is rushing out [FREE copies of his new book _Pandemic Sucker Punch_.](https://links.firearmman.com/a/1634/click/321/56327/cdfc747ae5b9bd960a68235c311b180bc839a79b/ceef490fe7d17ae2dac4b707c299e90f7e25ffb6)

This shocking book not only shows you why this second virus is **_practically guaranteed_** to explode soon...

name: Shala Hixson
subject: A mortar blast changed my husband's life forever
body:
From the time my husband -- Marine Lance Corporal Cory Hixson -- was young, all he wanted to do was serve his country for you an
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhu6tbebtk6hqql8e8rabi5894ck8vc5l8dbkm4g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf3d1lm1p7atdlm1iracth6pij4clgs3im6tjkcdgradhnmurj4p5jcsp72d9gc3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddic1rm0phmcsqr0ptgmlin49fg)
Dear Fellow American, From the time my husband -- Marine Lance Corporal Cory Hixson -- was young, all he wanted to do was serve his country for you and me. So, it was no surprise when he decided to follow in the footsteps of his dad joining the Marines with the dream of becoming a rifleman. Soon after, Cory was deployed to Iraq. But after his unit captured three insurgents in a routine supply mission, they were hit with heavy mortar fire that resulted in a six-hour firefight requiring air and tank support. That’s when my Cory’s life was changed forever. One mortar landed five feet in front of him.**The shrapnel from that powerful blast struck his upper torso and face, piercing Cory’s left eye.** [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ib1gb27ou35so0i3qj0f5pb73olva8tc7jqr5g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t7m1qj4t1heirr7cpkmeq33cdku2rrbd9jk9qj6srjkorrf8b46lj3ap74soqmad7469jm2opnslonbdumeuqn4thl6nh125olk9ah74p5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh60oj2c1h60p77q88he5unic89fk4km3r7fctnq9ah75ugagaq850jicin2tdnq5r3bp0k2eaq4o32c9g64p30c79r48d245p25oh4cdgm2ob4s1ge2o324no) He was immediately medically evacuated for emergency surgery on his eye and thank God, he survived. My husband, Cory, is a fighter. When he was medically discharged from the Marines, he wanted nothing more than to get back to work and live his life to the fullest. So, he took a job as a heavy equipment operator at a surface coal mine in our hometown. We got married, had two children, and for a short time, everything felt okay. But then, things took a turn for the worse. The severe Post-Traumatic Stress and Traumatic Brain Injuries he suffered fighting for our freedom started to keep him up at night. The hearing and vision loss he suffered from the shrapnel blast made it harder for him to work. And eventually, the pain and stress from his combat injuries made it impossible for him to hold down a job. I couldn’t imagine what Cory was going through. Not just the terrible pain he dealt with... but waking up every day knowing that life would never be the same. All I wanted to do was be by his side and do whatever I could to help him. ** ** **And the absolute last thing on my mind was figuring out how we would afford to keep the lights on or keep the roof over our heads.** But as the bills started to stack up, we couldn’t ignore it any longer. Then, just as the walls felt like they were about to cave in on me and my family, we got a call from Operation Finally Home. If you’ve ever heard of Operation Finally Home, then you know that they provide mortgage-free, custom-built homes to wounded combat veterans and their families. We were invited to a conference for what we thought was an interview with Operation Finally Home and one of their builders. But when were asked to come on stage and share our story, only to hear the team at Operation Finally Home was going to bless our family with a home built specially to help Cory live with his injuries, I knew it was a sure sign from God that everything would be alright. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh6ljl18nia1hb21f3en0cfkmdhfsq5npvv9143g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t7m1qj4t1heirr7cpkmeq33cdku2rrbd9jk9qj6srjkorrf8b46lj3ap74soqmad7469jm2opnslonbdumeuqn4thl6nh125olk9ah74p5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh60oj2c1h60p77q88he5unic89fk4km3r7fctnq9ah75ugagaq850jicin2tdnq5r3bp0k2eaq4o32c9g64p30c79r48d245p25oh4cdgm2ob4s1ge2o324no) But the Operation Finally Home team can’t do it alone. After finding patriots to donate the land and the bulk of the building materials, Operation Finally Home has to come up with around _**$98,500**_ to finish building one home. And as a non-profit organization, the only way they can come up with that money is with the help of generous, patriotic Americans throughout the country who understand the sacrifices our veterans and first responders make for you and me every single day. So friend, after all Operation Finally Home has done for Cory, our two young children, and me, I have to ask you for this favor... **[Will you please help Operation Finally Home continue to do God’s work by providing mortgage-free homes to injured combat veterans and their families like mine?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt68bbq0onu1b1ccqec451b6qfv6khgdtjt06lko_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h2bs)** Dan Wallrath, Operation Finally Home founder, saw the plight of our veterans who came home from Iraq and Afghanistan with brain injuries, without limbs, with severe burns, and much more. Many of these brave warriors can’t dress themselves, get up and down stairs on their own, or remember simple tasks. _Never mind secure a job that can pay the rent and put food on the table._ _ _ That’s why Dan and his team does whatever it takes to make sure combat veterans like Cory can live peacefully. -If a veteran in a wheelchair needs low sinks to be able to brush his or her own teeth or help with the dishes at dinnertime – they build it. -If a veteran who’s lost his legs or arms – or both – needs a motorized lift to get in and out of the tub without the help of a spouse or parent – they build it. -If a veteran needs a plain, dark room to retreat to when everyday sights and sounds trigger their PTSD – they build it. And the best part is, they give these homes to families like mine 100% mortgage-free so heroes like Cory never have to spend another night worrying: _“How will I ever take care of my family again?”_ _ _ **[Please, help Dan and Operation Finally Home continue to bless families like mine by making a tax-deductible contribution of $25, $50, $100 or more today?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ca33momv0p2clmnrmcpmms2fceqhq5a8k840a0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t7m1qj4t1heirr7cpkmeq33cdku2rrbd9jk9qj6srjkorrf8b46lj3ap74soqmad7469jm2opnslonbdumeuqn4thl6nh125olk9ah74p5e5qrfldl64qbatdlskqr69bhemrtcd1lm1q39dpjmnh60oj2c1h60p77q88he5unic89fk4km3r7fctnq9ah75ugagaq850jicin2tdnq5r3bp0k2eaq4o32c9g64p30c79r48d245p25oh4cdgm2ob4s1ge2o324no)** Every day is a struggle for American heroes like my husband. He served his country, lost his eye for you and me. He lost his memory. And he’s losing his day-to-day life trying to fix himself. But thanks to Operation Finally Home, the weight of wondering how we’ll survive has been lifted off our shoulders. **[And if you can help lift that weight off the shoulders of more wounded veterans and their families by sending a generous gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to Operation Finally Home today, I pray that you will.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztti2m4vfk0drfu2388h3bl26okntu6mh3s0ve6o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kujr0t9iegon9dtjmcqb7d1hm6qf1dtlmkpq4t9jedpqcdtnk5i3aphlcjiecdb56ji34pr1ccruasblmvb7fdbieoqjbogh2saq4l8jicin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprboj0c9h60oj0cjjt448n2vbp644nq2ab1tjnmert4l8jiv8585d42g9p69bhemrt2thlsga175d2c1h64o32chg63kti4no)** Thank you for taking the time to read my letter. And thank you in advance for your generosity. Sincerely, Shala Hixson [**SUPPORT OPERATION FINALLY HOME**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0n2kcc1a232oedjm0suv94i2eaa837h07lttfjo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kujr0t9iegon9dtjmcqb7d1hm6qf1dtlmkpq4t9jedpqcdtnk5i3aphlcjiecdb56ji34pr1ccruasblmvb7fdbieoqjbogh2saq4l8jicin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprboj0c9h60oj0cjjt448n2vbp644nq2ab1tjnmert4l8jiv8585d42g9p69bhemrt2thlsga175d2c1h64o32chg63kti4no) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi7t7eu2u5a51u88ec83ngrq2aulo2d8bhueu870_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kujr0t9iegon9dtjmcqb7d1hm6qf1dtlmkpq4t9jedpqcdtnk5i3aphlcjiecdb56ji34pr1ccruasblmvb7fdbieoqjbogh2saq4l8jicin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprboj0c9h60oj0cjjt448n2vbp644nq2ab1tjnmert4l8jiv8585d42g9p69bhemrt2thlsga175d2c1h64o32chg63kti4no) Operation FINALLY HOME is a nonpartisan/nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization.
All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. **[Support Operation FINALLY HOME today](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zak5rcrgujksn6nfp3rj4fkopsm6bvtp2ggbr0ag_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kujr0t9iegon9dtjmcqb7d1hm6qf1dtlmkpq4t9jedpqcdtnk5i3aphlcjiecdb56ji34pr1ccruasblmvb7fdbieoqjbogh2saq4l8jicin2tdnqmqj2d5lemquaddj4lonbdum6gqr0t1kmsprboj0c9h60oj0cjjt448n2vbp644nq2ab1tjnmert4l8jiv8585d42g9p69bhemrt2thlsga175d2c1h64o32chg63kti4no)** © Operation FINALLY HOME | [www.operationfinallyhome.org](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7ls75ut07ighd3v9ok9dguu3i2sfvg6122soqfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h2bs)
1659 State Highway 46 West, Suite 115-606, New Braunfels, TX 78132 | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znmel43hjf8fvlece8qqeeio5i9b0lcoho02gdfo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zggg4s8clsvusls29r9dn46s2mkuo2as2ohu5l90_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrsg7u2dduo78eb681olrq096t0g1oi6gddqaij0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h2bs) | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfa97m21b3mpdllpduq3qjgktk1ucpjuja9quusg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie0o71c1h2bs)
---|---|---|---

body:

I am reaching out with an URGENT NOTICE. **You failed to renew your 2022 Membership and it has LAPSED. **

Dan Crenshaw was upset to not see your name on our 2022 Membership list. He asked me to reach out to you personally to **extend an exclusive membership deadline till 11:59 PM TONIGHT for you. **

**[Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gv1a-1xhsd-4qqlpo1/ "Will you answer Dan Crenshaw's plea and renew your 2022 Membership? ")**

As Crenshaw said, renewing your membership is one of the most important things you can do to help House Republicans win back the Majority in 2022.

I don't know about you, but I am fed up with Speaker Pelosi and her Radical Left Minions. They are destroying this country with their COVID Mandates, free speech bans, and open borders. We must hold Pelosi accountable and get her FIRED in 2022.

**[We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gv1a-1xhse-4qqlpo2/ "We can't do it without you though. That's why I NEED you to renew your 2022 Membership before the extended February 7th, 11:59 PM deadline. ")**

You are _crucial_ in this fight.

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Biden announces MORE taxes for retirees...
body:
One of the biggest tax hikes of your lifetime is dead ahead.
_Sponsored message_
Learn how to diversify your retirement portfolio in a way that could shelter it from runaway inflation & hefty tax bills.
| Joe Biden wasn’t kidding when he said he wanted to raise taxes. He’s trying to push through the largest set of tax increases since 1968... In other words, one of **the biggest tax hikes of your lifetime is dead ahead.** And you can’t just worry about the taxes he’s raising... Joe Biden is also planning changes to the estate tax and how contributions to your retirement accounts are treated. This means choices that seemed like a good idea when you started saving for your retirement could be absolutely disastrous now... So you’ve got to be smart about managing your money through this -- and **[to be smart, you need to take action right away](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zff0q7p25fg9g85u5kj134odn1sm0rvokctj1nb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie1o34c5h2bs)**. Click the link below to request a FREE guide that will show you how to diversify your retirement portfolio in a way that could shelter it from runaway inflation & hefty tax bills. It’s all about one of the biggest IRS “loopholes” that retirees (and soon to be retirees) overlook these days... And under Joe Biden, no one can be sure how long this loophole will stay open. That’s why, [when you click this link, we’ll rush this guide directly to your door ASAP](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0msnc4jfm5s63v1js6o5s5ahbql2ku3jdfp7nio_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie1o34c5h2bs) \-- we’ll even cover the shipping and handling charges! **So before all of Joe Biden’s planned tax changes hit, do yourself a favor...** [**Get educated about your options, and protect as much of your money as you can.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo3ctjasi4fem4h70d0f5n7lb6thddiat55gtmvo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1c5ie1o34c5h2bs)

| PRESIDENT TRUMP JUST ENDORSED CULP!

|
Wednesday afternoon, I received a phone call from West Palm Beach, Florida. The voice on the other end of the line was a familiar one. It was President Donald J. Trump and he wanted to discuss my campaign for Congress against impeachment voter Dan Newhouse. Our conversation lasted approximately 10 minutes and at the end, he told me directly that he was glad to endorse me and to support We the People in Washington State.

You can read the endorsement via his spokeswoman on Twitter, [here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucOFas9c_tsM4xaNj17_Ma8x0Fsr5uJoqxdqmCVmzV6K2W3Gj259CVfdAJfHe5kUGI7TLksw2imzUKWrQUmgvUGVZ3gKIVCGZaLioP72l0_ptFcFDRSuqRnnmsNANmKDnRjck7qqcd0PA6NCm6fVrj0gXNX6qLSxcY50CD1eYCOgMCpMH3GV0z9scJkiPNpn&c=e070iD1lFsHnuqkPhpAwg1KX7kC6Nd2BHO1sajferNm8mA7kzKx8-w==&ch=VQJKdQpR6hntwMWbARxPQ-YnJUrA13PChjMrLptisPX8NyUj6_lpNA==). As usual, the MSM hacks at the Seattle Times misreported our fundraising numbers and took cheap shots at our campaign within hours of the announcement.

Yet we are undeterred.

The establishment Republicans and the radical left media relentlessly hammered our campaign in 2020. Our race in 2022 against establishment Republican Dan Newhouse will be no different. They can't stand the voices of We the People. Make no mistake: they don't just hate me. They hate you. They hate us. They hate We the People because they can't control us and we WILL have our voices heard.

If you haven't already supported our campaign financially because you were waiting to see whom President Trump endorsed in the crowded Washington Congressional District 4 field, now is the time to step up. As I mentioned Tuesday, this month we need to raise $50,000 to start catching up with Newhouse's fundraising haul. We're already beating him in the polls--by 13% according to a recent poll reported by Breitbart. [You can read it here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ucOFas9c_tsM4xaNj17_Ma8x0Fsr5uJoqxdqmCVmzV6K2W3Gj259CQ_F-Av7p4oZn32ivpngG0j45jiRRwE_5leL05nXlvubgHKSakkeKEmqVsoHa3RtT1ReoduFokNj3hCLbH9Mc5TlHQvV4tNi7y70nY1C2vyskYyK-_mAQ2sWW3RWLIWdqmVS2z50zbVxIQMXaX6qsJDJA6YFFO-mPxCBCsg0mj4Gql1MyUg4JmnlCsqruYFVFrWhFNaTwTt7QxQEI1i4599_DH4xVHnCND_SDBQjV4G3StsQ8BMGpSQV-S2a5VufyCAzuSsGQq5w&c=e070iD1lFsHnuqkPhpAwg1KX7kC6Nd2BHO1sajferNm8mA7kzKx8-w==&ch=VQJKdQpR6hntwMWbARxPQ-YnJUrA13PChjMrLptisPX8NyUj6_lpNA==) Now we have the President's full support. Now we will begin to press forward. Now is the time to win--just like we did in 2020 against a field of 35 challengers.

We were made for this moment. Fortune favors the bold--let's capture it.

In liberty,

Loren

**Welcome to Firebrand! **Each week, you'll receive the latest Firebrand news and content. At Firebrand, we focus on the most urgent threats to the American way of life and take the fight to the corrupt Left-wing corporate, media, and political alliance. We fight to win.
# **Stay Informed, Stay In the Fight**
This week, attorney Molly McCann discusses the ongoing trucker protests in Canada and the legal issues surrounding GoFundMe's cancellation of donations to the protestors. In our new video, "Blue America Has A Messaging Problem," Firebrand highlights the Left's escalating hypocrisy and viciousness towards any who oppose their unconstitutional power grabs. | **New Podcast **
# America's Moment
**February 8th **Molly discusses GoFundMe's treatment of the Trucker Convoy, the warning signs from the Left that the Right needs to watch, and the new China/Russia axis announced Friday. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-byudjkk-ihhjkhtyud-r/)
---

**New Video**
# Blue America Has a Messaging Problem
**February 4th **Have you noticed the Left demonizing its opponents with more vitriol than usual? You're not alone. In this new video, we break down Blue America's deranged message to patriotic citizens. [Watch Now](https://americanfirebrand.cmail19.com/t/y-l-byudjkk-ihhjkhtyud-y/)
---

# Help Firebrand Fight to Win

---
|

Thomas Jefferson was an extraordinary national hero. Abraham Lincoln was an extraordinary national hero. Police Officers keep us safe. Israel is our friend. COVID-19 came from CHINA. There is a difference between men and women. Critical Race Theory is RACIST. It shouldn't be taught in schools.

name: Charlie Crist
subject: Gov. DeSantis has refused to condemn neo-Nazi rallies in Orlando!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
This shouldn’t be hard. He has a duty to denounce hate. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41622853/329633893/-1332847279?refcode=20220210_p_1_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjc1ZjFiNy03OThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_O4iu8TuCtm6zoxCiaxrj8E4OXZVnb3RzduUWZZZQQ=&emci=0931dc89-1089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f75f1b7-798a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)
---
Folks,

Recently, there were neo-Nazi rallies in Orlando. Yes, neo-Nazis. In our Florida. Waving their despicable flags, the demonstrators hurled anti-Semitic slurs at bystanders and passing cars.

Their beliefs are antithetical to Florida's values, and every leader in our state should roundly denounce them.

But **_Gov. DeSantis has remained silent_**. At a press conference on February 1, he had a chance to condemn these neo-Nazis. He didn’t. Instead, he claimed political opponents were trying to “smear” him.
**_[This shouldn't be hard. Gov. DeSantis, denounce the neo-Nazis! Sign the petition and tell him to condemn this hate.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41622855/329633895/-1332847279?refcode=20220210_p_1_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjc1ZjFiNy03OThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_O4iu8TuCtm6zoxCiaxrj8E4OXZVnb3RzduUWZZZQQ=&emci=0931dc89-1089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f75f1b7-798a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**
Neo-Nazis and their abhorrent, failed ideology has no place in our Florida. Period. And if we want to root out evil, we must speak with one voice and say, **“Your hate will _never_ be welcome here.”**

**_[Please join me in calling on Gov. DeSantis to immediately and unequivocally denounce these rallies.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41622857/329633897/-1332847279?refcode=20220210_p_1_ND&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2Zjc1ZjFiNy03OThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_O4iu8TuCtm6zoxCiaxrj8E4OXZVnb3RzduUWZZZQQ=&emci=0931dc89-1089-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=6f75f1b7-798a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)_**

– Charlie Crist

name: Admiral's Report
subject: How We Will Win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41623026/329634383/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDc1ZjFiNy03OThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lIJfZ-KNOWFYsCrN_yYMhJxkVRkKkdKSEsTB9stssw=&emci=91a112a1-1d89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7075f1b7-798a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41623027/329634385/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDc1ZjFiNy03OThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lIJfZ-KNOWFYsCrN_yYMhJxkVRkKkdKSEsTB9stssw=&emci=91a112a1-1d89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7075f1b7-798a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
Iowa Democrats held their off-year caucuses both in person and virtually earlier this week. Caucuses are an important exercise to reinforce party building and organize the base to help build a stronger Democratic Party. Thank you to all Iowa Democrats who participated in caucuses across the state. Your efforts and dedication are exactly the types of energy we will need to shock the naysayers and topple Sen. Grassley in November. And again, a big thank you to all of you who have signed my nominating petitions to help get my name on the ballot. Getting on the ballot is the first step, and I appreciate each and every signature.
We also held meet and greets in Polk and Johnson Counties this past week. As your U.S. Senator, I will always be present and involved in every local community. From urban to rural Iowa, I will be a Senator for Iowans in every corner of the state and serve as a constant look out for opportunities for growth and innovation, which is why I visited Landus Cooperative in Perry, Iowa yesterday. Landus is Iowa’s largest farmer-owned, agricultural cooperative that employs 600 employees in more than 60 communities around the state. Farmers are the lifeblood of our state’s agricultural system, and it is always my pleasure to listen to them and learn something new.
If your county party is holding any upcoming events or if you are interested in hosting a fundraiser or meet and greet, please email us at [info@frankenforiowa.org](mailto:info@frankenforiowa.org).
Recently, our campaign made a stop in Carroll County, and I discussed the disconnect between the best interests of Iowans and the philosophies of Donald Trump whose endorsement Senator Grassley wears as a badge of honor. What is it about the prosperity gospel preached by someone with whom you have nothing in common with? It's a big mystery. Democrats are the only ones standing up for the working class and promoting policies and legislation that allow people like me, who grow up in rural areas to thrive and succeed. That’s what our message should be if we are going to be successful in November. [Click here to read the full article](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41623028/329634386/910131132?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDc1ZjFiNy03OThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lIJfZ-KNOWFYsCrN_yYMhJxkVRkKkdKSEsTB9stssw=&emci=91a112a1-1d89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=7075f1b7-798a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843).
**Upcoming Events**

Every Republican president since Ronald Reagan has sat back and watched profitability taken from the producers. Free-market to them means industry running amuck over farmers. Chuck Grassley watched this happen. Help spread the word and let’s put Grassley out to pasture once and for all.
Thank you for reading this.
Sincerely,
Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41623029/329634387/-42398318?refcode=em20220210am-nd&amounts=10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDc1ZjFiNy03OThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0lIJfZ-KNOWFYsCrN_yYMhJxkVRkKkdKSEsTB9stssw=)

Upcoming Events Every Republican president since Ronald Reagan has sat back and watched profitability taken from the producers. Free-market to them means industry running amuck over farmers. Chuck Grassley watched this happen. Help spread the word and let’s put Grassley out to pasture once and for all. Thank you for reading this. Sincerely, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) = Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

body:
Just five days after members of a synagogue were taken hostage in Colleyville, Texas, Lauren Boebert was heard asking a group of Jewish visitors to the U.S. Capitol if they were on a "reconnaissance mission." [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/41623148/329634926/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY3NTUwNmJlLTc5OGEtZWMxMS1hNTA3LTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-dhpiJxaoJVOqh89hDdvpqc9NCHqDDkwQQI5dbB0wM8=&emci=2f94451d-2988-ec11-94f6-281878b85110&emdi=f75506be-798a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Team,

**Just five days after members of a synagogue were taken hostage in Colleyville, Texas, Lauren Boebert was heard asking a group of Jewish visitors to the U.S. Capitol if they were on a "reconnaissance mission."**

The Rabbi leading the group couldn't believe what he heard, but to us, it's not surprising. The truth is, Donald Trump and the Treason Caucus have a long history of antisemitism to their names. Here are just a few comments that have made headlines in the past few years:
* Trump suggested in a 2016 campaign ad that Jewish people were robbing the American working class.
* Marjorie Taylor Greene has compared her refusal to get a vaccine with the horrific genocide that happened during the Holocaust and has also perpetrated a conspiracy of Jewish space lasers.
* On the anniversary of the Pittsburgh synagogue shooting, Ted Cruz proudly defended the right to do a Nazi salute.

**We'll be clear, antisemitism will never have a place in our country, and the very idea of it is un-American.** Boebert defended herself by saying that she was joking and refused to issue an apology for her comments. We believe that antisemitism is inexcusable, and the Jewish community deserves an apology. Now, we need to know what you think: | **[Should Lauren Boebert issue an apology?](https://action.neveragainpac.com/a/lb-fp-flashpoll?ms=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&refcode=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&source=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=SOSJceI7erK%2BqBo1JpoYt%2FCIivHiXytIoqni71iY6aXhvem9%2B%2FHvjrfTtbb5PkqZxHt%2BLXgaFiorMeUghNX1S130hAeW811TfAR6vfZadud0dXD2re4blwRJksm8rsahuWgOwkiVFY4iBqM4xSPZxA%3D%3D)** | [YES](https://action.neveragainpac.com/a/lb-fp-flashpoll?ms=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&refcode=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&source=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220210_LBFP_e1srv_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=SOSJceI7erK%2BqBo1JpoYt%2FCIivHiXytIoqni71iY6aXhvem9%2B%2FHvjrfTtbb5PkqZxHt%2BLXgaFiorMeUghNX1S130hAeW811TfAR6vfZadud0dXD2re4blwRJksm8rsahuWgOwkiVFY4iBqM4xSPZxA%3D%3D)

| | Hey, did you hear about our new billboard? When my team and I first heard Ron Johnson say this, we were disgusted — and knew the people deserved to see it for themselves. That’s why we’re amplifying his carelessness with a new billboard:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41624661/329640673/98656670?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220209_1_3&refcode2=340bdee4-7b8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBiZGVlNC03YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qeeykt-l-CzOBPk2daYombZ6nnvav2IKCCyUVDh47Y4=)
But here’s the thing – billboards aren’t cheap. We need to raise money to keep the billboard live so we can continue exposing Ron Johnson for the selfish Senator he is. Chip in today to help us meet our goal: [https://go.nelsonforwi.com/a/billboard-goal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41624662/329640674/98656670?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_220209_1_3&refcode2=340bdee4-7b8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNDBiZGVlNC03YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qeeykt-l-CzOBPk2daYombZ6nnvav2IKCCyUVDh47Y4=)

I’m the candidate that’s been fighting for Wisconsin’s working families for the past decade. Earlier this month, I met with the Oshkosh union workers who are outraged to see their hometown corporation award jobs out-of-state. In the past, I’ve protested alongside union workers to fight for worker’s rights.

And in the future, I’ll continue to be an advocate for the everyday working family, not for the billionaires.

Thank you,

Tom
