clean_body: | | Hey, did you hear about our new billboard? When my team and I first heard Ron Johnson say this, we were disgusted — and knew the people deserved to see it for themselves. That’s why we’re amplifying his carelessness with a new billboard: = But here’s the thing – billboards aren’t cheap. We need to raise money to keep the billboard live so we can continue exposing Ron Johnson for the selfish Senator he is. Chip in today to help us meet our goal: = I’m the candidate that’s been fighting for Wisconsin’s working families for the past decade. Earlier this month, I met with the Oshkosh union workers who are outraged to see their hometown corporation award jobs out-of-state. In the past, I’ve protested alongside union workers to fight for worker’s rights. And in the future, I’ll continue to be an advocate for the everyday working family, not for the billionaires. Thank you, Tom Sent from my iPhone | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. Local officials have been leading our country through the pandemic because Donald Trump and Ron Johnson have failed. Tom is running for U.S. Senate because we need real leaders in Washington who will take COVID seriously. And if we can take on a pandemic, we can take on anything. And if you can win in a red county six times, you can win anywhere. If you’d like to unsubscribe, = Paid for by Nelson for Wisconsin Nelson for Wisconsin PO Box 361 Kaukauna, WI 54130 United States**

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Lankford vs. Lahmeyer DEBATE
body:
Lankford vs Lahmeyer DEBATE... It is clear that the US Senate race in Oklahoma is going to be one to remember. Every indicator (Fundraising, Polling
| | [](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3099.1.a2ab3bc58b092de7114e3d1d9f994acb) |
---
## Lankford vs Lahmeyer DEBATE...
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3100.1.dafabb707329cb6ffb2e0739b04269df)
---
It is clear that the US Senate race in Oklahoma is going to be _one to remember_.
Every **indicator** (Fundraising, Polling and Media Engagement) shows it is a _two-man race_ between **Incumbent** [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3101.1.5b41ac5db3d62d18fcce46f1481a765a) and **Outsider** [Jackson Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3102.1.31ccbb0d2d4879e2432be45142986d32).
For the last several months, I have requested a debate with **Incumbent** [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3103.1.3d1e70adfa6625dcce2385430b96a694). In fact, I confronted him in Tulsa at event and asked for a debate. He angrily said "**No**." See the confrontation here: [Lahmeyer confronts Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3104.1.180798cc01e3526ccaeb55dc6fdb162c).
In December, the **Oil and Gas Workers Association** requested that both [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3105.1.399faec0c30f33b02d4e69d397cad2c8) and I agree to a debate. I accepted and of course [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3106.1.e8edcb51edd527e494adab06448310ee) did not.
Last week, another organization asked me if I would be willing to have a debate with **Incumbent** [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3107.1.2535445b51bb43d9e812c03637bd6bb2) and my answer was **YES**.
This group is going to approach [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3108.1.2a5feb1e64162850ad5fa4391b6ff8e5) and I believe he owes it to the people of Oklahoma and the United States of America to stand on a debate stage and give an answer for his _lackluster_ record.
We need to put pressure on **Incumbent** [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3109.1.7d10c837e52dbd126b5b47cf7173052d) to accept a debate challenge.
I want to encourage you to use your **VOICE** and call his office 405-509-1182 as well as post on his social media accounts about the need for him to debate [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3110.1.87add6e3da2b2ab155a0297231961a31).
We are going to make history by taking down America's #1 RINO!
In order to do this, it will take all of us utilizing our TIME, TALENT and TREASURE.
Here are 3 ways to help:
**1**. Attend and invite people to our rallies (See info below).
**2**. Host a Meet & Greet - email Caitlin@jacksonlahmeyer.com
**3**. Join 6000+ individuals and donate to the campaign so we can get our message out - www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/donate
Together we will #SaveAmerica!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3111.1.a2abcbbfe625b38f33ea527f57cca76c), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3112.1.c04813c6138c8435b296e404248febf5), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3113.1.1c3ce4d7e45e2b1fd75b227f56800088), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3114.1.fcf6dc2c5e24a592a7bad3ce29ce0192), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3115.1.af504e379c1c3e42965bbb88e6ccc07f)).
| | [ Click Here To Remove Incumbent James Lankford ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3116.1.7e57e8da6c3225488ea0c13066443671)
---
---
## 75% SOLD OUT!!!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3117.1.6c1aca5c936e95208770bc703e895140)
---
America's General, **Michael Flynn** , and the legendary, **Roger Stone** , are joining me in **Oklahoma** for _2 Nights in 2 Cities_ (**OKC and Tulsa**)
I would like to invite you to hear what I call, "_Inside Baseball_ " from two men that are in the know. We are releasing the event details today and these two events will be the hottest tickets in Oklahoma.
Tickets:
General - $20
Sponsored - $40
VIP - $100
Meet & Greet Pass - $500
Scholarship - $10
Reserve your spot ASAP:
**[Oklahoma City](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3118.1.4fdbb998a633bc06949433a1d05d1577)** : Friday, March 4th at 7pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3119.1.8fa9a8e12509ba169b74769d24df86c5)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641935](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3120.1.53af3864869dcfb54bac67be66a4ac39)
**[Tulsa](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3121.1.7463a26adb8aafc43f0807a26eef37cb)** : Saturday, March 5th at 6pm
Reserve Your Spot [Here](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3122.1.e5986615bea8096c400aa867e23bba2d)
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/641941](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3123.1.1d510a6ed1ba621467ac7bd388bcdca0)
For more questions visit [www.jacksonlahmeyer.com/flynn](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3124.1.7ec66e80ee832225b533128087ce28fb)
---
---
©2022 Lahmeyer For Senate INC. | 3939 S Harvard Ave #140 Tulsa, OK 74135
---
| [Web Version](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3125.1.0127c02430d6133e50663efa417aa63c&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjY1ODM2OTUtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtNGRlYzg3MmUzOGM2M2FjNzU5MzJiYjk2YzI4YmUyODViNGZjZDY0ZiIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMzczMzI4NSJ9 "Web Version") [Preferences](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3126.1.826d06a938bdecfe5a0da016184333e3&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjY1ODM2OTUtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtNGRlYzg3MmUzOGM2M2FjNzU5MzJiYjk2YzI4YmUyODViNGZjZDY0ZiIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMzczMzI4NSJ9 "Preferences") [Forward](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=3733285.3127.1.265ffffae31371ba80642f467e2cd48a&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjY1ODM2OTUtMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtNGRlYzg3MmUzOGM2M2FjNzU5MzJiYjk2YzI4YmUyODViNGZjZDY0ZiIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiMzczMzI4NSJ9 "Forward") [Unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=3733285-166583695-13583593210-4dec872e38c63ac75932bb96c28be285b4fcd64f "Unsubscribe")

From: **Jim Jordan**
Date: January 21, 2022
Subject: Do What You Said You Would Do

Fellow Conservative, I signed a very limited number of copies of my new book, _Do What You Said You Would Do._

As an elite Conservative Patriot, I know you need to have one – so I set one aside for you until midnight tonight._As I said, there are an extremely limited number of signed copies and this is your only chance to grab one._

**[By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gvnn-1xihm-4qqlpo4/ "By ordering your copy now you will be receiving a great read and supporting critical efforts to take back our Conservative House Majority. ")**

Taking back the House is the key to saving America. Without the House, our country will be lost forever to Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left.

**[So please don't pass up this opportunity to ensure Pelosi fails in her quest to retain the speaker's gavel AND get your hands on this LIMITED EDITION signed copy of my book! **[Do you?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gvnn-1xiho-4qqlpo6/ "Do you?")**

Thank you,

Jim Jordan

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

Peter,

What if I told you we have a chance to...

name: Fair Fight Action
subject: We still have work to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
The Supreme Court just blocked a lower court order requiring Alabama to redraw its new congressional map to comply with the Voting Rights Act.

Fair Fight |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41625917/329645500/1793776944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTE5MWFlOS03ZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFIZBK93lPZImsAHrpel5cd33Q-2t8RXyIAIGnW1HPk=&emci=859dc5d4-058a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=5e191ae9-7d8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=1037277)

| | Friend, Last year, we saw legislators in so many states introduce anti-voter bills after unprecedented voter turnout and historic wins. We’re now a little over a month into the new year and their efforts at voter suppression have not lost momentum. In fact, just this week the Supreme Court blocked a lower court order requiring Alabama to redraw its new congressional map to comply with the federal Voting Rights Act. **This ruling effectively allows racial gerrymandering in a district that might have elected two Black House members—which is exactly why we need supporters and advocates like you.** [**Will you continue supporting the work that Fair Fight Action does with a contribution of $10, $25 or $50 today? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41625918/329645501/354838442?refcode=020922email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTE5MWFlOS03ZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFIZBK93lPZImsAHrpel5cd33Q-2t8RXyIAIGnW1HPk=) We know the protection and advancement of voting rights has never been a quick and easy fight. It’s supporters like you who can help us win and protect our democracy. We have been able to mitigate and block some of the worst state anti-voter bills. For example, last year in Georgia we were able to preserve no-excuse vote by mail and automatic voter registration during a very challenging legislative session. **We and our allies can continue the fight in states across the country.** The freedom to vote should not be met with obstacles. The ballot should be readily accessible to all eligible voters. Will you join us in the fight? [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41625919/329645502/354838442?refcode=020922email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTE5MWFlOS03ZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WFIZBK93lPZImsAHrpel5cd33Q-2t8RXyIAIGnW1HPk=) — Team Fair Fight |

clean_body: The Supreme Court just blocked a lower court order requiring Alabama to redraw its new congressional map to comply with the Voting Rights Act. Fair Fight | | | Friend, Last year, we saw legislators in so many states introduce anti-voter bills after unprecedented voter turnout and historic wins. We’re now a little over a month into the new year and their efforts at voter suppression have not lost momentum. In fact, just this week the Supreme Court blocked a lower court order requiring Alabama to redraw its new congressional map to comply with the federal Voting Rights Act. This ruling effectively allows racial gerrymandering in a district that might have elected two Black House members—which is exactly why we need supporters and advocates like you. = We know the protection and advancement of voting rights has never been a quick and easy fight. It’s supporters like you who can help us win and protect our democracy. We have been able to mitigate and block some of the worst state anti-voter bills. For example, last year in Georgia we were able to preserve no-excuse vote by mail and automatic voter registration during a very challenging legislative session. We and our allies can continue the fight in states across the country. The freedom to vote should not be met with obstacles. The ballot should be readily accessible to all eligible voters. Will you join us in the fight? = — Team Fair Fight | ---|---|--- | 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2021 Fair Fight PAC - All rights reserved. name: Hillsdale College via CIntel
subject: Start learning today in “The David Story”!
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWOjLpJHNR

While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who
slew the giant, they likely don't know his full story-especially
the tragedies that
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWOjLpJHNR

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend,

While many people are familiar with David as
the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don't know his
full story-especially the tragedies that befall his family and
his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the
story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David's momentous life provides profound
insights into many of life's most important questions, including:
What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man?
How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the
best way to lead others?
Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of
English Justin Jackson, "The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King"
examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This
FREE eight-lesson course explores David's character and the
consequences of his choices on his family and the people of
Israel. By taking this course, you'll learn more about the nature
of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance. In short, you'll
learn more about what truly matters in life.
Enroll in "The David Story" for free today.

Join us in the pursuit of a deeper
understanding of the Bible by enrolling in this free course
today.

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning

Hillsdale College

Enroll in "The David Story" for free today. Join us in the pursuit of a deeper understanding of the Bible by enrolling in this free course today. Warm regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system January 18, 2022. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Retire Liz Cheney
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Patriot:

It's time to retire Liz Cheney.
The RNC's decision to censure Cheney last week was largely symbolic. What we really need is to remove her from Congress by replacing her with a true conservative.
You can help us do that today by supporting Harriet Hageman for Congress in Wyoming.
Cheney is the media's favorite Republican because she joined with Nancy Pelosi to attack and impeach Donald Trump. But long before she betrayed her president, she betrayed her state and her party.
Cheney has had a weak voting record during her entire congressional career. She sees her job as helping Democrats pass legislation, rather than fighting them to save America. She is a classic RINO whose loyalty is to the Swamp, not the people she serves.
Wyoming only gets one member of Congress and they deserve someone who shares and fights for their values. That's why Harriet Hageman is challenging an incumbent despite all Cheney's power and connections.
Please support Harriet Hageman with a generous contribution of any amount up to $5,800 today.
House Freedom Fund will pay all processing fees and transfer 100% of your donation directly to the Hageman campaign.
The stakes are too high today to sit on the sidelines.
Harriet is the leader Wyoming has been waiting for. For the last 20 years, she has been fighting back against federal agencies that threaten our rights with overbearing regulations. As an attorney, she...
▶︎ Fought Bill Clinton's attempt to block access to one-third of Wyoming's National Forest Lands;
▶︎ Stopped the EPA's efforts to take control of irrigation infrastructure and operations, and
▶︎ Blocked the USDA from forcing livestock producers to use radio-frequency eartags and register ranches with the federal government.
Liz Cheney ducks fights - or joins the other side! Harriet has been fighting and winning conservative victories for decades.
Harriet is exactly what Washington needs more of and exactly who we need fighting for all of us.
The DC establishment will do everything it can to protect Cheney. Only a national grassroots effort will stop her. We can do it, but we need everyone to pitch in.
Please join the fight for America's future by supporting Harriet Hageman today!
Liz Cheney comes from a Washington Establishment dynasty. She will raise millions from corporate dollars, and from Democrats too. Harriet's only support is us.
Can we count on your help for Harriet's campaign? We need her - and in this fight, she needs us!
Harriet Hageman has answered the call. Please do the same for her by making a contribution today.
Thank you for fighting for conservative leadership in Washington and for being willing to help retire liberal Republicans like Liz Cheney.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

 

 

PRIORITY HOUSE CANDIDATES

 

HARRIET HAGEMAN

 

 

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

DONATE

 

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates get the financial support they need to compete with establishment candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

 

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate political action committee that helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and limited government, and who support policies that
promote liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense. Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status
are not permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

name: Deirdre Gilbert
subject: VOLUNTEER MEETING THURSDAY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Committee to Elect Gilbert for Governor [Preferences](https://gilbertforgovernor
body:
Friendly reminder for TEAM GILBERT'S weekly meeting on Thursday !! [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjlgly-iduiyhurdd-r/)
# Volunteer Meeting Reminder
# Volunteers Needed
### **We Need Your Help!**
We are gearing up for the ride of a lifetime and we are going to need all hands on deck. We are currently looking for volunteers to assist us in several areas for the Gilbert for Governor campaign; like knocking on doors, making phone calls, hosting a fundraiser, assisting with digital and online marketing, and scheduling. What's good about this, is you CAN WORK FROM HOME! Just give us a few hours of your time. As you may or may not know Deirdre Gilbert has decided to run as an Independent Candidate. As an independent, she must acquire signatures to get on the ballot in November. We are going to need about 200 Volunteers to assist us with this endeavor. If you want to help us with this, please send an email to info@gilbert4gov.com. We are very excited about those that have already joined us, but we are in need of so much more so that we can WIN this race. Every Thursday we will have online training and/or meetings to discuss the strategies that is needed to run this race and WIN it. Here is the link to join us every Thursday at 7PM (CST). Bring some friends along! Thank you so much for your support!https://us02web.zoom.us/j/82872448465?pwd=czVCUU82bTlxLy8wZjlPMlZuUERLUT09Meeting ID: 828 7244 8465 Passcode: 307107 [](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjlgly-iduiyhurdd-y/)
## * Registration *
### **VOLUNTEER LINK**
[SIGN UP TODAY!](https://gilbertforgovernor.cmail19.com/t/y-l-bjlgly-iduiyhurdd-j/)
## * Donation *

name: Kathy Barnette
subject: I made a statement on Newsmax TV
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011o9OcaMWoX34bXX27GWj3LAJd3MUFGLdiooUOHAiCUP8TTFMq_q7YcaraiqCBd-ZJDKliRqghvWEjvyrLkIBlZUg6RJ0op0YX1CYZDaG6MQfKeLfTDHsFWy8GS6PtWCTbfwL7ksATRmAf4MezJNUn0ZNrWNeZTnK4HpNycT9Q13S5UsluaWEExvXHsNAYaSW&c=_B3DX1F2PLt85UX83WAEp7A9xj_Cc9iM51C_e3RjzP8rpi_SmMns9Q==&ch=XaefMYGrMsEpWS0813CN4zQaiBV9d-zm8vqbTxCkfmtd0Vss1h6XJQ==)
---
|
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter ,
---
| Last week, I had the chance to state my case on national TV why I should be the next U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania.
"This is the greatest nation on the planet, but we need to do a better job in picking the right candidates to run on the Republican ticket."
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011o9OcaMWoX34bXX27GWj3LAJd3MUFGLdiooUOHAiCUP8TTFMq_q7YcaraiqCBd-ZJDKliRqghvWEjvyrLkIBlZUg6RJ0op0YX1CYZDaG6MQfKeLfTDHsFWy8GS6PtWCTbfwL7ksATRmAf4MezJNUn0ZNrWNeZTnK4HpNycT9Q13S5UsluaWEExvXHsNAYaSW&c=_B3DX1F2PLt85UX83WAEp7A9xj_Cc9iM51C_e3RjzP8rpi_SmMns9Q==&ch=XaefMYGrMsEpWS0813CN4zQaiBV9d-zm8vqbTxCkfmtd0Vss1h6XJQ==)
---
| | | [WATCH THE INTERVIEW HERE!](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011o9OcaMWoX34bXX27GWj3LAJd3MUFGLdiooUOHAiCUP8TTFMq_q7YcaraiqCBd-ZJDKliRqghvWEjvyrLkIBlZUg6RJ0op0YX1CYZDaG6MQfKeLfTDHsFWy8GS6PtWCTbfwL7ksATRmAf4MezJNUn0ZNrWNeZTnK4HpNycT9Q13S5UsluaWEExvXHsNAYaSW&c=_B3DX1F2PLt85UX83WAEp7A9xj_Cc9iM51C_e3RjzP8rpi_SmMns9Q==&ch=XaefMYGrMsEpWS0813CN4zQaiBV9d-zm8vqbTxCkfmtd0Vss1h6XJQ==)
---
| This is our chance to reclaim the Republican Party, win this Senate seat, and get back to fighting for issues that actually matter to Pennsylvanians.
I have been traveling the commonwealth - over 1,000 miles per week \- to talk to voters about how they have been looked over by the leaders of BOTH political parties. I'm working hard to bring these people in and reach communities that aren't typically Republican \- and I am the only candidate in the race who can do this.
I hope you've joined me in this new fight for Pennsylvania and the future of our country. If you haven't, be sure to [chip in a small donation](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011o9OcaMWoX34bXX27GWj3LAJd3MUFGLdiooUOHAiCUP8TTFMq_q7YcaraiqCBd-ZJDKliRqghvWEjvyrLkIBlZUg6RJ0op0YX1CYZDaG6MQfKeLfTDHsFWy8GS6PtWCTbfwL7ksATRmAf4MezJNUn0ZNrWNeZTnK4HpNycT9Q13S5UsluaWEExvXHsNAYaSW&c=_B3DX1F2PLt85UX83WAEp7A9xj_Cc9iM51C_e3RjzP8rpi_SmMns9Q==&ch=XaefMYGrMsEpWS0813CN4zQaiBV9d-zm8vqbTxCkfmtd0Vss1h6XJQ==), [put up a yard sign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011o9OcaMWoX34bXX27GWj3LAJd3MUFGLdiooUOHAiCUP8TTFMq_q7Yazs77Vfm4Se59chQvSVTUPjCdo66glNBANEnTVnvSzqGp2xE4GEB37gLd1BpE5vwaWuJGIwqyo0IkP6fRFy6nz0c071O4FV6Pn9egeWPohUcTA9ovTyBjEljxoRmL6ZEzYap3XFSWgQ5x6xSdqp6g92eIi-m6u5dSiU3C_wigLYYYOqZ6r2NpoJnZYpAp2aDCvqqcSK5IB5UlafOyilJmCxCTfp2nVyGPDU_LK4XQUlRjbX2BZ6xMA=&c=_B3DX1F2PLt85UX83WAEp7A9xj_Cc9iM51C_e3RjzP8rpi_SmMns9Q==&ch=XaefMYGrMsEpWS0813CN4zQaiBV9d-zm8vqbTxCkfmtd0Vss1h6XJQ==), [or volunteer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011o9OcaMWoX34bXX27GWj3LAJd3MUFGLdiooUOHAiCUP8TTFMq_q7YXHcL2PpoOvcRk4PDmx5KH69Hx62q5f_L4CorQQGMDpY0mmK7O1wVpEk7xfFOMscyWjMFmdBrb2cfcnewOS60abJqB0hSvyD81za4KDjI8fB3iDZd0QPQZp56TOTBFLtgg==&c=_B3DX1F2PLt85UX83WAEp7A9xj_Cc9iM51C_e3RjzP8rpi_SmMns9Q==&ch=XaefMYGrMsEpWS0813CN4zQaiBV9d-zm8vqbTxCkfmtd0Vss1h6XJQ==) for the campaign today!

| Kathy Barnette

"This is the greatest nation on the planet, but we need to do a better job in picking the right candidates to run on the Republican ticket." | == | | | == | This is our chance to reclaim the Republican Party, win this Senate seat, and get back to fighting for issues that actually matter to Pennsylvanians. I have been traveling the commonwealth - over 1,000 miles per week \- to talk to voters about how they have been looked over by the leaders of BOTH political parties. I'm working hard to bring these people in and reach communities that aren't typically Republican \- and I am the only candidate in the race who can do this. I hope you've joined me in this new fight for Pennsylvania and the future of our country. body:
Every Floridian needs to hear this

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41630974/329663660/-1468176026?refcode=210desantis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I2ZGNlMy04NDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SR9vS8tgE8HSbZLWpWnBdy-_OTtX6F0vzWFDMNxysf0=) Peter, More than a week after Nazis took to the streets of Florida to spew hatred and terrorize our communities, Governor DeSantis is still refusing to denounce them. _He’s refusing to speak against the antisemitism and white supremacy running rampant in our state._ **This is unheard of. It's unpatriotic. And it's un-American.** **And I'm angry, Peter.** **** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41630975/329663661/-1468176026?refcode=210desantis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxM2I2ZGNlMy04NDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SR9vS8tgE8HSbZLWpWnBdy-_OTtX6F0vzWFDMNxysf0=) I'm angry as a member of Florida's Jewish community, who knows what hatred and bigotry can do to a society. I'm angry as a community leader, whose number one priority is the safety and well-being of Florida residents. And I'm angry as a Floridian, who's had to watch Governor DeSantis drag our state down, sow division, and let hatred fester without lifting a finger to stop it. **And I know you're angry too, Peter. But together, we can use our anger and our frustration to power real change in our state — to teach compassion instead of hatred, to elect leaders who will stand up for what's right, and to bring something new to Florida.**

clean_body: Every Floridian needs to hear this = Peter, More than a week after Nazis took to the streets of Florida to spew hatred and terrorize our communities, Governor DeSantis is still refusing to denounce them. He’s refusing to speak against the antisemitism and white supremacy running rampant in our state. This is unheard of. It's unpatriotic. And it's un-American. And I'm angry, Peter. ** = I'm angry as a member of Florida's Jewish community, who knows what hatred and bigotry can do to a society. I'm angry as a community leader, whose number one priority is the safety and well-being of Florida residents. And I'm angry as a Floridian, who's had to watch Governor DeSantis drag our state down, sow division, and let hatred fester without lifting a finger to stop it. And I know you're angry too, Peter. But together, we can use our anger and our frustration to power real change in our state — to teach compassion instead of hatred, to elect leaders who will stand up for what's right, and to bring something new to Florida. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = With your help, we'll stand against hatred, stand up for our Jewish community, and ensure our state is a safe, welcoming place for everyone. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: These RINOs must be stopped
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greene for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Never Trump sellouts Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger voted to impeach President Trump.

Now Cheney and Kinzinger sit on Pelosi's January 6 witch hunt committee as Pelosi's handpicked RINO puppets.

name: Charlie Gearing
subject: Fixing our power grid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Charlie Gearing for Texas
body:
Peter -

The devastating power grid failure Texans faced a year ago today was unacceptable, and the legislature’s failure to address ongoing risks and deficiencies in the grid is unconscionable.

After 246 Texans lost their lives, we must do more to ensure that this never happens again and that no Texan will ever lose their life due to a power grid failure. Extremist Republicans in Austin have continuously failed to institute the necessary reforms needed to prevent another grid failure in the future - even last week nearly 70,000 Texans lost power during the storms.

In Austin, I will fight for the reforms we need to fix our grid:

Fix our state’s power grid by doing more than requiring weatherization of natural gas lines– like investing in a transition to a sustainable energy grid with more wind, solar, and hydro energy.

Improve requirements for energy providers to disclose measures they have taken to weatherize and to prevent failures from the February 2021 freeze.

Create one centralized agency to regulate energy production and distribution, and reforms to make present or future agencies less susceptible to political pressure from state leaders.

Texans deserve leaders who will fight for the issues that matter most, like fixing our power grid and ensuring that last February’s freeze never happens again.

As your next State Representative, I’ll fight to build a better Texas that works for all of our families, children, schools, neighborhoods, and communities. I’m proud to be endorsed by Wendy Davis, Ambassador Ron Kirk, and Dallas City Council Member Paula Blackmon in this race, and I hope we can count on you.

Sincerely,

Charlie

Charlie Gearing is a born and raised North Texan running for Texas House District 114 in East Dallas. He believes we need to fight for the things that matter to Texas families – investing in our teachers and students, creating good-paying jobs, expanding Medicaid, holding ERCOT accountable, restoring voting rights, and rolling back dangerous abortion restrictions.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter - | The message that's just been sent to RINOs Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger is now loud and clear: Joining Democrats to persecute Donald Trump supporters is NOT the future vision of the Republican Party! America First patriots like you have spoken out so loudly against this that these two establishment hacks were just CENSURED at a recent meeting. Your voice is making an impact, and it's purging the RINOs from our ranks! | | | == | Take a look: | == | Let this be a message for ALL Republicans in this important election year. When we take back power, we can't allow weak RINOs to drag us back to the days of accepting the frame of the Dems and corporate media rather than carving out our own destiny. We need fighters who will put America First - not cave to those who hate us and our values! I'm working to make sure we get that vision in 2022... name: John King
subject: I’m taking the plunge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
We have to act now to combat the adverse effects of climate change putting our state in danger.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41635470/329678252/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220210-b1_fr_in-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220210-b1_fr_in-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220210&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_in&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=cef89d81-8a8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY4OWQ4MS04YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YcrB4M8dji3ALR1NNdC55oqkt-1ObdikduvUimmvx5w=)
---
| Peter, for too long, politicians have promised progress in the fight against climate change. But the effects of the climate crisis are impacting Marylanders now, and it’s more clear than ever before that those promises have been hollow. **As governor, I will ensure that Maryland steps up as a national leader in the fight against climate change – and I’m committed to doing just that now as well.** The crisis demands immediate action, which is why this Saturday, I will be joining the Chesapeake Climate Action Network (CCAN) and taking the Polar Plunge into the Chesapeake Bay to show just how far (and how cold) I’m willing to go to protect our environment. Protecting our state and our world from the effects of climate change is something that I believe in wholeheartedly, and as the most climate forward candidate in this race, I am ready to do whatever it takes to bring awareness to the issue — **even if it means jumping into the Chesapeake in the freezing cold.** Just like a charity fun run, plunge participants take pledges from their friends and family to support their polar plunge and CCAN’s vital work. _**[If you are able, will you pledge to support their efforts through my team’s page today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41635471/329678253/199983390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY4OWQ4MS04YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YcrB4M8dji3ALR1NNdC55oqkt-1ObdikduvUimmvx5w=&emci=9a5c59c1-f589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cef89d81-8a8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_ | [MAKE A PLEDGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41635472/329678254/199983390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY4OWQ4MS04YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YcrB4M8dji3ALR1NNdC55oqkt-1ObdikduvUimmvx5w=&emci=9a5c59c1-f589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cef89d81-8a8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
We cannot continue allowing the adverse effects of climate change to put our state in danger. **Maryland can lead the way in addressing the climate crisis, providing an example for others to follow, but we need to take action now.** From protecting and restoring the Chesapeake Bay, to cracking down on polluters, to becoming one of the first states to achieve net zero greenhouse gas emissions, to ensuring stakeholders from communities historically affected by pollution and environmental injustice have a role in decision-making – together we can tackle the challenges of the climate crisis head on.
Everyone deserves to live in a healthy and clean environment, no matter their income or zip code. As governor, I will fight to make this happen for Marylanders. Can I count on you to join me?
_**[Please Peter, show your support for climate action by making a donation to support my team’s Polar Plunge today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41635473/329678255/199983390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY4OWQ4MS04YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YcrB4M8dji3ALR1NNdC55oqkt-1ObdikduvUimmvx5w=&emci=9a5c59c1-f589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cef89d81-8a8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_
When you support my plunge, you’re supporting an organization that is organizing to revolutionize public transportation and electrify buildings, pushing back against new fossil fuel infrastructure, and protecting our coastal communities. Can you help me reach my polar plunge goal to raise money for CCAN?
[MAKE A PLEDGE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41635474/329678256/199983390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY4OWQ4MS04YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YcrB4M8dji3ALR1NNdC55oqkt-1ObdikduvUimmvx5w=&emci=9a5c59c1-f589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cef89d81-8a8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)
---
Thank you,
John King
P.S. — If you’d like to learn more about my plans to invest in Maryland’s long term environmental future and my roadmap to a new green economy and carbon neutral future, check out my climate policy _**[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41635475/329678257/1052240719?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWY4OWQ4MS04YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YcrB4M8dji3ALR1NNdC55oqkt-1ObdikduvUimmvx5w=&emci=9a5c59c1-f589-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=cef89d81-8a8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484)**_!

She knows MI-11 through and through because she already represents the majority of the district. Haley’s is a voice for the future and one we desperately need fighting for us in Congress.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: a picture of me 30 years ago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41636163/329681288/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk680-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODJiMjJlMi04YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jL65NpEFHTXMZkeuRI_h0kCXcamEmdBDm2ufWAhNVQ=)
Peter – When this photo of me was taken, my opponent Sen. Grassley had _already_ been in D.C. for 17 years. Despite promises to the contrary, he'd also already turned his back on working class families like the one I grew up in. Good-paying jobs started disappearing. People left Iowa.
Thirty years later, Sen. Grassley is _still_ in Washington and has done nothing to fight for our working class families. Instead, Sen. Grassley bought himself a nearly million-dollar home in our nation’s capital.

**That little girl you see in the picture? Well, she grew up to be the youngest woman to flip a House seat from red to blue. Now, with your help, I'll defeat Sen. Grassley ****and become the youngest woman ever elected to the Senate.**
I know that unseating a seven-term incumbent doesn't happen overnight. But my family taught me that when there's work to be done or a problem to solve, you say yes – and right now, Sen. Grassley is causing a lot of problems for Iowa and our democracy. Rather than take action to protect our workers and unions, or at bare minimum protect the right to vote, Sen. Grassley is beholden to the far-right agenda of the former president who endorsed him at a rally here in Iowa.
**It's no wonder Sen. Grassley is facing record-low approval ratings. Iowans know it's time to show him the door, and I promise you nobody is going to work harder than me to do it. But to win in November and protect our Senate majority, I need your help.**
**[Please, before midnight tonight, will you make a $5 donation right here and now to finally defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and give working class families a leader who will fight for them?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41636164/329681289/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk680-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODJiMjJlMi04YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0jL65NpEFHTXMZkeuRI_h0kCXcamEmdBDm2ufWAhNVQ=)**

Thank you for having my back here.

– Abby

name: Maurielle
subject: This is the moment
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]

Friend,
As the new Deputy Campaign Manager for Rushern Baker and Nancy Navarro, I wanted to take a second to introduce myself.
I’ve known Mr. Baker for most of my life. Living just a few houses down the street in Cheverly, he watched me grow up. We went to church together, and I played with his kids. As I’ve gotten older, our relationship has blossomed into more of a mentor/mentee style relationship – and it’s been really inspiring getting to know him as more than a neighbor. I even represented Mr. Baker while serving on the Cheverly Town Council.
He’s as authentic as they come, and he will do an amazing job as our next Governor!
As a Black woman working in politics, I’ve experienced a mixed bag. Locally it was never much of an issue - Black leadership was the norm. But outside of that bubble, I’ve seen some really caustic and sad behavior.
Rushern and Nancy make sure that EVERYONE is seen and heard. And their commitment to fighting for equity for all Marylanders is one of the many reasons I’m so excited about this campaign.
For me this is more than a job. This is the moment. This feels good.
I’m going to do absolutely everything I can to support this campaign, I’m hoping today you will join me in the form of a donation. Let’s make sure that the Baker/ Navarro ticket is the WINNER this November. [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Thank you,
http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
Maurielle Stewart
Deputy Campaign Manager
“The People are our interest group.”
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
**P.S. because of Maryland’s Public Finance program, your donation will be eligible for a matching program explained here [http://secure.ngpvan.com/t_OakHAu1Eyexxm3ZVTwZw2]
By Authority, Baker and Navarro for Maryland, Calvin Brown, Treasurer
Baker & Navarro for Maryland
9646 Marlboro Pike
Upper Marlboro , MD 20772
United States

name: 250 active Democrats needed
subject: This election is going to be even tougher than we planned for
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|
---

| | [2010 was DISASTROUS for Democrats and now, thanks to the growing number of Democrats retiring from the House, 2022 is shaping up to be worse:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41637089/329684902/784518388?refcode=20220210_em_f_2AN_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhiMmI2OS04ZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5L5-EPAtAqsspdhWMMKfww2q1jvoyL7OSUF2s-jgAs=) [“The number of Democratic departures exceeds the tally of those who stepped down or ran for another office in the 2010 cycle, when the GOP picked up 63 seats in that wave election.”
_\- NPR_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41637090/329684903/784518388?refcode=20220210_em_f_2AN_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhiMmI2OS04ZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5L5-EPAtAqsspdhWMMKfww2q1jvoyL7OSUF2s-jgAs=) [Defending the House Majority was already going to be hard. Now 29 Democrats have announced their retirement from Congress and it’s made our job almost impossible.

It’s going to take even more money than we planned, and we’re running out of time to raise it. A group of generous donors knows what we’re up against and is matching every donation 7 times. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41637091/329684904/784518388?refcode=20220210_em_f_2AN_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhiMmI2OS04ZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5L5-EPAtAqsspdhWMMKfww2q1jvoyL7OSUF2s-jgAs=) | [Donate now! Match your donation SEVEN TIMES!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41637092/329684905/784518388?refcode=20220210_em_f_2AN_nd&amount=10&amounts=5,35,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzhiMmI2OS04ZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5L5-EPAtAqsspdhWMMKfww2q1jvoyL7OSUF2s-jgAs=)
---
[The only thing we’re ahead of Republicans on these days is the number of House members retiring – it’s bad. Every time a Democrat retires, it means we have one more seat to defend. Some of these seats are in battleground states where we know the races will be **_really_** hard to win.

Republicans are beating us in fundraising and in polling. Seriously. Trump and the NRCC have raised over $200 million between them. And, if the midterm elections were held today, we would lose. They’re ahead in everything that matters, and the time to change the tide is fading away fast.

That’s why every single donation you give to this email will be matched 7X. We can’t wait until October to make a final fundraising push. We can’t even wait a week. | | Democrats and Republicans don't agree on much these days, but here's something that shouldn't be partisan or controversial: _children should not live in poverty_. Over the last year, the monthly child tax credit payments have proven to change the lives of millions of American families. These payments **helped lift nearly 4 million children out of poverty. That number is staggering, and proves that direct cash payments can make a real difference to families in need.** And if you qualified to receive the monthly payments in 2021, you may be entitled to additional assistance when you file your upcoming tax returns. The monthly child tax credit was a success by all accounts and must be renewed. But in order to get this and other progressive priorities across the finish line, we need to protect and expand our razor-thin Democratic majority in the Senate. So I hope you'll join me by pitching in to help carry our grassroots momentum through November to do just that. I won't stop fighting tooth and nail for this proven and effective strategy to keep children out of poverty **This is an essential investment in American children and families. It's a no-brainer.** _Ron_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | clean_body: | | | Democrats and Republicans don't agree on much these days, but here's something that shouldn't be partisan or controversial: children should not live in poverty. Over the last year, the monthly child tax credit payments have proven to change the lives of millions of American families. These payments helped lift nearly 4 million children out of poverty. That number is staggering, and proves that direct cash payments can make a real difference to families in need. And if you qualified to receive the monthly payments in 2021, you may be entitled to additional assistance when you file your upcoming tax returns. The monthly child tax credit was a success by all accounts and must be renewed. But in order to get this and other progressive priorities across the finish line, we need to protect and expand our razor-thin Democratic majority in the Senate. So I hope you'll join me by pitching in to help carry our grassroots momentum through November to do just that. I won't stop fighting tooth and nail for this proven and effective strategy to keep children out of poverty This is an essential investment in American children and families. It's a no-brainer. name: Councilman JB Smiley, Jr.
subject: The Republicans are cheating to win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect JB Smiley
body:
Their goal is clear: they don’t want voters of elect Democrats to hold them accountable. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638115/329689111/1002998528?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlYWM3Ni05MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJvn-IxEVK1RpjuTmBEB4ScFV_ojJyapRPrPVEsmFcE=&emci=8cb122b4-8e8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d5aeac76-908a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12740612) | **Hi, team.** **I have to be honest with you. It’s unbelievable what the Republicans are doing. Just two days ago, Republican Governor Bill Lee signed into law district maps that are fully intended to dilute the power of Black and Brown voters. ** **These maps, which are now law, literally split up the fast-growing city of Nashville into three separate, majority-white Congressional districts dominated by Republicans. Their goal is clear: they don’t want voters of elect Democrats to hold them accountable. ** [**I’m running against Bill Lee because the Republicans are cheating their way into power and someone has to stop them. Will you support my campaign against Bill Lee and rush a donation today? Any amount helps, whether $5 or $500. **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638116/329689112/1590739027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlYWM3Ni05MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJvn-IxEVK1RpjuTmBEB4ScFV_ojJyapRPrPVEsmFcE=) [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638117/329689113/1590739027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlYWM3Ni05MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJvn-IxEVK1RpjuTmBEB4ScFV_ojJyapRPrPVEsmFcE=)
* * *
**Bill Lee knew exactly what he was doing when he signed those maps into law. For the Republicans, not even a supermajority in the state legislature is enough. They want to disenfranchise Democrats, especially Democrats of color, completely. ** **And here’s the thing. Tennessee looks a lot less red when you strip away the gerrymandering. There are millions of Democrats in Tennessee. But we don’t get to see ourselves represented in politics anymore because of the Republicans’ dirty games. ** [**Bill Lee has got to go. We need a Governor who will lead the people of Tennessee with fairness and honesty, not manipulation. I’m running to be that leader, but I need your help to get there. Will you chip in and donate to my campaign today? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638118/329689114/1590739027?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlYWM3Ni05MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJvn-IxEVK1RpjuTmBEB4ScFV_ojJyapRPrPVEsmFcE=) **Remember, power doesn’t go without a fight. It’s up to us to stand up to these unfair Republican tactics. That’s why I’m bringing the fight directly to Bill Lee. Are you with me? ** **Peace and Blessings,** **JB** ****
---
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638119/329689115/-1560365980?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlYWM3Ni05MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJvn-IxEVK1RpjuTmBEB4ScFV_ojJyapRPrPVEsmFcE=&emci=8cb122b4-8e8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d5aeac76-908a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12740612) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638120/329689116/2046137702?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlYWM3Ni05MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJvn-IxEVK1RpjuTmBEB4ScFV_ojJyapRPrPVEsmFcE=&emci=8cb122b4-8e8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d5aeac76-908a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12740612) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638121/329689117/-911822684?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWFlYWM3Ni05MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KJvn-IxEVK1RpjuTmBEB4ScFV_ojJyapRPrPVEsmFcE=&emci=8cb122b4-8e8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=d5aeac76-908a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=12740612)

clean_body: Their goal is clear: they don’t want voters of elect Democrats to hold them accountable. | | Hi, team. I have to be honest with you. It’s unbelievable what the Republicans are doing. Just two days ago, Republican Governor Bill Lee signed into law district maps that are fully intended to dilute the power of Black and Brown voters. These maps, which are now law, literally split up the fast-growing city of Nashville into three separate, majority-white Congressional districts dominated by Republicans. Their goal is clear: they don’t want voters of elect Democrats to hold them accountable. = = Bill Lee knew exactly what he was doing when he signed those maps into law. For the Republicans, not even a supermajority in the state legislature is enough. They want to disenfranchise Democrats, especially Democrats of color, completely. And here’s the thing. Tennessee looks a lot less red when you strip away the gerrymandering. There are millions of Democrats in Tennessee. But we don’t get to see ourselves represented in politics anymore because of the Republicans’ dirty games. = Remember, power doesn’t go without a fight. It’s up to us to stand up to these unfair Republican tactics. That’s why I’m bringing the fight directly to Bill Lee. Are you with me? Peace and Blessings, JB Democrat JB Smiley, Jr. is a native Memphian, lawyer, author, and member of the Memphis City Council running to build a Tennessee we can all be proud of. name: Gwen Moore
subject: Wisconsin is Ground Zero for the MAGA Effort
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Gwen Moore for Congress
body:

body:
I’ll get straight to the point: My Republican opponents are coming after me with everything they have. If any one of them gets their way, they’ll undo all the progress we’ve made during my time as governor.

Team — I’ll get straight to the point: **My Republican opponents are coming after me with everything they have.** If any one of them gets their way, they’ll undo all the progress we’ve made during my time as governor. Accomplishments like permanently expanding mail-in voting, rebuilding our economy, passing a public health care option, and increasing funding for public education will be lost if we don’t keep Nevada blue this next election. With Nevada ranked as a state most at-risk to flip red, we can’t afford to come up short with our fundraising. **That’s why I’m reaching out, asking for your help today in protecting our accomplishments, continuing to build a stronger Nevada, and keeping our state blue.** **Can I count on your support today?[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sisolak-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638639/329691803/-1561074788?refcode=email_02102022_SisolakPersonal&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzgwZWFkMy05MjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixJaISaxfx7oinY_wbLznEfPLf4CPa3FPS_-d2EOvyY=)** Your support is crucial right now, folks. My campaign must have what it takes to fight back against Republican attacks and continue highlighting our accomplishments for hardworking Nevadans during my time as governor. **Please use this secure link my team has generated to make an immediate donation: **
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sisolak-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41638640/329691804/-1561074788?refcode=email_02102022_SisolakPersonal&amounts=5,15,25,50,100,250&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzgwZWFkMy05MjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ixJaISaxfx7oinY_wbLznEfPLf4CPa3FPS_-d2EOvyY=)** Thank you for standing with me. Steve

name: Team Cammack
subject: Psaki laughs about rising crime...
body:
The Radical Left has proven, yet again, they live deep inside their ivory towers.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAKfkiUToZGXN9kUZdaJ_0OZgB9yftEbYkWsPPV_an8VE6SqXIZwlIZWvHdfj1h86px0x6R7txmq_7l6s-bLhu25njPFDQbgegu0NuETbyaOVkDs-Bs6AoaFtV-FXbhnPVlP5gJV_nG7o9Zz58DUkh8wQ9rKNXE2K4_OWcIlNKbb_sebGoL0z5BM8iIamrC7GlXm86Doejk=&c=DRX40Gy6It9TtILQv7qjDCjgRd4XozTVfFd4fcNtcDRH9m3TX-WbNA==&ch=1vgv_-TvE62tXiAyKWPXVn3blv8kf8MUQ6-CBt60RsvdbmVmVRi6mA==)
---
| Friend,
The Radical Left has proven, yet again, they live deep inside their ivory towers. In a recent interview discussing America's rising crime, Jen Psaki mockingly exclaimed "What does that even mean?".
Of course, Psaki will dodge any questions related to Biden's pro-crime agenda. After all, limousine liberals like Psaki and Biden hide away in their vacation homes instead of facing the truth about their soft-on-crime agenda.
How dare Psaki incredulously mock Americans worried about the safety of their communities.
Kat Cammack will hold Biden accountable for his pro-crime policies. While the Radical Left still holds the slim majority, only so much can be done to clean Congress and America's streets.
---
| | | [FIGHT FOR SAFE COMMUNITIES](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAKfkiUToZGXN9kUZdaJ_0OZgB9yftEbYkWsPPV_an8VE6SqXIZwlIZWvHdfj1h86px0x6R7txmq_7l6s-bLhu25njPFDQbgegu0NuETbyaOVkDs-Bs6AoaFtV-FXbhnPVlP5gJV_nG7o9Zz58DUkh8wQ9rKNXE2K4_OWcIlNKbb_sebGoL0z5BM8iIamrC7GlXm86Doejk=&c=DRX40Gy6It9TtILQv7qjDCjgRd4XozTVfFd4fcNtcDRH9m3TX-WbNA==&ch=1vgv_-TvE62tXiAyKWPXVn3blv8kf8MUQ6-CBt60RsvdbmVmVRi6mA==)

| Yet again, the Radical Left proves they live in a fantasy world while the rest of us deal with the reality of their terrible policies.
Safety shouldn't be a privilege for the liberal elite. Unlike the Leftist elites, working-class Americans have to live with the consequences of Biden's radical DA's that let violent felons walk the streets. Enough is enough. We need to fight for safe communities and make sure Psaki and the Biden administration take it seriously.
America is done with the Biden administration's mockery and insults. [Can Kat count on your support in her fight to take back the House and clean up America's streets?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nAKfkiUToZGXN9kUZdaJ_0OZgB9yftEbYkWsPPV_an8VE6SqXIZwlIZWvHdfj1h86px0x6R7txmq_7l6s-bLhu25njPFDQbgegu0NuETbyaOVkDs-Bs6AoaFtV-FXbhnPVlP5gJV_nG7o9Zz58DUkh8wQ9rKNXE2K4_OWcIlNKbb_sebGoL0z5BM8iIamrC7GlXm86Doejk=&c=DRX40Gy6It9TtILQv7qjDCjgRd4XozTVfFd4fcNtcDRH9m3TX-WbNA==&ch=1vgv_-TvE62tXiAyKWPXVn3blv8kf8MUQ6-CBt60RsvdbmVmVRi6mA==)

name: Clay Aiken
subject: let me share the answer…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/94965/images/Clay%20Logo%20Light.png]
Ever since I announced my campaign, folks I see at Harris Teeter or Bojangles... or pretty much anywhere else I go, have been asking me the same question: Why are you running again?
The answer is simple: I want to give something back to the place I love and the people who gave me my microphone.
...And I had the best teacher on how to do just that: Congressman David Price.
David Price was the first elected official I ever met. For those of you who don’t know him well, he was never a flashy politician... he focused on helping folks in his district with everyday issues.
I really lucked out... Over the past 35 years I’ve gotten a master class in how representatives in Washington can make a difference by bringing incredible amounts of federal funding and attention to the needs of the Triangle!
Ever since meeting David Price in the 8th grade, I have cared about politics and making a difference in my community. Today, I’m asking you to join Team Clay. Here’s a few ways to get involved:
Sign Up To Volunteer With Team Clay [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QVt_jPUTUUeJqAp-98v6og2]
sign up [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QVt_jPUTUUeJqAp-98v6og2]
Give To Team Clay’s Election Fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02102022_CongressmanPrice_2&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02102022_CongressmanPrice_2&amount=25]
I am a 10th generation North Carolinian. I grew up in the Triangle, went to school here, and taught in Wake County Schools as a special education teacher.
This journey started in the 8th grade... at Leesville Middle School in Wake County all those years ago (no need to get into just how many... ;)). David Price inspired me to run for office. Now, I hope to inspire you to find your voice on our campaign.
Sign Up To Volunteer With Team Clay [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QVt_jPUTUUeJqAp-98v6og2]
sign up [https://secure.ngpvan.com/QVt_jPUTUUeJqAp-98v6og2]
Give To Team Clay’s Election Fund [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02102022_CongressmanPrice_2&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=02102022_CongressmanPrice_2&amount=25]
- Clay
Clay is running for Congress in the North Carolina 6th. He was born, raised, and is currently raising his son in the Triangle. He's running to use his voice to speak up and stop the loudest voices on the far ends of the political spectrum from sucking up all the oxygen in our political discourse.
Donate now to join the chorus and help send Clay to Congress. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ca_email?refcode=footer&amount=25]
Paid for by Clay Aiken for North Carolina
Clay Aiken for North Carolina
PO Box 13274
Durham, NC 27709
United States
If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2abcef81-2e89-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a/8d91caf6-948a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDk2NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDkxY2FmNi05NDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=enhSwGs84cJkDZ8jQt8Oe-HGMjHSfyjeiTrREBAkWQA=&id=112382424 .

body:

| | | Patriot, this is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

_**[I sued Biden over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59515860:6ZGRgMEN0:m:1:3299561967:279EB5B91B8406AC0CF997C8B2A70B3F:r "I just sued Biden
over his brazen disregard for our immigration laws.")**_

Biden's border crisis is out of control, and states like Florida are taking a stand against the Administration's reckless policy of open borders and mass illegal immigration.
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59515860:6ZGRgMEN0:m:1:3299561967:279EB5B91B8406AC0CF997C8B2A70B3F:r)
---

_**[State Republicans across the country need your support to secure our borders.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59515860:6ZGRgMEN0:m:1:3299561967:279EB5B91B8406AC0CF997C8B2A70B3F:r "State Republicans across the country need your support to secure our borders.")**_

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: This moment is vital
body:
Hi Derek —

It’s Josh Shapiro. This is an important moment in our campaign for the Pennsylvania Governor’s office.

In 2020, Pennsylvania delivered Joe Biden the electoral votes he needed to win the White House. It was Pennsylvania where Trump and his allies launched some of their most dangerous efforts to overturn the election — and it was here that I went to court to stop them, and won.

I’m running for Governor to keep taking on the big fights for Pennsylvanians. From helping working families get ahead to making sure we all have access to the ballot box to defeating Trump’s Big Lie for good, I will never stop working to protect Pennsylvanians’ rights and move our Commonwealth forward.

I knew from the start that this race would be one of the most competitive — and important — races in the country. Republicans are going to stop at nothing to flip Pennsylvania red, spending a huge amount of money and attacking me personally. We need to be ready to fight back.

To win this race and defend Pennsylvania’s democracy, I need your support. I’m humbly asking for your help, Derek: Will you chip in a donation of any amount to our campaign and CommonGood today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_js?refcode=20220210_CGVA_JS]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_mk?refcode=20211212_CGVA_Kelly]DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_js?refcode=20220210_CGVA_JS&amount=25]

DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_js?refcode=20220210_CGVA_JS&amount=250]
Donate ANY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cgva_2021_js?refcode=20220210_CGVA_JS]

Thank you for having my back,

Josh Shapiro
Candidate for Governor of PA

name: Inventory Alerts
subject: USA T-Shirts Inside >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
We have one question for you. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3gx09--fgxr-4qqlpo8&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative, we have one question for you.
**Are you proud to be an American? **

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gx09-1xki4-4qqlpo7/ "Graphic")
---

We can’t help but be proud to be Americans! Our country is the best in the world, and we aren’t ashamed of it. Liberals love to attack our beautiful nation and even go as far to say that it’s inherently evil. Frankly, we disagree. We love America, and what it stands for across the world.

Our Founding Fathers created this nation so we could be free – the freedom of speech, the freedom of religion, the right to bear arms. We’ve been through hardships, but Americans have bravely chosen to defend these freedoms at home and abroad.

If you’re proud to be an American, then you NEED this 2022 Limited Edition USA Flag Shirt! **[These shirts are LIMITED. We only ordered enough for the first 100 Patriots to claim theirs, so do not wait another minute to claim your shirt... ACT NOW>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gx09-1xki5-4qqlpo8/ "These shirts are LIMITED. We only ordered enough for the first 100 Patriots to claim theirs, so do not wait another minute to claim your shirt... ACT NOW >>")**

---
We’re only holding on to yours for 10 minutes, Fellow Conservative, so act fast!

Thank you for showing your American Pride,
Republican Merchandise
---
| |

| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gx09-1xki8-4qqlpo1/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _A personal note from Marco Rubio_ :

Fellow Conservative, did you see what my former Trump Impeachment Manager opponent said about our race?

Demings is a do-nothing Democrat with a laughable record. Schumer and his cronies are propping her up with their multi-million dollar warchests all because they know she'll be a RUBBER STAMP for their radical agenda. If we let up and the Democrats win in Florida, they will KEEP control of the Senate and continue to force their dangerous agenda through Congress. So here's the deal:

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gx09-1xki9-4qqlpo2/ "Footer Gif")

I really do need your help, Fellow Conservative. People think they need to write huge checks in order to make a difference but that's just not true. I need folks who can give $8, $10, $12.55 or even $17 today.

You know I've reached out a lot, so don't complain if we lose. I'm committed to winning. Are you?

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: the dirty little secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wea
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0e7l1db0qbd505oi0b13nujpdh0mpsqvpf57c9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbr66d9l6cqm9pdhcqq3ao72ctgr8cr7mmpm2p70m2p6aor4s6r7addkc5o6cpj7mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbd1gepi6cd776mq6fc5lclp2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zcflvak7b8m3d6da3h2gfoai3crf97v73ouso9ko_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs) | |
---
Friend, aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense?

We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wear masks on federal property. Children must wear masks in the classroom. With no scientific support for it.

That’s what I had a chance to discuss with Fox News recently.
__
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z6nab8h45pgbl7apeo3qdekuq5jtr7f3hj8sgs38_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zm73lt3vtse2g47ub2611t634pvtla4di5s8a1k0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs)
Here's the dirty little secret about masks... It's got nothing to do with public heath.

**It’s ALL about submission.****_It's always been more about collectivism. It's been about growing government power over your lives._**

That's never been more clear than now, as these lawless bureaucrats continue with their mask requirements and shaming of the unmasked - despite the fact that the science has been clearly anti-mask for a long time.

**But it's time to draw the line.**

We can't continue to submit forever. We can't let our children be punished for personal health decisions. I'm taking a stand already and I've introduced legislation that will get rid of the federal mandate for masks on planes.

Enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zti86mrhd28t8q21despfaj72pv0aiqsf4i785lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $75**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zbao1c2q6adjl8su7f49l3kcd5idfpha09b9vfog_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zha0kkdknhb4kvj087cqu0ig7i1lk3l6nmdj48eo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zuc1l5ngu02po83koaije3v5qflmt1n780bq4eig_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs)
For too long we’ve heard that this madness is TEMPORARY._We’re told to give up our freedom. Just wear the mask. Just be quiet. It’s only 2 weeks._

Well, it’s been 2 years. And they’ll never give up this game unless WE make them.

**We must stand strong on the side of science, reject needless masks, reject government overreach, and defend our freedom.**

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhs8n4h9a2k1b4jb9spk5p74k9lvpaqtraf7h7m8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli62oj1c3h2bs)

Thank you, friend.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

clean_body: We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wea | | Friend, aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense? We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wear masks on federal property. Children must wear masks in the classroom. With no scientific support for it. That’s what I had a chance to discuss with Fox News recently. Here's the dirty little secret about masks... It's got nothing to do with public heath. It’s ALL about submission.It's always been more about collectivism. It's been about growing government power over your lives. That's never been more clear than now, as these lawless bureaucrats continue with their mask requirements and shaming of the unmasked - despite the fact that the science has been clearly anti-mask for a long time. But it's time to draw the line. We can't continue to submit forever. We can't let our children be punished for personal health decisions. I'm taking a stand already and I've introduced legislation that will get rid of the federal mandate for masks on planes. Enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight. For too long we’ve heard that this madness is TEMPORARY.We’re told to give up our freedom. Just wear the mask. Just be quiet. It’s only 2 weeks. Well, it’s been 2 years. And they’ll never give up this game unless WE make them. We must stand strong on the side of science, reject needless masks, reject government overreach, and defend our freedom. I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone. I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. Thank you, friend. In Liberty, Rand Paul | | | | | | Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate | Contribution rules: I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). subject: This should not be a political issue!

body:
| I want to say thank you! Our grassroots movement came together to help me hit my first fundraising goal of 2022 and I’m so grateful to everyone who had a chance to chip in. Now we’ve gotta keep building up to continue our fight.

Look: I’m proud of my Cherokee background and to have — _like so many Oklahomans_ — grown up on tribal land, gone to tribal supported schools, and relied on tribal healthcare. The Cherokees, Chickasaws, and Choctaws are some of the largest jobs providers in all of Oklahoma. That’s why headlines like this pisses me off!

Like so many Oklahomans, I’m tired of Governor Stitt stepping on Cherokee rights and sowing doubt in our justice system. And unlike my opponent James Lankford, I will actually take action as a leader to do something about it as your Senator.

name: Derek Marshall
subject: ANNOUNCING: Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
Peter,
I have exciting news to share with you! **Last week, the organization Ground Game LA endorsed our campaign in a strong show of solidarity.** I was one of the first members of Ground Game LA when it got off the ground a few years ago, and since then it’s evolved into one of the most influential groups in the LA metro area.
**Ground Game LA has already helped flip a congressional district from red to blue in 2018 with Katie Hill’s race.** They’ve also done incredible work around housing justice, an issue close to my heart. I’m so proud to have the endorsement of such an important organization.
**[Endorsements like these are major for our campaign, but nothing matters as much as the personal endorsement of grassroots donors like you. Will you join Ground Game LA and invest in my campaign today with a donation?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41641517/329705417/-431919476?refcode=2-9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWFkMjk0NS05YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LfvOjjFcHXIgRJRQfhR-SmtXDoH39g2JhAU_WOyCPk=)**

**Here’s what Ground Game LA had to say about their endorsement: **

_“Ground Game LA is proud to endorse one of its earliest members, Derek Marshall, in California's 23rd Congressional District.[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41641520/329705444/338508834?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWFkMjk0NS05YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LfvOjjFcHXIgRJRQfhR-SmtXDoH39g2JhAU_WOyCPk=&emci=71ffc706-088a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=61ad2945-9b8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=21617867)Derek Marshall is a community organizer that's ready to show that there's a progressive movement happening in the high desert and Inland Empire.”_
**These days, more and more organizations are joining our movement for bold, progressive change.** Ground Game LA knows better than anyone the importance of organizing our communities for social AND political change. And when it comes to California’s 23rd district, thousands upon thousands of people work down the hill in LA, so organizations like Ground Game LA understand how badly our communities here need this change.
**I’m so excited to see what our movement will do as we continue to strategize, organize, and mobilize for a better future.[Will you join our endorsers and support my campaign? Every single dollar counts, and we’re going to need major resources to take on my entrenched Republican opponent and win this race. Can I count on you to chip in today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41641521/329705445/-431919476?refcode=2-9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWFkMjk0NS05YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LfvOjjFcHXIgRJRQfhR-SmtXDoH39g2JhAU_WOyCPk=)**

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41641522/329705446/-431919476?refcode=2-9&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWFkMjk0NS05YjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3LfvOjjFcHXIgRJRQfhR-SmtXDoH39g2JhAU_WOyCPk=)**

body:

| Republicans are turning on Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger for doing their jobs, claiming that the deadly attack on our nation’s Capitol was **_“legitimate political discourse.”_**

Yet, shockingly, Mitch McConnell broke lines with the RNC when he called January 6 a violent insurrection. I agree with his statement fully, _yet my opponent obviously does not._

**Senator Jerry Moran voted against having a bipartisan Senate investigation about the deadly takeover of the Capitol. This is unacceptable – we need leaders that will be accountable and preserve our democracy.**

[I’m running to defeat Jerry Moran, but I can’t do it without your support. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

As we gear up to reach every new voter in Jimmy’s district, we need all hands on deck to endorse Jimmy and show his new constituents that he is the right choice for California’s 19th District. Thank you for stepping up at this critical moment to support Jimmy. — Team Panetta = If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from us, Authorized and Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2020, FEC ID# C00592154 Jimmy Panetta for Congress PO Box 103 Carmel Valley, CA 93924 United States ** **
