name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Republican Indoctrination
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Peter,

Tennessee Republicans are trying to indoctrinate our kids. Just this month:

- They banned “Maus,” a book about the Holocaust in McMinn County.
- Governor Lee is again using taxpayer money to bring far right Hillsdale College charter schools to Tennessee. (For those of you who are not familiar with the Koch supported Hillsdale College, they’re consistently rated as one of the worst colleges in the country for LGBTQ students, they held a panel with the Trump Administration to counter the New York Times’ 1619 Project, they sponsored the Rush Limbaugh Show and have strong ties with Betsy DeVos.)
- Conservatives held a massive book burning in Mt. Juliet burning books like Harry Potter and Twilight (??).
- Ultra-conservative group Moms For Liberty are pushing to ban an educational book about seahorses for being “too sexy.”

This is incredibly dangerous. Tennessee Republicans don’t just care about tax cuts, they never did — they want to control the minds of the next generation with their extremist, dangerous ideology, and they want to do it unchallenged.

Well we plan on challenging them with everything we’ve got.

With Republicans becoming more and more extreme by the day, will you help us fight back so that we can protect our public schools and our kids? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=express_lane_50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]

OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

They know their extremist views are increasingly unpopular with Americans, so they are lashing out and fighting to maintain control through any means necessary. This could go one of two ways: either we slide into authoritarianism by minority rule, or we fight back and ensure that these are just the death throes of their dangerous ideology.

We need to fight this together — will you chip in to help us fight for leadership that will fully fund our schools and push back against Tennessee’s Republican theocracy? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

Yours in the fight,

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bookbanning]

name: American Update
subject: You may not know the full story
body:
While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story—especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8444%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qFfWyaBXafxaVQq9qP1S5Q&sysid=1)
| | | This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13174%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=86msqL1cgVwFR7tvwdlluw&sysid=1)
---
| |
Dear Friend, While many people are familiar with David as the shepherd boy who slew the giant, they likely don’t know his full story--especially the tragedies that befall his family and his beautiful turn to repentance. In fact, at its heart, the story of David is about fathers and sons.

King David’s momentous story provides profound insights into many of life’s most important questions, including: What are my responsibilities to God? What do I owe my fellow man? How do I lead my family? How do I turn away from sin? What is the best way to lead others?

Taught by Hillsdale College Professor of English Justin Jackson, **“The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King”** examines the Old Testament books of First and Second Samuel. This eight-lesson course explores David’s character and the consequences of his choices on his family and the people of Israel.
---
| | **This is why we’ve produced our online course, “The David Story: Shepherd, Father, King,” which is now available on DVD. And you can reserve your copy using this secure link:**

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13185%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NErr8AScGERm77dpAmmtig&sysid=1)** By viewing the course, you’ll learn more about the nature of God, family, leadership, sin, and repentance; in short, you’ll learn more about what truly matters in life. **I hope you’ll reserve your DVD today and share its abiding lessons with your family and friends. The DVD is perfect for a Bible study or homeschool curriculum.**
---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13186%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SUsDvhG8NqgzDtbIsdhIjw&sysid=1)
---
| | Let’s learn what truly matters in life by studying **“The David Story.”**

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

**P.S.** If you’d like to secure a DVD box set of **“The David Story”** while they’re available, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more in support of reaching and teaching millions on behalf of liberty.

Reserve your DVD box set using the secure link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/david-story-dvd](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c13185%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NErr8AScGERm77dpAmmtig&sysid=1)**
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8444%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qFfWyaBXafxaVQq9qP1S5Q&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8444%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=qFfWyaBXafxaVQq9qP1S5Q&sysid=1)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: You Can't Gerrymander Yourself Out of a Tough Race
body:
Friends,I’m facing a tough race against a man who has no business being in Congress. | |
---
| | |
---
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kb_feb_email_el](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=50dc516a7f&e=4712f71bea)
| Friends, I’m facing a tough race against a man who has no business being in Congress. In an ideal world, Texas Republicans would not have elected a COVID denying conspiracy theorist like Ronny Jackson to represent me and my neighbors. Republicans gerrymandered my district to make Democrats quit before they even try to beat him. But I'm not a quitter, Texas doesn’t raise them. [Can you pitch in $5 to show that Democrats won’t back down even when Republicans play dirty?](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=ebae80a6d5&e=4712f71bea) It would mean a lot.

Yours,

clean_body: Friends,I’m facing a tough race against a man who has no business being in Congress. | | | | | | Friends, I’m facing a tough race against a man who has no business being in Congress. In an ideal world, Texas Republicans would not have elected a COVID denying conspiracy theorist like Ronny Jackson to represent me and my neighbors. Republicans gerrymandered my district to make Democrats quit before they even try to beat him. But I'm not a quitter, Texas doesn’t raise them. It would mean a lot. name: =?utf-8?Q?Scott=20Jensen?=
subject: Focused on winning and saving Minnesota
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
Let's focus on what matters | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4430c013c5c1/focused-on-winning-and-saving-minnesota?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

As other campaigns focus on me, I am focused on one thing: forming a winning coalition that can beat Tim Walz.

That coalition starts with our Republican delegates and branches out to all of Minnesota. From our urban core, to the Iron Range, to the prairies of southern Minnesota, our message is resonating in a way never before seen.

That message? Returning safety to our streets, letting Science (NOT political science) lead our decision making, prioritizing our Students over broken institutions and political indoctrination, and Securing our elections so that it's easy to vote but hard to cheat. Our campaign is focused on the [tough issues](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=61c0880100&e=33b11688c1) which will help us beat Tim Walz!
* Our campaign has set a record for small dollar donors in an off-year, even beating Walz's previous record set in 2017. The far-left didn't think this was possible and it SCARES THEM.
* We have built an online supporter team of over 70,000 Minnesotans who want to get engaged, many for the first time! I guarantee Tim Walz couldn't believe a Republican campaign could do that.
* There are over 2,000 registered volunteers for our campaign statewide! The groundswell that's happening comes from the grassroots.
* According to the most recent poll, we're in a [virtual tie](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=e9071d786b&e=33b11688c1) with Tim Walz! If we can unify the Republican movement in our state, we have a real shot at winning.
* Caucus attendance for a gubernatorial race was the highest it's been since 2010! The turnout for 2022 nearly doubled 2018. Republicans are fired up and new people are getting involved in the process.

Let's not squander this opportunity with race-to-the-bottom purity tests and partisan backbiting. Let's instead unify behind the campaign and message that can win! Tim Walz has never been more vulnerable! We hope if you participated in caucus night, that you'll also attend your BPOU/County Convention as a "Jensen Delegate!" We need you to help hold the line!

Over the coming months, we will have a number of exciting additions and announcements! We are focused on unifying Republicans and Independents, in a groundswell effort to beat Tim Walz and return sanity to the state! Join this movement that's focused on WINNING, not tearing each other down.

In Freedom,
Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
|
---
---

name: Greg Casar
subject: You, me, and AOC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Big news— we now have two separate rallies coming up with AOC!
This weekend, I will be joined by Representative Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in San Antonio AND in Austin —and we would love for you to join us if you’re free! Early voting starts on MONDAY, so we’re counting on all of our supporters in this final stretch. Can you make it?
On Saturday: Rep. AOC will join me and Jessica Cisneros at a Get Out The Vote rally in San Antonio . >> RSVP here for Saturday's rally! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio]
On Sunday: Rep. AOC will join me at a Rally for Our Future in Austin to highlight the power of Latino organizing in our community. >> RSVP here for Sunday’s rally! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-austintx]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio] https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-austintx [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-austintx] RSVP for SATURDAY in SAN ANTONIO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-sanantonio] RSVP for SUNDAY IN AUSTIN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-austintx]
Peter, with only FIVE days until early voting starts, AOC and I hope to see you this weekend! If you can’t make it, you can chip in here to power our Get Out The Vote efforts in this final stretch. Every contribution helps our team reach more voters! [https://t.co/w6zDWJoWpA]
Thank you,
-Greg
5 DAYS UNTIL EARLY VOTING [https://t.co/w6zDWJoWpA]http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | | Fellow Conservative,

**You’ve been marked as a DEMOCRAT.**

If you still support House Republicans, **[please renew your 2022 Sustaining Membership](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxf3-1xkvl-4qqlpo4/ "please renew your 2022 Sustaining Membership")** before midnight to correct the record.

---

---

**[This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxf3-1xkvn-4qqlpo6/ "This is your FINAL CHANCE to renew your 2022 Membership and help Republicans win back the House Majority!")**

Mark from our 2022 Membership Services team reached out repeatedly.

He thought you could be one of our top supporters and he did everything he could to make sure you renewed your membership. But he must have been mistaken.

You made him sad.

**Fellow Conservative, we don’t want to have to ask you again. The need for patriots like you to step up and help conservatives take back our country is clear.**

---
| | | [DO YOUR PART](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxf3-1xkvo-4qqlpo7/ "Generic Button")
---

Each day that Biden and Pelosi’s Democrats control Congress is another day our country slides further and further toward socialism. We’re fighting for our children's and grandchildren's futures, and the survival of America itself.

**[So, will you FINALLY step up today and renew your membership to help Republicans win in 2022?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxf3-1xkvp-4qqlpo8/ "So, will you FINALLY step up today and renew your membership to help Republicans win in 2022? ")**

-National Republican Membership Office

| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxf3-1xkvr-4qqlpo0/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxf3-1xkvs-4qqlpo1/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**

name: Rand Paul
subject: re: the dirty little secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense? We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zor8jv5gpgftbism4oncdugdg9at3bsebp86aoio_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli6eo70c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65ttkc3jb7d77mth32o32e3jm1cjnceomcsj0c8r60p5k6hi38thjcqo65dpm6prrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phhmipmadtnc1j3co5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgfkpatnvg4vsln1atef0o2c4riacrigs8chlf70_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli6eo70c3h2bs) | |
---
Friend, aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense?

We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wear masks on federal property. Children must wear masks in the classroom. With no scientific support for it.

That’s what I had a chance to discuss with Fox News recently.
__
[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqdbp5n1sdhngt5st3vp8a28kbihd50o32s5our0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli6eo70c3h2bs)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn86t3teh5dqd471f43dqolkj8qlphjsfmie9ikg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli6eo70c3h2bs)
Here's the dirty little secret about masks... It's got nothing to do with public heath.

**It’s ALL about submission.****_It's always been more about collectivism. It's been about growing government power over your lives._**

That's never been more clear than now, as these lawless bureaucrats continue with their mask requirements and shaming of the unmasked - despite the fact that the science has been clearly anti-mask for a long time.

**But it's time to draw the line.**

We can't continue to submit forever. We can't let our children be punished for personal health decisions. I'm taking a stand already and I've introduced legislation that will get rid of the federal mandate for masks on planes.

Enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zll10ov4f0hjqvl0ltjel3p8bja8ikddj8sinvpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli6eo70c3h2bs)

For too long we’ve heard that this madness is TEMPORARY._We’re told to give up our freedom. Just wear the mask. Just be quiet. It’s only 2 weeks._

Well, it’s been 2 years. And they’ll never give up this game unless WE make them.

**We must stand strong on the side of science, reject needless masks, reject government overreach, and defend our freedom.**

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3l5bh3gbccpmn1g9g1urpc7j5tetb845hnagr00_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli6eo70c3h2bs)

name: Conservative Alerts
subject: NH Dems in disarray!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Tensions keep rising....
Dear Friend,

The New Hampshire Democrats can’t seem to even get along these days. A former member of the Democratic caucus wrote an open letter stating [“I’m changing my affiliation to independent because of the undemocratic nature of the state’s Democratic leadership. The irony is that the ‘Democratic’ party is the least democratic institution I’ve ever been part of.”](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fnhjournal.com%2Fformer-house-dems-open-letter-adds-to-ongoing-chaos-inside-caucus%2F/1/0100017ee3dce7a4-50dd7e1a-428e-44d2-8b86-86fa195824aa-000000/-TSlMVKpjhdXIJwTFNbTS1eOKR4=257)

[The New Hampshire Democratic Party seems to be mimicking what is happening on the national level. Party leadership is not only failing folks across the country but they can’t even hold onto support from their own caucus. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Ffebruary22%3Fexitintent=true/1/0100017ee3dce7a4-50dd7e1a-428e-44d2-8b86-86fa195824aa-000000/T4FvUoSNmiWxlUuq_8d6HH7ClPg=257)

New Hampshire has a HUGE opportunity in 2022 to capitalize on the [FAILURES](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Ffebruary22%3Fexitintent=true/2/0100017ee3dce7a4-50dd7e1a-428e-44d2-8b86-86fa195824aa-000000/6F3doKjJzSUlVRHJ3ut7plyKIpU=257) of Democrats at the State Representative level all the way to the U.S. Senate.

[HOWEVER, we cannot do this without your help. The NHGOP cannot recruit, train, and support candidates without the support from our grassroots team. ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnh-gop%2Ffebruary22%3Fexitintent=true/3/0100017ee3dce7a4-50dd7e1a-428e-44d2-8b86-86fa195824aa-000000/JD4CYSrNUGgxTE5JElN9kh6Wg0s=257)

I grew up as one of eight siblings in a big, working-class family.
My parents enrolled us in as many after-school activities as possible. From Girl Scouts to competitive swimming, I learned firsthand how instrumental education and after-school programming are in setting children up for success.
It’s because of this experience that, as an adult, I worked to improve public education and create more opportunities for children to become involved in sports. I founded the After-School All-Stars program and served as President of Communities in Schools — an organization dedicated to lowering drop-out rates.
In Congress, I’ve fought for our students: I introduced the Keep Our Promise to America’s Children and Teachers (PACT) Act to fully fund Title I and special education, as well as an amendment to the Rebuild America’s Schools Act to address overcrowding in K-12 classrooms.
**I’m going to keep fighting for a stronger, more equitable public education system in Nevada — one where your zip code won’t determine the quality of your child’s school or how much their teachers are paid.**

Hi friends,

Many months ago, I stood before an enthusiastic crowd in front of my Janesville home and announced my decision to run for Congress and represent Wisconsin's 1st District.

Today, I am excited to receive the endorsement of the IBEW Local 890. They are a phenomenal organization representing our union electricians and their families. I am proud to stand alongside them as they fight for our workers.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41643936/329716438/-1782087676?refcode=em22_220210_ibewendorse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTY2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjVhY2U4Zi1hMzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=T14Dy_XomKHAcd9-xT8OXL8SGwLXXGG2JViJLzWRt10=)

clean_body: | = | | Folks, My team has been calling voters all over North Carolina to ask about their priorities for my campaign, and one thing is for sure – y’all want to see Republicans Dan Bishop and David Rouzer OUT of Congress. Unlike Bishop and Rouzer, I want to unite folks in North Carolina – not separate them with divisive rhetoric and fear mongering. = | | | = North Carolinians want affordable healthcare, they want dignified job opportunities, they want someone who understands the needs of folks in rural areas. Bishop and Rouzer, on the other hand, are more concerned with blocking any progress Democrats are trying to make in Congress and spreading Donald Trump’s Big Lie. But I promise that in Congress, YOU will be my first priority. I just need your help to get there. We’re about halfway through the first FEC fundraising quarter of the year, and right now I’m falling $3,786 behind my goal. Falling short could mean losing the race to another Trump lackey like Bishop or Rouzer – = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = – Charles | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. Hello,
**Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight calls Ann Selzer “the best pollster in politics.”** Why? She knows Iowa better than anyone, overseeing almost every one of the Des Moines Register’s Iowa polls since 1987 – and she has a track record of nearly always being right.
That’s why this is such incredible news for Democrats: **Ann Selzer just told PBS that “there is something going on” in her latest poll and that she sees “weakness” for Iowa Republican Chuck Grassley in her new numbers!**
Admiral Mike Franken is the Democrat running against Chuck Grassley to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue, and if Mike wins, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold onto (or expand!) our Senate majority this year.
But Mike needs your help. **Right now, we’re still 226 donations short of our daily goal and what we need to help Mike Franken defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Senate majority.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are already raising millions to try to defeat Mike and turn the Senate red. But Mike Franken’s not taking money from corporate PACs so if he’s going to win, he needs grassroots donors like you to chip in now:
[**No amount is too small. ---

Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

body:
Friend, Joe Biden’s abuse and disregard for our Constitution is only getting worse by the day. I’ve taken an oath to rele
[View this message in your browser](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3in6ge69k21g4dhai670gb72e7ngim8vkd5scdo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkeq32t5nmeq33cjl61qn4cdkmoq37c3nm6or9ctn6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4dpi65j39o9m6tj3asbgm1jbct5hcsp66cb5e9jjecr4clhm4stnm4q62sjks3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddk61r62pjh62pm8dtgmlin48d245p25oh4cdgm2pb4cjhm4pb24no)

Friend, Joe Biden's abuse and disregard for our Constitution is only getting worse by the day.
I've taken an oath to relentlessly defend our Constitution. In the face of attacks from the corporate press and a barrage of lies and smears, I refuse to sell out Floridians to the political power grab by dishonest lockdown Democrats.
Democrats and their corporate media allies think that I'll bend the knee to their rage mobs,**but they 're messing with the wrong guy.** I know leadership requires an unwavering spirit in the face of constant pressure.
With each passing day, Joe Biden makes more decisions that chip away at our liberty. He isn't interested in data or science, **he 's interested in power and political points.** But I'm fighting back and holding him accountable.
**[HELP ME KEEP FIGHTING BACK AGAINST BIDEN'S RECKLESS POLICIES - RUSH IN $25 NOW >>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za1eqe6g1d8v7a2kf9cr6an4fsh75fckn8hiborg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli69or2clh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs")**
For Joe Biden, it wasn't enough for him to rip Americans from their jobs and livelihoods. He told them it was their own fault they are unable to provide for their families. But I stood up to Joe Biden and fought for Florida's workers. Today, they are free to work without the looming threat of Joe Biden's authoritarian mandates.
I'm doing the same thing for medical professionals. Joe Biden wants to play political games, with the lives of Floridians. I'm done playing games with Joe Biden and I'm going to do everything in my power to help give our medical professionals every possible weapon in their arsenal to help their patients.
**[RUSH IN $25 TO HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z5l71hgbsk4b3oki8l09tjcbqq080h2vevoqlkno_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli69or2clh2bs) **
We can no longer sit on the sidelines and be silent, friend. There is too much at stake in this upcoming election.
I will never - EVER- back down when it comes to defending Floridians from the destruction of the Biden-Harris-Fauci administration. I have stood in Joe Biden's way every single time he's attempted to desecrate our Constitution, and I'm not going anywhere.
**[Can you help me continue fighting for Florida?](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zsr3cnuv6p3h04oo1ft2i83im1djnk4t5siq2lh8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli69or2clh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs")**
**[RUSH IN $25 NOW>>>](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf73eno940284glhgd90fclkpef6ndk9j13e42fg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1cli69or2clh2bs "https://secure.winred.com/rondesantis/holding-the-line-rvs")**
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

clean_body: This election could come down to just a handful of votes. | | | Peter, this election could come down to just a handful of votes. We don’t want to wake up the day after the primary and wonder if there was anything more we could have done to help Jessica win. And Henry Cuellar just ramped up his attacks on our campaign – by going after AOC for supporting Jessica: | “Democrat Rep. Henry Cuellar rips 'far-left celebrity' colleague AOC for campaigning for his RIVAL in Texas and urges her to focus on her own district as he battles FBI probe” — The Daily Mail There are just four days until early voting begins and twenty days until the primary, we need to raise as much as possible right now to expand our outreach efforts and fight back against Cuellar’s attacks on our campaign. Jessica Cisneros will be a fighter for the people of South Texas. She is the leader we need in Congress. Henry Cuellar only cares about working for special interests who bankroll his campaign through corporate PAC contributions. We need your support to fight back against the $2.3 million that Cuellar has in the bank. In a race like ours, every dollar makes a huge difference. That’s why it’s important for us to reach every goal we set. Let’s do this, Team Cisneros To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

| | This Sunday, millions of families will gather 'round the TV and watch as the Bengals and the Rams battle for a win in the Super Bowl. We'll cheer the big plays, boo the controversial calls, enjoy the halftime show, and laugh at some funny commercials along the way. _But one thing is true, no matter who you're cheering for:_ We all trust that every single player is giving their best effort, playing as hard as they can to win the game for their team and for their fans. **And we have that trust because the NFL doesn't allow players (or the refs) to bet on the game, meaning there is equal effort on both sides.** The American people should have that same trust in their elected officials, senior leaders, and judges. Unfortunately, they don’t. For too many Americans, that trust has been broken and they feel public servants are too often serving themselves. _Here's what I'm working on:_ **I believe that every Member of Congress, their staff and immediate family, the President, the Vice President, every Cabinet official, every presidential political appointee, every Supreme Court justice, and every federal judge should be prohibited from buying, selling, or owning individual stocks or serving on corporate boards while they are in office.** [Sign the Petition](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41623805/329637355/-959660837?contactdata=S1fh6l5jo9IP6kXiVX2VrS7cv+k7sJ7qvvnDmd6VtYlUXNTs+hRDW6I49pi1Ejdfw/zR06nrm4WGa6YBDoF9KegM3+lxvHeRJAde2Ju/lP6rniV+F32YsW9BUJ3Tq78sgGmm2MXiDKZ6MfRiEJf+Zg==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTcyYjM2YS03YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JFFUPSCWJ3TKIVvNvblZqVw2roWG9huEhKNsUYvUxh0=&emci=6c095b9f-478a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=2572b36a-7a8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=26261389) Many in Congress have proposed bans on Members of Congress trading stocks. _I support that._ But we must go further. Just owning shares of a company, even in a blind trust, creates a conflict of interest. Serving on a corporate board, even if it's unpaid, creates a conflict of interest. It's just that simple. **Listen up, friend!**
Congresswoman Val Demings is down 2 points in her race to defeat Marco Rubio. It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But she can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way.
So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes).
That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. **So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: **

It's one of the hottest Senate races in the country – and I have zero doubt in my mind that Val Demings can win this. But she can ONLY win if activists like YOU dig deep and support her every step of the way. So here's what I'm dropping in to tell you: Flipping Florida blue can decide our Democratic Senate majority. And CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in November – but Florida's last Senate race was decided by just 0.12 percent (that's only 10,033 votes). That's why moments like this can make or break a campaign. That's especially true when she's up against a right-wing incumbent like Marco Rubio, who is already sitting on a multimillion-dollar war chest and has the full GOP establishment behind him. So I committed to helping Val Demings raise $10,000 before her upcoming midnight deadline, and I'm counting on your contribution to get us there, friend: = From the White House to the campaign trail, I've seen it all. More than most. I've seen what it takes to win, and I've seen what happens when campaigns fail to muster enough grassroots momentum. I'm told Val Demings has one of the strongest grassroots teams in Democratic politics – and trust me, I was relieved to hear it. Because you know what we're up against, friend? Marco Rubio's campaign war chest. Mitch McConnell's super PAC that can spend near limitless sums of money. And you'd better believe Donald Trump – who has made Florida the de facto HQ for the GOP – will rally his base and spend millions to protect his crony, Rubio. That's why we need Val Demings. She's gone toe-to-toe with some of the most extreme Republicans. She impeached Donald Trump and prosecuted him in the Senate. She's a fighter for Floridians, and she has everything it takes to win. Best of all, there's momentum behind her in this race. But a fundraising shortfall will put her dangerously behind where she needs to be. So if you truly want Val Demings in the Senate, if you truly want to flip Florida blue and oust Marco Rubio, then I need you to give, because she can't cede any ground:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks for stepping up. Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. Things have changed dramatically in my race, so I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so critical right now.

**Last week, the NC Supreme Court threw out the Republicans' gerrymandered congressional maps. This is a huge win, but while new maps are drawn, we are losing precious time ahead of the May 17th primary. It's possible we'll have less than three months to campaign in our new district before ballots are cast.**

We need to lay the groundwork right now to reach those critical swing voters and counter the onslaught of attacks coming from our GOP opponents. This is going to take resources, and truth be told, fundraising has been difficult with Republicans creating so much uncertainty.

name: Jeremy Hunt
subject: THIS is what a patriot looks like
body:
[](http://links.huntforgeorgia.com/u/click?_t=af56c613b6e04613b0408d69d59cb1ec&_m=2327aa8a1dda4830a383566eb2db0d7c&_e=kzt33eiCWo3tw-K2eN603HEHSdvpnRyQ8TUKEvnKFVApULZhntQCfDy2pKsmFDF59ravTEccr0ssP-BDJ33yuoMyDiw8Ki0NAsGY4zg2E-bdfd0YiGhIOV-iSufSEF6XVyHPOvKYIo2q48nxv_8v6gQEr5mayn6jz9_nuzQ17aIJ8WYD6UGeMxQnSBE5s6oPt_yVvO2RPX_hpKCtHhaIet3pdbtl_BWD9YVH545-DC-qJ7yRjeE6uDlFeVUQuhgCROtnQ2k6TT8OOuJSSZccsoDHvJek1VG8wxc4leKnwLEsOReo82o_xFbHArn9aYDqLPpfe7n20BpBPj3DMY8J-kOraJ4Qf3QqbtAz6YfHolht0-u863IrjLcIogdFp_QoFuhgMof0pQGLiMWr82SY1g%3D%3D) Peter, When I look at Congress, I see too many members who have been serving for longer than I’ve been alive. The next generation doesn’t see men and women who look like them sitting in the House of Representatives - they see out of touch Washington elites who will _never_ understand the lives of hard-working Americans. **That’s why I’m honored to be running for Congress as a next-generation conservative who will light the way for a new era of Republican leadership.** I’m a father, an Army veteran, and a proud lifelong Georgian. When I look at my daughter, I don’t see someone who is oppressed or dependent on the government - I see a little girl full of hope and promise. _We need leaders in Washington who will keep the American Dream alive for my daughter’s generation, and I won’t stop fighting until we’ve stopped the evils of socialism from poisoning our country for good._ With you by my side, I know we can finish this fight and usher in a new generation of conservatives who put service over self, but we need to act now if we’re going to win big this November. **[Pitch in today so we can take back the House clean_body: Peter, When I look at Congress, I see too many members who have been serving for longer than I’ve been alive. The next generation doesn’t see men and women who look like them sitting in the House of Representatives - they see out of touch Washington elites who will never understand the lives of hard-working Americans. That’s why I’m honored to be running for Congress as a next-generation conservative who will light the way for a new era of Republican leadership. I’m a father, an Army veteran, and a proud lifelong Georgian. When I look at my daughter, I don’t see someone who is oppressed or dependent on the government - I see a little girl full of hope and promise. We need leaders in Washington who will keep the American Dream alive for my daughter’s generation, and I won’t stop fighting until we’ve stopped the evils of socialism from poisoning our country for good. With you by my side, I know we can finish this fight and usher in a new generation of conservatives who put service over self, but we need to act now if we’re going to win big this November. Thank you, Jeremy Hunt Paid for by Jeremy for Georgia Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Tyler Kistner
subject: Send in the Marine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_e=i4pJR1CeIJEbcLDQkfMs_1Pi32VLUsXDcIG2dM09_MTEmJa3l76ivTFYOE7ihKKnmF0viKr9WbObxtp7VJCgYZgohl8xTZA3YKNXeCENRqFBOcLGtkgBO1afWNaQtwe6UxiaW56NeajOgAPjSxJ_K3d3kpko-d_jdtLlXXz8CfDYOBfL-xyCOE4CWcMn0kAuEEK8G65QuV1daC2tv5m5nefoMWUswVO7I13OvFE9QHNB5O9-QWT2nNUmcj9FmOnYg7nsWhdjWDxVPX64f0PuRG0usmVszlEhplOVpAXgCAja1PZScnyvfXI7ORG2yPbSWvorQTnaB97kcF1lH4XwEo7X3jgs_u4gkTe6vN2FWAXa_AFiNcyt8x5Jo3OJk1NR)

---
Fellow American,

When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities.

**_When our country needed real leadership, we were failed._**

So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, I knew I had to run for Congress because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on.

If we haven’t met yet, I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_e=i4pJR1CeIJEbcLDQkfMs_1Pi32VLUsXDcIG2dM09_MTEmJa3l76ivTFYOE7ihKKnmF0viKr9WbObxtp7VJCgYZgohl8xTZA3YKNXeCENRqFBOcLGtkgBO1afWNaQtwe6UxiaW56NeajOgAPjSxJ_K3d3kpko-d_jdtLlXXz8CfCOzbI0MUHCYKmXtQ-sYFUkCOQNHr3CBljZiGC_czf5g8i9ioW0JMuAemUy6b1YskpwtkY8KmmawzK6R_iOitLFZfkzu8foeLp8l9BqdwySRa1kaSXNLFMA7wX3cXOg8YZUSqtOh10qDZAI82RTztDNSdPywQXJmxpLbrfJXXLvRzBYZXzx7I5W47gg8TQX63Wi-aenL3YVDcHW5Lhg17Zq)

But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - _their birthrights as Americans._

[** ****Send in the Marine ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_e=i4pJR1CeIJEbcLDQkfMs_1Pi32VLUsXDcIG2dM09_MTEmJa3l76ivTFYOE7ihKKnmF0viKr9WbObxtp7VJCgYZgohl8xTZA3YKNXeCENRqFBOcLGtkgBO1afWNaQtwe6UxiaW56NeajOgAPjSxJ_K3d3kpko-d_jdtLlXXz8CfAV_TohQfqlY90-NHxhgs6yl3HH4Hn9j6Wfp3E_wuWJ_qJfR3ehLU3RB1vQ6onfcIiJMItToF1sUdCc_xSmOG5x-u_VFWbU1IxJq4buK_NiL2prA3HuU_ZcB1KqOftPYNTu89SAZmHPYF6dpPBuWlgujNRSoc8oM6TKG3GmMxckjYxc7YwPIdlv5-xFhP1NXs4MA--aBKQaYc4KGb5qBSCo)

My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. _But the path we are on right now, is horrifying._

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. [**I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress.**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_e=i4pJR1CeIJEbcLDQkfMs_1Pi32VLUsXDcIG2dM09_MTEmJa3l76ivTFYOE7ihKKnmF0viKr9WbObxtp7VJCgYZgohl8xTZA3YKNXeCENRqFBOcLGtkgBO1afWNaQtwe6UxiaW56NeajOgAPjSxJ_K3d3kpko-d_jdtLlXXz8CfCujKeqaSb0zgvNYssm-SBmc8yCHlBlOTgu2XswHxW1rdwI5G3IzpgwvRG37s3XZ2tjFeXnvTD42HlEBaPiRhonTQxGvGT7eMoSigd9BTxclc6jAeRLJAEcCjjXbUzjxtCIYnKwxWi6DuOzf-htkv-LiVxPJA_ib4_VPEIEpH_FdQCvtpzN4h9iFqV369LIlbsOeCcgh3lLsWiP1iqsIH9F)

When I ran in 2020, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left.

I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. [**I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. Will you join me?**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_e=i4pJR1CeIJEbcLDQkfMs_1Pi32VLUsXDcIG2dM09_MTEmJa3l76ivTFYOE7ihKKnmF0viKr9WbObxtp7VJCgYZgohl8xTZA3YKNXeCENRqFBOcLGtkgBO1afWNaQtwe6UxiaW56NeajOgAPjSxJ_K3d3kpko-d_jdtLlXXz8CfCDQOw9jwLZ_Ds4xulEl9qyWeP0U8eRV2pd4P4pZ0dhqy3mMKo8blzEah05S7RBB6Fnkfs7fzYkNfJuq3v5Bom9Nngvz4riPM8ilLfEZ4CJ8BiyW2sgl2Ymg021BbQTXixC5Th1VHn00blsosW_I5s7MLYyVaC65tEBm8d5rZDvEFax9pLQ6AHFvlQ1ecKmPHjpWjhTG7UqFLlA5kdJbwpx)

Let’s take our country back.

In Service,
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_e=i4pJR1CeIJEbcLDQkfMs_1Pi32VLUsXDcIG2dM09_MTEmJa3l76ivTFYOE7ihKKnmF0viKr9WbObxtp7VJCgYZgohl8xTZA3YKNXeCENRqFBOcLGtkgBO1afWNaQtwe6UxiaW56NeajOgAPjSxJ_K3d3kpko-d_jdtLlXXz8CfAOPNZ5XqFZ8o-ZTKH7Gk7FHCG18FZ6C8CFqnHPKHOyz_gFh40SL5pMNWO1JNcGctATtd-lfYnL9U4OOE0qJPuu60CX-CSQOXQBmgL5heAaGTc66sDb6kSyzPMd0S115A5wURDX3JAp8ZZTLdVgNlC2Vlb_p8zMzjXeiniFV2DrKmBszRX44tdO0RM5BWfTNnRkn_j14fGmN7sJ2DWQynUh)
Tyler Kistner
Father. Husband. Marine.

[** ****Send in the Marine ➞ **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_e=i4pJR1CeIJEbcLDQkfMs_1Pi32VLUsXDcIG2dM09_MTEmJa3l76ivTFYOE7ihKKnmF0viKr9WbObxtp7VJCgYZgohl8xTZA3YKNXeCENRqFBOcLGtkgBO1afWNaQtwe6UxiaW56NeajOgAPjSxJ_K3d3kpko-d_jdtLlXXz8CfArDAyV8_MicxBfXcbX0IWekPGHDrUHo9zr_OaqX8sjT1f8HrAnkNVk6x4N7oTw3M2nJI-mQKl5mA1gPMqMcVNigPp4_4cyOP205IenxZjW8Quv-jO0CR8EqAKLDDuv3-57SgXGoeV9n5wUdcOHfHwVy-6K4brKFOzk8FCqRlAW4uwxbzHOVr0zsRQTfv9xqRrxLGMdYiPczE2DPwAjslJH)

| | PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
---

Don't want to receive any more of our emails?
We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=2e5dcd8f55674e2a965a08078a2a98d2&_t=Z0p0l6giWjm9q6UXmVMZ3jBD6doQ_SZa75U24PYeplRWFCr8AzMxQO8gP87zGyEDAthRBBJByIDTcETZGsAQqUijokLyxubkAD7hZ2jCnJnhmAfMybQTtl-_M_HiTlRieVXtUXdku444G3HVWwi2LSMj7EYkaXIqC04ojc4wiNA%3D).

| | | This is Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis.

Fellow Conservative, the pandemic has changed the world as we know it. But what will _never _change: **Our inalienable American rights.**
---
**Unfortunately:** Liberals _never_ let a crisis go to waste. State Democrats and the Biden Administration have used this crisis as a TROJAN HORSE to _trample_ our rights, and as a means to turn America into a socialist country.
---
| | | ❌Vaccine passports

❌Business shutdowns

❌Mask mandates for _children_

---
| ❌Big Tech censorship

❌Woke curriculum in our schools

❌Unemployment & inflation
---
But this Pandemic Power-Grab only targets _real Americans_. The rules don't apply to liberal elites at the Met Gala, illegal migrants flooding our border, or rioters at BLM protests.

**Fortunately: State Republicans are taking matters into our own hands.**
**[CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxqd-1xlfk-4qqlpo8/ "CHIP IN TO SAVE OUR STATES")**
While other states have closed schools, businesses and churches—trampling citizens' personal freedoms—Florida and Conservative state leaders remain the LAST line of defense, safeguarding the Constitutional rights guaranteed to all Americans.

Fellow Conservative, America can never be allowed to become a woke, leftist utopia — **[which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxqd-1xlfl-4qqlpo9/ "which is why we must act NOW to save our states before it's too late.")**

subject: Early Voting Starts Monday

body:
Let's Keep Spreading Our Message
| | | | |
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NoSiTTOx3VQlFT4dldb2HH8Hh2fPa2NE5NU2dRg98H3tDhXepU6BpkUUqDsFmJPGI4141lZm8Tnj87tN-fs8-2f1ZYCFItMBF1FzFvx0sVl1vUFD4kv5DeEhaJx6ln-qlc5tqNs-kDhZbuFazg52iSw_G1B748khAiiFeWklG5I=&c=MMCpnDRzj1XDEHQFdYw7kP_5T2XEg_asl1cwu7_EaiJrx7jPEnBiiw==&ch=f7QMjrx-6YgOAxfwVsXB6qSrUKgO-7VR4jHULy2L76laXOSoZUMneA==)
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Neighbor,
Our campaign to send a neighbor from our district - and one who truly represents our community - to D.C. has made great strides. With your help, we can keep the momentum going and ensure that WE pick our representative, not the establishment.
The primary is finally here, and I need your help getting our friends and neighbors to the polls. Early voting starts Monday, February 14th. Other key dates include:

* February 18th \- Deadline to request a mail-in ballot.
* March 1st \- Primary Election Day

---
---
You can ensure a winning day for our campaign on March 1st by taking the following actions.

* Remind your friends, loved ones, college students, etc. - anyone who might not be able to physically make it to the poll - to request their mail-in ballot prior to the Feb. 18 deadline.
* Call and email your neighbors in TX38 and share with them why you are supporting me and my campaign. If any would like to speak with me personally, I'd be happy to do so.
* Request a yard sign via my [website form](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NoSiTTOx3VQlFT4dldb2HH8Hh2fPa2NE5NU2dRg98H3tDhXepU6BpmtAuf2mamJC2A0Wqsv-m78XMxWktmC7yVDMxoF9m2Er1OqGd28nYiPIFVTVjJNhNGXxiCTARBExOWbFXuPwJL3hDZ-Q3nK2-cOLAT1bvFEgZ5RmouU1KJEueUAj_zQw2A==&c=MMCpnDRzj1XDEHQFdYw7kP_5T2XEg_asl1cwu7_EaiJrx7jPEnBiiw==&ch=f7QMjrx-6YgOAxfwVsXB6qSrUKgO-7VR4jHULy2L76laXOSoZUMneA==) and chat with your neighbors as to why this campaign's message is resonating with you.
* Continue in your block walking efforts to spread the word about my campaign.

I truly appreciate all of your support and the enthusiasm that you have shown for my campaign. Because of you, our message has and will continue to reach the members of our community.
All My Thanks,
---
---

body:
| | **This is insane ...** |
#### [View this email online](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59518443:JkVrTzENS:m:1:3298722022:0EE578FC1021CBDB9BCE990174B643D0:r)

| | |
---
| |
## **What do free crack pipes for addicts and children wearing masks have in common?**

_Joe Biden is DEMANDING that both be required. _
###
We can't believe we are sending you this news... this might be Biden's most outlandish plan ever.

While Joe Biden is masking our kids, shutting down our small businesses, and ignoring the inflation that is crippling our economy, he plans to spend **$30 MILLION** on a program to give crack pipes to addicts for FREE.

name: Katy Williams (CFO)
subject: RE: Did we do something wrong?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I just ran the numbers and we are extremely short of our January Membership goal
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?3gxvx--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Want to FIRE Pelosi? **Text FIRE to 21818** to help House Republicans take back the House for the American People.
---
| | |
* * *
Hi there,

I hate to be the one to tell you this, but this is bad. **Really bad. **

**I just ran the numbers and we are _extremely_ short of our 2022 Membership goal.** I saw that Brian Mast reached out to you about the deadline and you have yet to respond.

I thought I would shoot my shot and let you know that**[I have extended the deadline for you to renew your membership to February 15th. You must act fast though because this deadline is quickly approaching >>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlol-4qqlpo3/ "I have extended the deadline for you to renew your membership till January 15th. You must act fast though because this deadline is quickly approaching >>> ")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlom-4qqlpo4/)
---
| | | [RENEW MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlon-4qqlpo5/ "RENEW NOW")
---

Your membership supports Conservatives in winning back the House in 2022 and FIRING NANCY PELOSI one and for all. That's why we need you to step up.

I need you to help us reach our goal. **[Will you step up and renew your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xloo-4qqlpo6/ "Will you step up and renew your membership before 11:59 PM, February 15th? ")**

---
| | | [RENEW MEMBERSHIP](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlop-4qqlpo7/ "RENEW NOW")
---
Thank you,

Katy (NRCC CFO)

\--------- Forwarded Message ---------
From: **SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)**
Subject: Did we do something wrong?

Patriot, it’s Brian Mast.

Newt Gingrich emailed you.

Nicole Malliotakis emailed you.

Elise Stefanik emailed you.

Kevin McCarthy emailed you.

Donald Trump Jr. emailed you.

_**Now I’m emailing you.**_

There’s only a few days left in January and House Republicans need to finalize our membership lists for 2022. **Failure to renew by 11:59pm on January 31st will result in your membership being terminated permanently. **

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xloq-4qqlpo8/ "RENEW NOW")
---

So I wanted to reach out one final time before our deadline and urge you to keep your membership current for 2022.

**[Renew my membership now>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlor-4qqlpo9/ "Renew my membership now >>>")**

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlos-4qqlpo0/)
---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlot-4qqlpo1/ "RENEW NOW")
---

**Here’s why renewing your membership for 2022 is so important:**
1. You will be providing conservative candidates across the country the resources they need to go on offense and bring the fight to Democrats.
2. You will be showing your support for our plans to hold Joe Biden and Democrats accountable for their corruption and failures.
3. You will be a critical piece of our House Republican team as we work to take back the House and fire Nancy Pelosi for good.

November’s election will be the most important election of my lifetime. With America in chaos under Joe Biden’s failed leadership, it’s up to Republicans in Congress to put America first and fight for the solutions to the problems that affect everyday Americans like you and me.

It’s simple: _We need patriots like you to step up and help us save America._ **[Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW>>>](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlou-4qqlpo2/ "Your support today will ensure that we have the resources needed to wage this fight and to take back the House, so please make sure you renew your 2022 Membership NOW >>>")**

---
| | | [RENEW NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlov-4qqlpo3/ "RENEW NOW")
---
| | | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlow-4qqlpo4/)
---

Brian Mast is a U.S. Army Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Army.
---
| | | Thank you in advance and God bless,
---
| | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlox-4qqlpo5/)
---
SSG Brian Mast, U.S. Army (ret.)
---

| |
* * *

[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xloy-4qqlpo6/ "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xloz-4qqlpo7/ "Can we count on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlp0-4qqlpo4/ "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---
| [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-3gxvx-1xlp1-4qqlpo5/)
---

320 First St SE
Washington, DC 20003

| | Team, Our movement runs on grassroots donors like you. When other candidates entered the race and counted on wealthy donors and high-dollar fundraisers, you stepped up and donated $5, $25, $50 — whatever you could — to build our campaign. [_**Can you help keep the momentum going by becoming a monthly sustainer? Making a monthly recurring donation will have a huge impact on our monthly fundraising goals.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41645777/329723263/-1389744695?refcode=02_07_22_recurring_en&ms=02_07_22_recurring_en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTIwMTQ0OS1hODhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C70auTQHBxlo5G0QtPwsnTO-NPSczRYgiFmUd8kGcQE=) What does that financial support translate to? It looks like our highest ever fundraising month. It looks like hiring staff to organize across Massachusetts. It looks like buying the campaign tech we need to reach voters. It looks like trips for Sonia to meet folks where they’re at in their own communities. [_**We can make all these things possible if 17 people sign up to make a monthly recurring donation. Click here to set your recurring donation.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41645778/329723264/-1389744695?refcode=02_07_22_recurring_en&ms=02_07_22_recurring_en&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTIwMTQ0OS1hODhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C70auTQHBxlo5G0QtPwsnTO-NPSczRYgiFmUd8kGcQE=) We can win this, but we need you with us. In this together, Emily

name: Adam Kinzinger
subject: it's easy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Country First
body:
| [ ](http://www.country1st.com/?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sacred_sandlot_nd&n=1)
---
Friend -- It's easy to take for granted this grand experiment we call the United States; how blessed we are to call her home. It's easy to get lost in the toxicity; to lose sight of the centering principles that make us uniquely American. Our political parties and media sure don't help, either. They remind us how we're different, who's to blame, and why the sky is falling -- with no one to blame but the "other side." What really should scare us most is that our kids are watching. While we may see this as a dark chapter, our youth are growing up believing this is normal: That the ends justify the means; that the winner must take all; that the only way to win is at all costs; and that violence is "legitimate political discourse." Instead, we could learn something from them: [](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sacred_sandlot_nd&n=2) | [](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sacred_sandlot_nd&n=3 "Watch the NEW Video: ") [Watch the NEW Video: "Our Sacred Sandlot"](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sacred_sandlot_nd&n=4)
---
Our movement is experiencing incredible momentum and growth right now, and it's because so many Americans are waking up to the reality that we can't keep going this way and end up anywhere good. Our parties are playing a dangerously divisive game -- one in which each promises they'll win, yet we all end up losing.
It's time to change the game; to stand for truth; to save our sacred "sandlot." That's exactly what we're all about, and I'm proud to have you with me.
Country First,
Adam
_PS: Please help me spread this message far and wide, and encourage your likeminded friends and family to learn more about the amazing work we're doing together. Here's the link to the video:[ https://www.country1st.com/sandlot](https://www.country1st.com/sandlot?e=4ee51f15644d695f1e1564c20f506a7d&utm_source=country1st&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sacred_sandlot_nd&n=5)_
Paid for by Country First
---

name: Team Kilmer
subject: [SIGN ON] Save the USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

Americans rely on the United States Postal Service for essential goods, life-saving medications, paying their bills, receiving Social Security, and even exercising their right to vote. But ever since former President Trump appointed Postmaster Louis DeJoy, he's worked to sabotage the USPS at every turn.

DeJoy is still trying to undermine President Biden's agenda and the USPS by implementing policies that slow down delivery times and raise costs -- including in Washington. His actions have interfered with President Biden's plan to send out free at-home COVID-19 tests. Now, Postmaster DeJoy has even moved to replace our aging fleet of USPS vehicles with gas-powered vehicles instead of electric ones against the guidance of the EPA and the White House.

Millions of Americans rely on the USPS, and we have to take action to protect workers and our environment. Derek helped pass the bipartisan Postal Service Reform Act through the House this week to support the USPS. He's working to ensure the postal service has the financial footing to keep providing essential services for years to come. [**Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of the Postal Service Reform Act >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ox6JwHeZqUxtJv6CfW6TnOYjD_FjrNMonmbFsFx2-VY=/fiNKdRFe0jrkE_LiXcjNa0OvoRb_XYVmahJDcDM1Sow=?ms=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

The USPS is essential to our country's infrastructure, and people can't afford delays in the delivery of their medications, bills, and ballots, especially during a pandemic. We have a responsibility to preserve the USPS for our seniors, veterans, rural communities, and our democracy.

Derek is committed to investing in the USPS and defending this essential service. The Postal Service Reform Act will take necessary steps to save USPS, including boosting investment in frontline workers and the agency and holding the USPS accountable for delivering mail on time.

[**We need to take action to protect the USPS. Sign on if you 're with Derek in the fight to save the USPS and add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Postal Service Reform Act >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ox6JwHeZqUxtJv6CfW6TnOYjD_FjrNMonmbFsFx2-VY=/fiNKdRFe0jrkE_LiXcjNa0OvoRb_XYVmahJDcDM1Sow=?ms=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata={{ContactData}}
)

Thank you,

Team Kilmer

**Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/ox6JwHeZqUxtJv6CfW6TnOYjD_FjrNMonmbFsFx2-VY=/7Kt-584WljdZpPW5lW5SESdnhb5pa0szRSsh0cE6oLk=?refcode=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220208_USPS_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/ox6JwHeZqUxtJv6CfW6TnOYjD_FjrNMonmbFsFx2-VY=/9yfDwof-aqtjZdtYA1LX90GYhgA3r-OX4ybu-bACV0w=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/ox6JwHeZqUxtJv6CfW6TnOYjD_FjrNMonmbFsFx2-VY=/mtCC2wst_P5RLsHoCEunZSk0b3E7yy_O8iD2F3AtiLg=)

subject: “Always finish what you started.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41627004/329649121/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220210finish_YC_allop_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWZiMGUwMi04MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h87NNEflAR1LvnbdUpBauD27N9uPAL5OtiqR-sKAkKw=)
---
Hey, Peter — One of the most important lessons my parents passed onto me was this: **Always finish what you started.** And with your help, I intend to do exactly that in this campaign for Colorado’s new 8th District. [**Can you pitch in $10 today to keep our momentum going?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41627014/329649133/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220210finish_YC_allop_xx_l1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWZiMGUwMi04MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h87NNEflAR1LvnbdUpBauD27N9uPAL5OtiqR-sKAkKw=) | [Donate $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41627021/329649141/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220210finish_YC_allop_xx_btn&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWZiMGUwMi04MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h87NNEflAR1LvnbdUpBauD27N9uPAL5OtiqR-sKAkKw=)
---
Washington has a lot of work to do on behalf of working families everywhere. Here’s just the beginning of the list of priorities I’ll take with me to Congress:
1. **Lower prescription drug and other critical medical costs:** To use one far too common example, none of the 34 million Americans with diabetes should ever have to decide between buying life-saving insulin or putting food on the table for their kids.
2. **Protect and expand voting access:** I’m proud to have passed multilingual ballot access in the Colorado legislature, and I am deeply committed to defending the integrity of our elections and making our voting system easy and accessible to all.
3. **Expand quality healthcare access:** We must make reforms to our healthcare system so that everyone can access the care they need without fear of crushing medical debt.
4. **Combat climate change:** Every day that we fail to act is another day that our health, our children’s health, and the health of our planet takes another step towards irreversible catastrophe. We have to act now.
5. **Protect every person’s right to choose:** _Roe v. Wade_ should have been codified into law years ago. We must do so immediately before it’s too late.

Working families in Colorado’s 8th District are counting on us to deliver for them, and I intend to the finish the job — but I need your help.
[**Will you chip in whatever you’re able to help us finish what we started and send a voice for Coloradans to Washington in November?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41627027/329649150/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220210finish_YC_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWZiMGUwMi04MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h87NNEflAR1LvnbdUpBauD27N9uPAL5OtiqR-sKAkKw=) [_****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41627030/329649153/355891186?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220210finish_YC_allop_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWZiMGUwMi04MDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h87NNEflAR1LvnbdUpBauD27N9uPAL5OtiqR-sKAkKw=)

clean_body: | = Hey, Peter — One of the most important lessons my parents passed onto me was this: Always finish what you started. And with your help, I intend to do exactly that in this campaign for Colorado’s new 8th District. = | = Washington has a lot of work to do on behalf of working families everywhere. Here’s just the beginning of the list of priorities I’ll take with me to Congress: 1. Lower prescription drug and other critical medical costs: To use one far too common example, none of the 34 million Americans with diabetes should ever have to decide between buying life-saving insulin or putting food on the table for their kids. 2. Protect and expand voting access: I’m proud to have passed multilingual ballot access in the Colorado legislature, and I am deeply committed to defending the integrity of our elections and making our voting system easy and accessible to all. 3. Expand quality healthcare access: We must make reforms to our healthcare system so that everyone can access the care they need without fear of crushing medical debt. 4. Combat climate change: Every day that we fail to act is another day that our health, our children’s health, and the health of our planet takes another step towards irreversible catastrophe. We have to act now. 5. Protect every person’s right to choose: Roe v. Wade should have been codified into law years ago. We must do so immediately before it’s too late. Working families in Colorado’s 8th District are counting on us to deliver for them, and I intend to the finish the job — but I need your help. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks so much. — Dr. Yadira Caraveo | Yadira Caraveo is a pediatrician, state representative, and daughter of immigrants. name: Deb McGrath (personal)
subject: This race will be won or lost on the margins
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Peter,

Thank you for opening and reading this email. **I am reaching out because I just checked our February fundraising numbers, and we are starting to fall behind.**

The race for WI-03 will be one of the closest in the midterm elections. In 2020, Congressman Kind defeated Republican Derrick Van Orden by less than three percentage points. And with redistricting this year, we must be prepared for an even closer race. **That is why we cannot afford to slow our momentum for a single moment.**

In addition to being competitive, we know this race will be expensive. Derrick Van Orden, who is running again this year, has nearly $1.5 million in the bank. National Republicans, including Donald Trump and House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy, are also paying close attention. They think this is a seat they can flip. **Hitting each and every monthly fundraising goal is critical if we want to keep up.**

I am honored and humbled by the support this team has shown me since I launched my campaign. I know we are building a grassroots campaign capable of taking on Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and Derrick Van Orden.

That is why I knew I needed to reach out when I noticed our fundraising slowing down. Please, will you help our campaign get back on track for the month? If we can collectively raise $2,000 today, I know we will have what it takes to close our monthly budget gap: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dmg_em_2022q1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41646035/329724856/-1336913912?amount=25&refcode=ea.86bf4bd5-aa8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.86bf4bd5-aa8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzk0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmJmNGJkNS1hYThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=585UoxaXo1CzBomxlYKDMt_WaGRZdXSoEKYXDq5N5F8=)**

Thank you,

Deb | | | PAID FOR BY DEB MCGRATH FOR CONGRESS

body:
and where it shouldn’t be going

|

Peter — Todd Rokita packed his bags and decided to take his family on a political vacation to the southern U.S. border on the taxpayer dime. **Rokita’s trip is yet another reminder to Hoosiers that the Indiana Republican Party will always put their selfish partisanship ahead of a better future for the state.** Instead of focusing on working to solve the kitchen-table issues every day Hoosier families are facing within the borders of Indiana, Todd Rokita is focused on using his wannabe gubernatorial campaign to perpetuate GOP culture wars. Trump is singing his praises and meanwhile, Hoosiers are left to foot the bill for his trip to Texas to receive the former president’s recognition. **Our taxes should not be responsible for paying for Todd Rokita’s campaign trip he’s trying to pass off as a family vacation.** **We’re calling on Rokita to disclose how much Hoosiers actually paid for his Texas getaway and for him to fully reimburse the state immediately. name: Giffords.org
subject: January 8, 2013
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It was two years to the date of Gabby’s shooting, and weeks after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
#

**January 8, 2013**
It was exactly two years to the day after Gabby’s shooting, and weeks after the tragedy at Sandy Hook Elementary School.
It was the day Gabby officially launched her campaign to pass commonsense solutions to make our communities safer from gun violence.
**465**
That is the number of laws we’ve helped pass in states all across the country since we got started.
These are bills that have kept guns out of the hands of domestic abusers, expanded background checks, and more.
Most importantly, that work has saved lives.
**867,131**
That’s how many online donations we’ve received to help support Gabby’s work to change our gun laws.
Never in a million years would Gabby have believed her desire for action would grow into a national movement for change—but it has. And it’s been extraordinary to see.
But we still have more work to do. A lot more work. In 2020, gun violence claimed the lives of more than 45,000 people—and there are even more loved ones left behind, lives forever changed.
That means we need you today, for the first time, to make a donation to support that work. Because Gabby cannot do it alone.
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to support our work? We would not ask if it were not so terribly important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-feb22?refcode=em220210-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1548_3935704_kC8RuT&akid=1548%2E3935704%2EkC8RuT)

# Biden flip flops on defunding the police
---
| After many American lives have been deeply impacted, Joe Biden wants to pretend he's tough on crime. But everything he's done (or failed to do) indicates he and the Democrats in Washington are anything but that.
Biden has announced he will push for a one-half billion-dollar anti-crime package which will direct $300 million to law enforcement. Finally, he admits that defunding the police is not the answer. Shocking, right? But how many lives had to be irrevocably altered before Democrats did an about-face?
Yet, look at what kind of people surround Biden in his inept administration. Two high-ranking officials in the Department of Justice last year openly supported defunding the police. And the former Mayor of Boston, Marty Walsh, who now serves as Labor Secretary, cut $12 million from his city's police budget. Another of Biden's Cabinet members, Housing and Urban Development chief Marcia Fudge, has also advocated for defunding the police.
The other $200 million that Biden is calling for is to go towards gun violence prevention programs. While that sounds good, the devil is in the details--our Second Amendment rights are non-negotiable.
Congress must evaluate every measure slyly crafted into this "anti-gun violence package" to ensure American's Constitutional rights are not violated. Join our cause by helping me go to Washington to protect your rights under the Constitution. There are solutions to the skyrocketing crime rates we are seeing, but those answers are only acceptable when they do not infringe upon our freedoms. Please contribute today.

To restore America to its greatness— Thank you, John James Get to know John: -At age 17, he became determined to serve his country -He graduated from West Point, then served as a pilot in Operation Iraqi Freedom, leading two Apache platoons -After 8 years of service, he returned home to Michigan to work in the family business -He runs a family business, James Group International, an automotive supply chain and logistics company. -Now, John lives with his wife Elizabeth and their three young sons in Michigan Let’s fly together – get involved. | | | Paid for by John James for Congress, Inc. | | P.O. Box 26352 Alexandria, Virginia 22313 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

I fought tirelessly to save main street businessesー _**always knowing Pennsylvania's best days were ahead.**_ If you weren’t here for Pennsylvania at its worst, you don’t deserve it at its best.**** That’s why you should live in Pennsylvania before running in Pennsylvania. | | Dear Patriot:

Here in Arkansas, we support our Second Amendment.

The Regime doesn't give us our freedoms.

_God does._

But our God-given right to Self-Defense is under attack like never before from the Left.

**They want to take our guns. They say it every day.

_RINOs like my opponent, Deep State Steve Womack, are helping them do it by supporting Red Flag gun confiscation._**

They're defunding the police.

They're letting drug dealers, rapists, and murderers go free. George Soros-funded District Attorneys across our country are refusing to enforce the law.

Crime is out of control, and murders are skyrocketing.

**Meanwhile, they want to make sure that normal, decent, patriotic citizens like you and I can't defend ourselves.**

They want to make sure that all we have is a criminal underclass and a totalitarian overclass.

_There has never been more reason to own a gun. You owe it to yourself and, more importantly, to your family._

Be ready to defend them against the predators that the Left is unleashing against all of us.

**I'm giving away a Radical Firearms 16" SOCOM 5.56 AR-15 Rifle.**

[](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=4d2b61d77d&e=eda539b26b)

Initially, this was a Christmas giveaway. But, after the Republican National Committee banned me from WinRed, I decided to extend it for Valentine's Day--_because there is no better expression of love than to be ready to defend your loved ones._

[_**Enter today for your chance to win!**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=2d8a9664a2&e=eda539b26b)

We'll be choosing the winner at random just before Valentine's Day, and you could end up with a brand new AR-15 at your door.

[_**Though contributing is not required in order to win, I'm hoping you'll also chip into my America First campaign**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=8664a88a95&e=eda539b26b)[.](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=98e06f37e5&e=eda539b26b)

[_**I need your help to defeat a weak RINO and protect our God-given rights in Washington, so enter my gun giveaway today, and please contribute what you can**_](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=aa70623fbb&e=eda539b26b)[. ](https://NeilforArkansas.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b07b27c744909d0ecfce3d46&id=0cb73cface&e=eda539b26b)

For America,
Neil Robinson Kumar
_Republican for U.S. Congress, AR-03_
