name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Fauci-ism in Retreat
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZcIbW7sRk4jcuK09swkvBS6BTrz0NkPFFRwwUtJkxTr81BMZQ-dJ8oUCqvv_HyStPZ78WYogxN9tdTPy0qS0PExR6ed9fopsKIQuBC1A2NTU3sQ3J1s0b-pZPkwMvrEM7EXZ3QYXAl0PGvCuMc7e-gFn3eDMK5wNFgNHEv8_-FHBedEU6BN7Zzqm0A33eBE-&c=9Qph6g8YKjcoVDiPcG157tDfRAX7YsR5sIDVTYRkhbXNdm_6KLV30A==&ch=ZiLfLqJvZlbLIoBUb5S2lml0jg5zaPUhfv2R-SR3oAPnSXW1BaFBpw==)
---
| Peter,
Democrats across the country are finally realizing what we knew in Florida almost two years ago - mask mandates and lockdowns don't work. The corrupt media incessantly smeared me for not imposing oppressive mandates on Floridians. Yet, Democrats are falling over themselves to follow my lead now, and they're trying to rewrite history as though they didn't just spend the past two years acting as power-hungry authoritarians. And let me tell ya, the medical science didn't change, the political science did. Democrats failed the American people, and we know it. As they stare down the upcoming election and their freefalling poll numbers, their only hope was to concede I was right by lifting their mandates. Every child deserves to grow up with a sense of normalcy rather than living in a biomedical Faucian dystopia as a political pawn for Democrats, yet, even as some blue state lockdown politicians have finally surrendered, Joe Biden still clings to forced masking of children as young as two years old. But don't be fooled: COVID was merely the most public exposure of Democrats' policy failures. Their list of being on the wrong side of history spreads far and wide. From open borders to rampant inflation, Democratic policies are failing the American people at every level. It only took two years for Democrats and the media to admit that freedom is superior to Fauci-ism. I will continue leading in Florida, but make no mistake: if they survive the 2022 elections, lockdown Democrats will absolutely revert to form and re-impose mandates and restrictions. So, Peter, can I count on you to help me continue to prove the hysterical corporate media and their political pawns wrong? clean_body: | | | | == | Peter, Democrats across the country are finally realizing what we knew in Florida almost two years ago - mask mandates and lockdowns don't work. The corrupt media incessantly smeared me for not imposing oppressive mandates on Floridians. Yet, Democrats are falling over themselves to follow my lead now, and they're trying to rewrite history as though they didn't just spend the past two years acting as power-hungry authoritarians. And let me tell ya, the medical science didn't change, the political science did. Democrats failed the American people, and we know it. As they stare down the upcoming election and their freefalling poll numbers, their only hope was to concede I was right by lifting their mandates. Every child deserves to grow up with a sense of normalcy rather than living in a biomedical Faucian dystopia as a political pawn for Democrats, yet, even as some blue state lockdown politicians have finally surrendered, Joe Biden still clings to forced masking of children as young as two years old. But don't be fooled: COVID was merely the most public exposure of Democrats' policy failures. Their list of being on the wrong side of history spreads far and wide. From open borders to rampant inflation, Democratic policies are failing the American people at every level. It only took two years for Democrats and the media to admit that freedom is superior to Fauci-ism. I will continue leading in Florida, but make no mistake: if they survive the 2022 elections, lockdown Democrats will absolutely revert to form and re-impose mandates and restrictions. So, Peter, can I count on you to help me continue to prove the hysterical corporate media and their political pawns wrong? == Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely, | | Ron DeSantis | | == | == == == | Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor | | | | | | | Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Friend,

It’s not the easiest thing to admit, but I’m getting beat like a rented mule in fundraising by my new Radical Opponent. It’s not a good sign for me, you, or any other conservative in Louisiana as we start 2022.

I’ll be blunt: If I don’t catch up to him and catch up quick, he’s going to blow me out of the water come November and threaten to turn Louisiana and the U.S. Senate into a Socialist safe haven. I won’t have it, and I hope you won’t either, but I’m coming to you in all sincerity when I say I can’t do this by myself.

I’ve got to have your help if I’m going to have a chance. I’ve got to have your help if we’re going to save America. It’s not up for debate. Your support is the answer. Your support is the only thing standing in the way of Nancy Pelosi’s handpicked dream candidate wiping the floor with me this coming November. I’m humbly asking for your help. **Without it, they’ll keep burying me with their unlimited dollars.

I’M ASKING FOR YOUR HELP.

WITHOUT IT I CAN’T STOP THE LEFT. **

**Paxton's Patriots Daily Update February 10, 2022**

**Paxton's Patriots Suggested Social Media Post With Clip to Share: **

**Post:** Ken Paxton is investigating GoFundMe after their shutdown of the Canadian trucker fundraiser. Texas consumers deserve to know where their hard-earned money is going without GoFundMe diverting money to another cause without their consent. He'll get to the bottom of this deceitful action.

**Link: **[https://www.foxbusiness.com/politics/texas-missouri-gofundme-freedom-convoy](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=4bd3e90404ca4cb2a5eb60b906ae8d62&_e=L2OsvIQCfpsWdlg051ptXIAnbhUQ6_AP2_v68x4fS2XcNDUGB-oxqYucdMhanlJ1t93JYKtppNsTSxR5nnUcQn1nC2e5DOSxJAQggA7au30bmostK1Pgp5nWgsVOCHjKT4GYh-sdyEl-LfMwZB7UcIOzIDszN7xTbvsfQpvf3L2oynkVw_X7yhlYdAUoWpDLOjdD8TyS7Kh4LgXTVXXZGTG9W8OnUZRQ_Exk3OV5-Aiu51tZQowihJNfZX9hwI0mOgpWZqT0YkYMAefYGdCGrBSNgijHd0xFr4m10tPeQsrOLKXWSFt1B8IRWgDzVNr72Gu4c4l_uos6GLrptHYHbQ%3D%3D)

**Theme of the Day: Deportations Are Way Down **

As the Biden administration pushes their lawless agenda that has resulted in dire consequences for Texas, Ken Paxton is committed to holding the admin accountable, defending the Lone Star State from burdensome mandates, and championing the conservative values Texans hold dear. Here’s a recap of Ken Paxton’s efforts to defend Texas values and what’s driving the news you need to know: ~ Preliminary reports from ICE show that there were only 55,590 removals and deportations in FY 2021 despite the millions of illegals who crossed our border. Deportations are down significantly from the 185,884 that were carried out in FY 2020 and the 267,258 removals in FY 2019. This is unacceptable. Joe Biden is refusing to follow our laws and allowing dangerous criminals to remain in our country. Ken Paxton will continue to hold him accountable for his lawlessness.

~ Joe Biden is trying to mandate COVID vaccines for Texas Servicemen and women, but he doesn't give orders to the Texas National Guard or the Texas Air National Guard – the Governor of Texas does. Biden's vaccine mandates will weaken our defenses at the border. That's why Ken Paxton filed a preliminary injunction seeking to halt Joe Biden's unlawful and un-American vaccine mandate improperly imposed on Texas's National Guards.

~ In case you missed it, yesterday Ken Paxton received a major endorsement from the National Rifle Association and was given the highest attainable “A+” rating. As they said, "Ken Paxton has demonstrated an unwavering commitment to safeguarding the constitutional rights of all law-abiding Texans through his active role in Second Amendment litigation _. _He's constantly battling on the frontlines and in trenches of the battle to protect Texans' Second Amendment rights. We encourage all Texas NRA members, supporters, gun owners, and sportsmen to vote Ken Paxton for Attorney General in the March 1 primary election."

We encourage you to [share these messages](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=4bd3e90404ca4cb2a5eb60b906ae8d62&_e=L2OsvIQCfpsWdlg051ptXNNWl47raQ8MYuUkQMMgFegYkJrU_nx3nbiONgfhdvuWyN_DDGC2FZon6YpSjwm0uI5Rktapahh9Ppn6q07_JYPzF4jPuWelBOBVjLVD3EWiWbaoagFZLofKzQG1cEJVdglMjsJP-gi2S7ti2uUqfoekrlv1uWvRDoZH-2Pl_yHlB63gA6sM-aIAguO6xtzU3sW_xu0dsJy6w6NpDCTtAZbIvbvX4szGxDVkfE25XrKQQn6u4Zw2bI17evvKRyDVjw%3D%3D) with your friends and followers on social media. Attorney General Paxton wakes up every day to fight for Texas and our core values, and sharing his efforts with your network will help ensure he can continue his fight on your behalf. Please encourage your friends and fellow patriots to [join our efforts](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=4bd3e90404ca4cb2a5eb60b906ae8d62&_e=L2OsvIQCfpsWdlg051ptXNNWl47raQ8MYuUkQMMgFegYkJrU_nx3nbiONgfhdvuWByMOpBhVc9iiGOWVKsAj-LScOd0SbrDYzw2x981i19anDtIhZ3-J7-bDQ284xjmQ5feV2C9618r59Tb27pB7NVW9DnbjQVT9sqwbLozkr_ffLNV-LYuLUiRp3jHpPN6FemZ5x24njA39cOWvC96y5jLMp4dp5vuoErOcfb07Qv5LutPZU3rgaguWIDJrAuEkmb8Je6Xh6ZPl49Kp3BYRyg%3D%3D) and Paxton’s Patriots to receive these daily updates [by clicking here.](http://links.kenpaxtontx.com/u/click?_t=943205272de64e8b898beb2ebfd45b1b&_m=4bd3e90404ca4cb2a5eb60b906ae8d62&_e=L2OsvIQCfpsWdlg051ptXNNWl47raQ8MYuUkQMMgFegYkJrU_nx3nbiONgfhdvuW5OKABQVZetg1kh5_XoNhjnNFw4ey_hVAOrUSa10WYHKRGmwJ22FPvzqoTJffOEz6GA5ZzJII6o2-mjDaUsfJyy8_8fLeQhXHj4AIyrdZyeyqojOSmtr08SWp3smAGatqOndjrV6Ub6aEm_CT4JiiX23dM9Fj7C6SYm7r9WxlHE74HSz-jAtw9ZJbZqd_ZojpRu9vyX4WfkUv2kMS1ylomw%3D%3D)

clean_body: | | | | This Changes Everything www.votelindstrom.com Friends, I am beyond excited to introduce you to Dave Rippe! Dave is an innovative leader, a dedicated public servant, a husband, a father, and a great Nebraskan! Today, I announce that Dave Rippe is my choice for Lieutenant Governor and together we will bring a New Generation of Conservative Leadership to Nebraska. Dave is a lifelong Nebraskan. He grew up in Malcolm, attended Nebraska Wesleyan University and the University of Nebraska (Go Big Red!), has started businesses here, supported Nebraska businesses as a public servant, grown his family here with his wife Kristi, and is now stepping up to lead our state. As the former head of the Nebraska Department of Economic Development he helped people, businesses, and communities to thrive. We need Dave Rippe! Dave knows Nebraska. Dave knows Nebraska families. Dave knows Nebraska businesses. Dave knows all about our broken tax and regulatory system and will work with me to fix it! I cannot wait for you to get to know Dave like I have and I know you will LOVE him. He is exactly what Nebraska needs right now. It's time to bring a New Generation of Conservative Leadership for our state! Always fighting for you, Brett | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

name: Mark Burns For Congress
subject: Fighting For American Revival
body:
| | | [](https://sender14.zohoinsights.com/ck/2d6f.327230a/3f418c50-8aca-11ec-af84-5254000e3179/11390bf416b49df260ec64399d4318c4f1d9444e/1?e=ZvM32Qs3Wrwhyzoww6Ro7A%3D%3D "http://markburns.org")

---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Patriot Peter, I’m Pastor Mark Burns. CNN hates me, and TIME Magazine calls me [“Trump’s Top Pastor.](https://sender14.zohoinsights.com/ck/2d6f.327230a/3f418c50-8aca-11ec-af84-5254000e3179/dafce05d6387c6be50c4bb9b8f176f43de34dfc9/2?e=RXVk79I5woot9TJ55R7GitW2G7KAvwKzCbN4jINp%2FKA%3D "https://time.com/trump-pastor/")” You might remember me from the [2016 RNC Convention in Cleveland, Ohio](https://sender14.zohoinsights.com/ck/2d6f.327230a/3f418c50-8aca-11ec-af84-5254000e3179/cb8372482fc2dd26f3a0dc105df27ad53589db08/2?e=qWyQGN9CJ3wvMQuJGhZzld%2Bc%2FGTYqWD2SZdDI81nofavimeFEEeqdJRCyZi530%2Fz), where I spoke to the fired up crowd cheering the coming Trump victory in November of 2016. As Trump’s most vocal pastor during the run up to his historic win and since, I was honored to speak for President Donald Trump on a handful of occasions.
---
| I hope every South Carolinian who can hear my voice today will join this campaign and help send me to Congress so that I can fight to **_restore law and order_** , **_secure our nation’s borders_** , **_protect our God given rights and liberties_** , **_preserve our Constitution_** , and **_continue to advocate for you and the America First Agenda!_**

---
|
# I BELIEVE:
* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost. Without open, honest, transparent elections, no other issue matters.

* If we don't fix these elections NOW, America will be lost

* Tyrannical Tech Oligarchs have taken over our constitutional republic, and they must be stopped.

* Life begins at conception.

* Marriage is defined as between one man and one woman.

* Our right to bear arms is INHERENT, given to us by God almighty -- NOT by any man.

* A big, beautiful wall should protect our Border.

* Our troops should protect America -- NOT foreign nations.

* The First Amendment is absolute: religious & political freedom are basic civil right, as it is the right to hold an opinion.

* Well funded police and the protection of the Rule of Law are imperative to civil society.

* Critical Race Theory is Communist, anti-white Racism.

* Vaccine and mask mandates are medical tyranny, and have no place in America.

* The Pelosi budget opens the door wide open to full-blown communism.

---
| [](https://sender14.zohoinsights.com/ck/2d6f.327230a/3f418c50-8aca-11ec-af84-5254000e3179/39b307ad4b365626a59cb05cf5649c13c314cd33/1?e=SOjWGDoXFIiL4NdxiGLZkaXIREiXHzet4oopw6lmBTY%3D "http://markburns.org/donate")
---
| **Please Go to[MarkBurns.org](http://Markburns.org "http://Markburns.org") and sign up to volunteer for my campaign, make a contribution, and join me in the fight to Save America.**

---
|
---
|
---

name: Ally For Utah
subject: Mike Lee should honor his commitment to Utahns
body:
On the steps of the Utah State Capitol today...
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Md0LyU6CVYoqKtMHTuXVC-OEVqC6uDryjOrPMpZOb8esbmes1QysWSMPPsASNI62wVaRNpO2ff2-8GJAbywvtFf4unPikQRzxaJXSHRweyO8vFDoT5Ozv_nj2CPlLEFwmbJ9eumAGmnmXwSI-tE4Lg==&c=6v_aA9aU72mh9N_8b1ujndIT6qjsY6j578m6_563bUMuVk3j_i6ikg==&ch=aq2r8OP181lt5mSgUFtIQJmqcl7W1pVgX3ObP7QXhWWsqXA-Ohv_jg==)
---
|
---
| | Fellow Conservative,
On the steps of the Utah State Capitol today, I declared to my fellow Utahns that I will serve no more than two terms, and called on Senator Lee to honor [his commitment to Utahns](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Md0LyU6CVYoqKtMHTuXVC-OEVqC6uDryjOrPMpZOb8esbmes1QysWdqQgWGwMAHk--QPiuSUkNLYk4hxbOwxkh--aU16vovpr_4kX2vCcyxV77LWdrkF-nYsrCuExZ-KrKKPD5biBAtAeZN0_apzUqJfIruMcENiP1E9G7N3KvgOmFQSDoP7ZL0iE00CSMptlNAPwTQxlPfpAWpZxDQOsmlmn8_uti8HtcafnRrYZAp0uf08izlZsHtgnjqLgP-5&c=6v_aA9aU72mh9N_8b1ujndIT6qjsY6j578m6_563bUMuVk3j_i6ikg==&ch=aq2r8OP181lt5mSgUFtIQJmqcl7W1pVgX3ObP7QXhWWsqXA-Ohv_jg==) and "Come home."
As you know, Mike Lee has been one of the nation's most vocal advocates for term limits. Until recently.
The framers of our Constitution knew it would be healthy to routinely rotate those serving in public office.
It protects against corruption and dishonesty. It prevents careerism. It ensures those who act as our voice know what is in our hearts.
Elites - and that includes long-time incumbents and special interests - have too firm a grip on Washington. They think they know better.
They fail to see Americans have had it with the reckless spending, the unproductive tribalism, the disconnect from reality.
[Send a principled leader to Washington D.C. >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Md0LyU6CVYoqKtMHTuXVC-OEVqC6uDryjOrPMpZOb8esbmes1QysWSMPPsASNI62wVaRNpO2ff2-8GJAbywvtFf4unPikQRzxaJXSHRweyO8vFDoT5Ozv_nj2CPlLEFwmbJ9eumAGmnmXwSI-tE4Lg==&c=6v_aA9aU72mh9N_8b1ujndIT6qjsY6j578m6_563bUMuVk3j_i6ikg==&ch=aq2r8OP181lt5mSgUFtIQJmqcl7W1pVgX3ObP7QXhWWsqXA-Ohv_jg==)
It becomes too much of a game when you stay too long.
You start worrying too much about what the wrong people think.
You start actually needing the job and become reluctant to relinquish power.
It moves from public service to a public career.
Career politicians measure success by the number of cable TV appearances, rather than the number of bills successfully passed and signed into law.
Career politicians use taxpayer funds to send a 55-page glossy annual report in an election year rather than spending time in Utah's communities EVERY year.
Please join us in changing the political dynamics in Washington, D.C.! Let's get the right things done.
Join us in calling Mike Lee to come home. Twelve years is long enough.
[Any amount will help me qualify for the June primary election ballot. Will you step up with a donation today?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Md0LyU6CVYoqKtMHTuXVC-OEVqC6uDryjOrPMpZOb8esbmes1QysWVFDmK7fgiawVJdWvc5aY0mu3E-JqzmwwJ8Zj18sWUH9ADnqgycn0Hsy0b34DY2YttAaL61Utx3pKjLhw8KsIRQdPOxbp6wN_BivPUKhSoB-0VUE374b5vv1yzfr9a8NBQ==&c=6v_aA9aU72mh9N_8b1ujndIT6qjsY6j578m6_563bUMuVk3j_i6ikg==&ch=aq2r8OP181lt5mSgUFtIQJmqcl7W1pVgX3ObP7QXhWWsqXA-Ohv_jg==)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Fauci-ism in Retreat
body:
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V-xldgrt6AX7wLSvbH9Czf-bLFp7q-_eDOU5SsErAh2hMsA9WZBPghPIuyO0TecVB76kudpiiFOlcmG2JikFk8HhSyNghIk3-QMdQmPFxGw7DR4syf2egJPSmTJaSgcYljEGm9L9isHJ8ZXFwr8CRdVWIB0XXk9VzS_PIzWPNTf2hUscGdcewEr8H8fKnAWQ&c=J2FA1fudJM5m8wLAKjZa4MK_ygnBVyE68q8aO5AWzCIDyb69kNGUug==&ch=GAx3Zcp4eWWRC5dT3Gmy-ChzRlDIbxMgaVWOM16b-Pkl70DtvB8cwg==)
---
| Peter,
Democrats across the country are finally realizing what we knew in Florida almost two years ago - mask mandates and lockdowns don't work. The corrupt media incessantly smeared me for not imposing oppressive mandates on Floridians. Yet, Democrats are falling over themselves to follow my lead now, and they're trying to rewrite history as though they didn't just spend the past two years acting as power-hungry authoritarians. And let me tell ya, the medical science didn't change, the political science did. Democrats failed the American people, and we know it. As they stare down the upcoming election and their freefalling poll numbers, their only hope was to concede I was right by lifting their mandates. Every child deserves to grow up with a sense of normalcy rather than living in a biomedical Faucian dystopia as a political pawn for Democrats, yet, even as some blue state lockdown politicians have finally surrendered, Joe Biden still clings to forced masking of children as young as two years old. But don't be fooled: COVID was merely the most public exposure of Democrats' policy failures. Their list of being on the wrong side of history spreads far and wide. From open borders to rampant inflation, Democratic policies are failing the American people at every level. It only took two years for Democrats and the media to admit that freedom is superior to Fauci-ism. I will continue leading in Florida, but make no mistake: if they survive the 2022 elections, lockdown Democrats will absolutely revert to form and re-impose mandates and restrictions. So, Peter, can I count on you to help me continue to prove the hysterical corporate media and their political pawns wrong? [Chip in $20.22 to help me continue the fight and win in November.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001V-xldgrt6AX7wLSvbH9Czf-bLFp7q-_eDOU5SsErAh2hMsA9WZBPghPIuyO0TecVB76kudpiiFOlcmG2JikFk8HhSyNghIk3-QMdQmPFxGw7DR4syf2egJPSmTJaSgcYljEGm9L9isHJ8ZXFwr8CRdVWIB0XXk9VzS_PIzWPNTf2hUscGdcewEr8H8fKnAWQ&c=J2FA1fudJM5m8wLAKjZa4MK_ygnBVyE68q8aO5AWzCIDyb69kNGUug==&ch=GAx3Zcp4eWWRC5dT3Gmy-ChzRlDIbxMgaVWOM16b-Pkl70DtvB8cwg==) Thank you for your continued support. Sincerely,
---
|

| Ron DeSantis

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My new bipartisan plan:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
The American people deserve to have complete confidence that members of Congress are making decisions based on what’s best for the country — not what’s best for those lawmakers’ own personal finances. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41647908/329735828/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ3L_STK_E_20220210_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdhNjM1Yy1iMjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73K_YbIHxzA6eFgax5MS_psdY0TRXX-NI3WYFBtFdcc=&emci=50300f12-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3e7a635c-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
I think this is pretty basic, but apparently it’s a newsflash to some people in Washington: The American people deserve to have complete confidence that members of Congress are making decisions based on what’s best for the country — not what’s best for those lawmakers’ own personal finances. **So we need to ban members of Congress from owning and trading individual stocks. ** **I’m coming out with a new bill to do exactly that — and it’s already got bipartisan support. Now, to get it over the finish line, we need to show that the American people are demanding action.** [_**Will you add your name to say you support our plan? This is part of how we put Washington on the side of families, not just the rich and powerful.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41647911/329735831/-1569466571?refcode=EMZ3L_STK_E_20220210_V1S3&ms=EMZ3L_STK_E_20220210_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdhNjM1Yy1iMjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73K_YbIHxzA6eFgax5MS_psdY0TRXX-NI3WYFBtFdcc=&emci=50300f12-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3e7a635c-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Remember: Not so long ago, Republican Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue played down the danger of COVID-19 in public while privately trading stocks to profit from the pandemic. They both lost their re-election campaigns, but the potential for conflicts of interest still lurks around Capitol Hill — and we’ve got to clear it out. Now, let’s be clear — I’m more than ready to go even further than this plan. My larger bill to root corruption out of Washington would ban Cabinet secretaries, federal judges (including Supreme Court justices), and other top officials from owning and trading individual stocks. But this bipartisan plan, focused on Congress, is a straightforward first step. And there’s real momentum behind it right now. Here’s how the ban would work:
* After a short transition period, members of Congress and their spouses won’t be allowed to own or trade individual stocks.
* Instead, they can put their money in conflict-free investments like diversified mutual funds.
* And if they break the rules, they’ll have to pay a $50,000 fine per violation.

It’s clear and sharp. It says that senators and representatives shouldn’t be able to write laws to enrich themselves. And anyone who isn’t ready to follow these basic rules can pick a new line of work. **I’ve been working on this issue for years, and I believe we’re closer than ever to making it happen. Republicans and Democrats are working together to say enough is enough. Now is the moment for everyone to raise their voices.** [_**Add your name to say you support my bipartisan plan to ban members of Congress from owning and trading individual stocks — and let’s make it happen, side by side.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41647914/329735834/-1569466571?refcode=EMZ3L_STK_E_20220210_V1S3&ms=EMZ3L_STK_E_20220210_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTdhNjM1Yy1iMjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=73K_YbIHxzA6eFgax5MS_psdY0TRXX-NI3WYFBtFdcc=&emci=50300f12-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3e7a635c-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

clean_body: The American people deserve to have complete confidence that members of Congress are making decisions based on what’s best for the country — not what’s best for those lawmakers’ own personal finances. | | | I think this is pretty basic, but apparently it’s a newsflash to some people in Washington: The American people deserve to have complete confidence that members of Congress are making decisions based on what’s best for the country — not what’s best for those lawmakers’ own personal finances. So we need to ban members of Congress from owning and trading individual stocks. I’m coming out with a new bill to do exactly that — and it’s already got bipartisan support. Now, to get it over the finish line, we need to show that the American people are demanding action. Remember: Not so long ago, Republican Senators Kelly Loeffler and David Perdue played down the danger of COVID-19 in public while privately trading stocks to profit from the pandemic. They both lost their re-election campaigns, but the potential for conflicts of interest still lurks around Capitol Hill — and we’ve got to clear it out. Now, let’s be clear — I’m more than ready to go even further than this plan. My larger bill to root corruption out of Washington would ban Cabinet secretaries, federal judges (including Supreme Court justices), and other top officials from owning and trading individual stocks. But this bipartisan plan, focused on Congress, is a straightforward first step. And there’s real momentum behind it right now. Here’s how the ban would work: After a short transition period, members of Congress and their spouses won’t be allowed to own or trade individual stocks. Instead, they can put their money in conflict-free investments like diversified mutual funds. And if they break the rules, they’ll have to pay a $50,000 fine per violation. It’s clear and sharp. It says that senators and representatives shouldn’t be able to write laws to enrich themselves. And anyone who isn’t ready to follow these basic rules can pick a new line of work. I’ve been working on this issue for years, and I believe we’re closer than ever to making it happen. Republicans and Democrats are working together to say enough is enough. Now is the moment for everyone to raise their voices.** Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

| | **Hello Friend,** **I am so proud to announce that RTD Director Shontel Lewis has endorsed my campaign for Colorado's First Congressional District!** [](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=924ef6dc5e&e=e67cbb3f92) **I am humbled to have the support of such a trailblazer in our community! Shontel is someone that has continued to be a voice for the marginalized when it comes to transportation needs. We both dream of a world in which everyone has the ability to rely on affordable, accessible, and environmentally sustainable transportation.**

[**Can I count on you to follow Shontel's lead and support this campaign by making a donation of $10, $25, $50, or $100?**](https://nealwaliaforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d49a922e4af8b621dfcbac0ed&id=1b8a8d213d&e=e67cbb3f92)

**This campaign continues to gain support from dynamic community leaders like Shontel who are leading the way in effective governing for our community. I look forward to the partnership we will build when I am in office.**
In Solidarity,
Neal Walia
Candidate, CO First Congressional District
www.nealwaliaforcongress.com

name: Tyler Kistner
subject: Freedom vs. Tyranny
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KISTNER FOR CONGRESS
body:
When our country needed real leadership, we were failed. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3875e1df2454276be5a452cd76577d6&_e=ZuNaFKsr7XAxGIo3gFPLHhooq0YnEciWpzWZs2XKZ9NuvAF_MaciOpHMmOnORrLg91aB6D702Rryasg5nM2fanYX95N74IduGL2UeAEf3KpLUfshm6E7DUcFKWdfB4Ua5_kuVv7pykUxPBANd7obUK1amx229tOBt9XROwneybvmlboqYp3xd99qrGiUTvWbIUNCHcI-Uso3Aq68dTt6KjddOZTkNr5-MfxpKFo184Y-0YoYsv-sit6X1EZM_mn1JpbfHcw0wk_wm7IgKtpaTq6BJ_5gZHt67yQHXL15hQ_7j90wxZEbFSJxSdpEmKVZLCToF6_Ox6taib-gtNcMQx_5vUKL7nwm_PT1d0Nvx2eEdXO6j3T0S4r0wiI99CGt)

---
Fellow American,

When I think back on the past tumultuous year, I remember how:

Our city burned.

Our families were scared, even in their own homes.

Violent crime surged across our communities.

**_When our country needed real leadership, we were failed._**

So, when my second child was born and I looked into his big curious eyes, I knew I had to run for Congress because our families deserve so much better than a state ran by radical liberals who want to defund our police, open our borders, and destroy the foundation our country was built on.

If we haven’t met yet, I’m Tyler Kistner. A proud father of two, husband, and Marine Raider. I would do anything for my children, my family, and my country.

[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3875e1df2454276be5a452cd76577d6&_e=ZuNaFKsr7XAxGIo3gFPLHhooq0YnEciWpzWZs2XKZ9NuvAF_MaciOpHMmOnORrLg91aB6D702Rryasg5nM2fanYX95N74IduGL2UeAEf3KpLUfshm6E7DUcFKWdfB4Ua5_kuVv7pykUxPBANd7obUK1amx229tOBt9XROwneybslsc3DEOTd1MyRQoDdJSwbZwsnSbpJLvb9IxHxvFG1zMVmlo4tZCjWgdzHnpDMhMMLcgzFh0g1o2ClDI9VqdO_7mPqzz5EHi8qbvdyTKMy0N78-cvQ_0uncyVnbYfiFeBOuBfiXnvoEyGUQmsaYmH0KmmMGrTfdoeiIdxV9Vk8-ZHhvc7NVFPNYSKbaqMnUPZ-Eg5rxcDhyc0LiwgvgXw3)

But right now, our nation is experiencing the early stages of tyranny. We are facing an oppressive government who wants to strip us of our rights, ruin our economy, and rob our children of their future - _their birthrights as Americans._

[** ****Send in the Marine ➞ **](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3875e1df2454276be5a452cd76577d6&_e=ZuNaFKsr7XAxGIo3gFPLHhooq0YnEciWpzWZs2XKZ9NuvAF_MaciOpHMmOnORrLg91aB6D702Rryasg5nM2fanYX95N74IduGL2UeAEf3KpLUfshm6E7DUcFKWdfB4Ua5_kuVv7pykUxPBANd7obUK1amx229tOBt9XROwneybvp2hx8LLvjEwFfqPUTnZeeuwGcq8mdyUq5FKO5500sUyDeHvDH8J-ZxZ64TRI0VWgpIcUX7xgfw2p5tFRKwVKsZvQdKj8fXljySWPXGpQCGYYQ9amB_ffFAIZSYbt9j7EMU76Y76HAh7e1h4SkBCzPfVsAR71xcKNo1mYinYzUn-6nds5yp0sIsINujZGHRBlqxNcrdi5CO9BGIz4Jhot_)

My children deserve a shot at the America dream, and so do yours. _But the path we are on right now, is horrifying._

I served nine years in the U.S. Marine Corps, for five of those years I served in the elite Marine Special Operation Forces - the Marine Raiders. I took an oath to defend our Constitution, and my oath to this country will never expire. [**I want to fix the broken system in Washington, so we have a country we are proud to leave for our next generation and that’s what I plan to do in Congress.**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3875e1df2454276be5a452cd76577d6&_e=ZuNaFKsr7XAxGIo3gFPLHhooq0YnEciWpzWZs2XKZ9NuvAF_MaciOpHMmOnORrLg91aB6D702Rryasg5nM2fanYX95N74IduGL2UeAEf3KpLUfshm6E7DUcFKWdfB4Ua5_kuVv7pykUxPBANd7obUK1amx229tOBt9XROwneybu14XDifbm6XX0dlR7ZPvHKMdNS-dZ7Wea_ZHIUMyDEWuC8ykk7dEvd98_vLUMIsMFUQ4BUMYh3q5kmri9ggoEomEnfb7lo16Ug5ZbL7_-JA5Int0gfRlQ_5f-SO_nhHfPyd4asCsPoIH5UihSGIb2k5Q0OkSSzuEAOZbYf-CHvAtZamCVyMrLv9HAcH88v26z5njs0Pa1h1ZP_3oi2Icxm)

When I ran in 2020, we had one of the closest races in the country. I fell short by less than 10,000 votes. But this year, all eyes are on this seat. It’s one of the top races in the country because Republicans only need to net FIVE seats to regain our majority and take the country back from the intolerant and radical Left.

I’m running for Congress in Minnesota’s 2nd district because the current 'leaders' have sold out our children’s future to the radicals who wish to destroy the American dream. [**I will not sit idly by as radical tyrants wreck our country. Together, we can restore and preserve the country we love. Will you join me?**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=e3875e1df2454276be5a452cd76577d6&_e=ZuNaFKsr7XAxGIo3gFPLHhooq0YnEciWpzWZs2XKZ9NuvAF_MaciOpHMmOnORrLg91aB6D702Rryasg5nM2fanYX95N74IduGL2UeAEf3KpLUfshm6E7DUcFKWdfB4Ua5_kuVv7pykUxPBANd7obUK1amx229tOBt9XROwneybsUU76DKfoaSV2zvqW2oBQdA-ifdapWVoUWuiZL4zn-RkbLT0q219Vdgeg_2suOhr2ajjEVwXbn3so-Y5whGHO_gPHpDqb33weq7Pn21iIdyQ6WcJ1c_GUWqx36fMHY25gnx2A8As6zdN7BZDrSH6SgbeAx7cG2KEKcg7kFhiCqp4WDsP74lbO2wi7vV4bb0ZhcMw0qU-yxCtT0zpky6plH)

In Service,

subject: This is worrisome, friend

body:
I'm worried
| | |
---
I'm worried, friend. With hours left to meet tonight's fundraising goal, **I'm still falling $7,481 short.** Please, let me explain why this is such a dire moment:
**I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio in the race that will determine Senate control, and****CNN contributors like James Carville have "zero doubt" that I CAN win.**
The problem is that the GOP is stacking the cards against me because they KNOW this race is Democrats' best chance to expand our Senate majority. Far-right outside groups are dumping millions into Florida, and the chair of the RNC just attacked me _personally._
**I'm looking at my fundraising numbers now, and I won't be able to defend myself from these GOP attacks if I don't reach my goal in the next few hours.**
**[Missing this goal and falling behind in this race could mean handing the Senate right back to Mitch McConnell, so I have to ask: Will you donate $5 right now to help me defeat Marco Rubio, flip Florida blue and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41648640/329739259/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2387-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0M2Y0MTQxOS1iNThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gkwQDnw4BfeEo9WsA4rY5bHAlwHINqCEl2meK-cyNhg=)**

* * *
Team, the MAGA Party’s leadership is _terrified_ of Liz Cheney.

After Liz Cheney REFUSED to bow down to Trump, they’ve DESTROYED her approval rating, STRIPPED her of her leadership position, and ATTACKED her daily!

All just to save Donald Trump from being punished for the insurrection he helped incite. IT’S PATHETIC!

name: Democratic HQ
subject: re: Dr. Fauci
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Do you stand with Dr. Fauci?
| | | ****BREAKING via _The Hill_ : “[Rand] Paul promises investigation of Fauci if Republicans take Senate”

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/6154?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220210-DemocraticHQ-PaulFauciInvestigation-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220210-DemocraticHQ-PaulFauciInvestigation-Pros-sl1&akid=2934%2E9716520%2EnW5-e2)
******[Add your name to tell us you stand with Dr. Fauci, before the midnight deadline>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/6154?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220210-DemocraticHQ-PaulFauciInvestigation-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220210-DemocraticHQ-PaulFauciInvestigation-Pros-sl1&akid=2934%2E9716520%2EnW5-e2)******

**** | | [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/6154?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220210-DemocraticHQ-PaulFauciInvestigation-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220210-DemocraticHQ-PaulFauciInvestigation-Pros-sl1&akid=2934%2E9716520%2EnW5-e2)
---

While Dr. Fauci guided our nation through the worst pandemic in a century, Rand Paul _continually_ spread dangerous COVID-19 misinformation and conspiracy theories.

**Now, Rand Paul is doubling down and threatening to launch a phony investigation against Dr. Fauci if Republicans flip the Senate!**

Dr. Fauci deserves so much better, and so do we. Our senators should tackle problems and talk about issues -- not traffic in far‐right nonsense -- **so it’s time to take a stand against Rand Paul’s BLATANT misinformation.**

**We want to know that Democrats have Dr. Fauci’s back, but we don’t have your signature on file:**

Your ID | 9716520
---|---

I’ll be honest with you -- it’s going to be difficult to win this election. When my opponent ran before, he came within a few votes of winning.

clean_body: I’ll be honest with you -- it’s going to be difficult to win this election. | = Friends -- = The truth of the matter is, I’m running in one of the most competitive Congressional races in the country. And my opponent, Derrick Van Orden, is an extremist who attended the January 6th Insurrection. I’ll be honest with you -- it’s going to be difficult to win this election. When my opponent ran before, he came within a few votes of winning. But I know I’ll be able to win with the help of dedicated supporters like you. So that’s why I’m writing to you today. My mid-month fundraising deadline is 5 days away, and I need 150 more donations from supporters like you to hit my goal. Your $5 will make a tremendous impact. = | = = = = = = Experts say that keeping Democratic control of the House could come down to winning this race. And Derrick Van Orden has already raised more than $2,000,000 to defeat me. So I’m not exaggerating when I tell you that $5 from supporters like you could decide whether or not we are able to give President Biden a Democratic House majority. = Thanks, Brad Pfaff | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

clean_body: Join us on the phones in February! | | | Dear Team, We are about to reach our first big phone banking milestone: 50,000 phone calls!! This is an incredible foundation for us to build off of in the coming months, and I’m so proud we’re already here. The biggest challenge in winning this primary is making sure voters know they even have a choice. As we make phone calls, we are still finding that a majority of voters don’t even know when the primary is scheduled to happen (It’s June 28). ** If you can’t make it this time, you can always sign up to join any of our upcoming voter outreach events here: Phone banking is one of the most cost effective ways of reaching voters in our district, but still, every 50,000 phone calls that we make costs the campaign $2,062.50. ** We are 138 days away from our election. We know what we need to do to win, and we know that if we all come together, nothing will stop us. Let’s go!! In Solidarity, Isabel Alter Organizing Director Kina Collins for Congress | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Donna Imam for Congress
subject: Winning the Latino vote in Texas
body:
The GOP is focusing on Hispanic voters that have long favored Democrats and going after blue districts. Here’s what we need to do. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41648996/329740645/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGFhYzQzMS1iNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1knMDEo7XmHLbZ1QUAENvHE7kCl2O_dcORJtSxc-QM=)
A new poll found that Hispanic voters are moving their support away from Democrats and towards the GOP.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41648997/329740646/-780221392?amount=10&refcode=pl_20220210_01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MGFhYzQzMS1iNzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D1knMDEo7XmHLbZ1QUAENvHE7kCl2O_dcORJtSxc-QM=)**[Donna developed her platform with her community, by listening to her Hispanic and Latino neighbors. We need to incentivize new housing to lower the cost of living in Austin and across Texas. We’re taking this message to voters in Austin, and they agree.

* _**Cost of Education and Healthcare.**_ Every parent wants to see their children, our next generation, do better economically. This is why debt-free education and lowering the cost of healthcare is so important to Hispanic and Latino families. Donna has a strong message on how to deliver on these solutions effectively, and with your help we can let more voters know. This is a winning message.

subject: I’m thrilled to endorse Letitia James for attorney general (reading time: 1.5 minutes)

body:
| | |

Peter, my friend Letitia James is no stranger to making history.

As the first Black woman ever elected attorney general in New York, Letitia has been fighting tirelessly to protect our fundamental rights, stand up for working families, and take on our country’s most powerful interests — from suing the Trump administration _76 times_ to taking legal action against some of the most powerful interests.
Now, Letitia is running for re-election to continue working toward a fairer, more just society for _all_ _,_ and I couldn’t be more thrilled to endorse her.

**But corrupt, powerful interests want nothing more than to silence her unflinching voice for justice and accountability. So as she faces a tough road ahead, I promised her that this team could come through with the resources she’ll need to win. Can I count on you to step up now to help raise $10,000 for Letitia’s campaign by midnight?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dan=20McKaughan=20for=20U.S.=20Congress?=
subject: FOUR (4) Days Until Early Voting!
body:
There are several opportunities to volunteer coming up. And they're important. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4569ec1f1781/volunteers-needed-trump-rally-and-lake-conroe-boat-show-15896166?e=82b2b364e3)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# Greetings Dan McKaughan for Texas Team!!

I hope you are all well.

First let me thank you all for your continued support. And for those that came out to boat show, it was a resounding success! We met so many people and got a chance to tell why we're the best candidate in the race.

And I may have sang a song with the band at Papa's...maybe.

We are now 4 DAYS from EARLY VOTING!! Lots of stuff coming up.

Please note that if you're interested in doing any of the below, contact me by replying to this email or calling/texting me at 936.282.7066.

1. For those in the Conroe area, on Saturday February 12th, Conroe will have it's annual Black History Parade. Line up is at 10:00 at FM2854 and 45. Step off is at noon. I know this is short notice, but if you're interested in walking the line of spectators and handing out campaign material, that'd be a great opportunity. Let me know so we can get you some material ASAP.

2. We need volunteers to be at polling places during early voting and on election day. Early voting runs from February 14-25. Election Day is March 1st. It would be too hard to get someone at every polling location every day, so if you'd like to be at the one nearest your home or wherever is most convenient for you, let me know. We'll get you some signs and material. This is actually a very important opportunity. Believe it or not, quite a few voters do not know who they will vote for until they get to the polls. So we have an opportunity to convince them that I'm the best candidate!

3. I'll need volunteers to make phone calls in a few days. I'm finalizing the lists and numbers of who to call. It really isn't as intimidating as it sounds. For those that answer, you'll have a brief script to read. For those that don't, a voicemail will be left from me giving the voter my number and asking them to call me. Quite personal. Not a robo-call. This too is important (I guess everything is with the election this close). We are not shot-gunning calls, but targeting specific voters.

4. Anyone really bored with time on their hands, I have some 4x4 signs that I need put up around the district. Let me know if you're interested.

I think that's it. Thank you all again for your help and support.

We're rounding 3rd and heading home. Almost there.

Peace,

Dan

**We’re 2.5 weeks away from the Primary!!!**

[http://danmckaughan.com](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=40e02bb32e&e=82b2b364e3)

#whocandancan #constituentsovercash
---
| | |
---
| _Copyright © 2022 Dan McKaughan for Texas, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Dan McKaughan for Texas3915 W Davis St Ste 130-294Conroe, TX 77304-1878
[Add us to your address book](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5&e=82b2b364e3&c=d137c97661) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://DanMcKaughan.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=3546b09b826f568403b576872&id=7909b9d8d5&e=82b2b364e3&c=d137c97661).

name: Data and Communication Manager
subject: John Selker hosting Feb 15th Climate Change Conversation
body:
John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon
District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to
retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker
and problem solver. He is hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations
on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large
and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s position on key
issues.

*The second conversation in the series is on Tuesday February 15th at 7 pm
on Zoom with the topic of Climate Change, featuring Dr. Dominique Bachelet,*
Associate Professor in the OSU Department of Biological & Ecological
Engineering.

For the past 33 years Dr. Bachelet has focused her research on global
climate change impacts. Dr. Bachelet will introduce the topic, and John
will share his policy ideas before opening the floor for Zoom participants
to ask questions and share their thoughts and concerns.

To register for the Policy Series and receive a Zoom link and passcode, go
to

https://zoom.us/meeting/register/tJwpcu2upz8uH9VP8UrfEuFOtLBBEx6e_mtR

When: Feb 15, 2022 07:00 PM Pacific Time (US and Canada)

After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing a Zoom
link to join the meeting.

Dominique Bachelet is an ecologist with 40 years of combined education and
work experience in the USA. Her research has focused on global climate
change impacts since 1989 and she has been involved in several IPCC reports
since 1995. She contributed to the development of the first dynamic global
vegetation model (MC1) that included a prognostic fire model. For a decade
she worked in the NGO world focusing on climate change science information
delivery and communication. In 2017 she was elected AAAS fellow in
recognition of her climate change science contribution. She returned to OSU
to teach online climate change related classes.
clean_body: John Selker of Corvallis is running to represent the people of Oregon District 4 in the US Congress since Peter DeFazio announced his plans to retire. John is an entrepreneur, OSU Distinguished Professor, woodworker and problem solver. He is hosting a weekly series of Policy Conversations on Zoom to learn more about what is important to the people of our large and diverse district, and to help people understand John’s position on key issues. The second conversation in the series is on Tuesday February 15th at 7 pm on Zoom with the topic of Climate Change, featuring Dr. Dominique Bachelet, Associate Professor in the OSU Department of Biological & Ecological Engineering. For the past 33 years Dr. Bachelet has focused her research on global climate change impacts. Dr. Bachelet will introduce the topic, and John will share his policy ideas before opening the floor for Zoom participants to ask questions and share their thoughts and concerns. To register for the Policy Series and receive a Zoom link and passcode, go to When: Feb 15, 2022 07:00 PM Pacific Time (US and Canada) After registering, you will receive a confirmation email containing a Zoom link to join the meeting. Dominique Bachelet is an ecologist with 40 years of combined education and work experience in the USA. Her research has focused on global climate change impacts since 1989 and she has been involved in several IPCC reports since 1995. She contributed to the development of the first dynamic global vegetation model (MC1) that included a prognostic fire model. For a decade she worked in the NGO world focusing on climate change science information delivery and communication. In 2017 she was elected AAAS fellow in recognition of her climate change science contribution. She returned to OSU to teach online climate change related classes.

We need to dig our heels in, maintain our momentum, and communicate Charlie’s message to voters all over the state. But friends, that takes resources — which is why we’re coming to you right now. So please don’t wait. Rush a donation to Charlie’s campaign today to help us stay in the lead and DEFEAT Governor DeSantis in November! name: Team Benson Action Center
subject: Rudy Giuliani attempted to seize our voting machines
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Jocelyn Benson for Secretary of State
body:
In the months following the 2020 election, we know that President Trump and his extremist allies across the country tried every possible scheme to subvert our democracy.

Here in Michigan, Rudy Giuliani wanted to seize some of our voting machines so he could pass them along to the Trump campaign. He personally asked a local prosecutor for the machines but the prosecutor said, no!

Friend, we were able to fight these explicit attempts to overturn our democracy because of the strong leadership of Jocelyn and local election administrators.

But it’s easy to imagine a scenario where Jocelyn wasn’t secretary of state and local election officials were Trump allies. And when Rudy Giuliani and the Trump campaign came to seize voting machines, our democratic guardrails wouldn’t be there to stop them.
Friend, that awful scenario is exactly what they have planned for the 2022 election. Extremists are already infiltrating county canvassing boards and a number of Big Lie candidates are looking to unseat Jocelyn (including one who has already been endorsed by Trump).

We can’t give, Trump, Giuliani and their allies a free pass to undermine the will of our voters. Support Jocelyn’s re-election campaign today and let’s keep the guardrails up on our democracy.

clean_body: In the months following the 2020 election, we know that President Trump and his extremist allies across the country tried every possible scheme to subvert our democracy. Here in Michigan, Rudy Giuliani wanted to seize some of our voting machines so he could pass them along to the Trump campaign. He personally asked a local prosecutor for the machines but the prosecutor said, no! Friend, we were able to fight these explicit attempts to overturn our democracy because of the strong leadership of Jocelyn and local election administrators. But it’s easy to imagine a scenario where Jocelyn wasn’t secretary of state and local election officials were Trump allies. And when Rudy Giuliani and the Trump campaign came to seize voting machines, our democratic guardrails wouldn’t be there to stop them. Friend, that awful scenario is exactly what they have planned for the 2022 election. Extremists are already infiltrating county canvassing boards and a number of Big Lie candidates are looking to unseat Jocelyn (including one who has already been endorsed by Trump). We can’t give, Trump, Giuliani and their allies a free pass to undermine the will of our voters. Support Jocelyn’s re-election campaign today and let’s keep the guardrails up on our democracy. ---
In order to get on the ballot, we need to collect thousands of petition signatures from registered Republicans across the state. Yesterday, the PA Supreme Court suspended the petition circulation period that was scheduled to begin next Tuesday and there is discussion that they will shorten the period to collect the signatures from 3 weeks to 2 weeks. **_We need more volunteers to circulate petitions to ensure that we get the required number of signatures to qualify for the ballot in a shorter period of time._** If you haven't already signed up through our webpage, please go to[ www.zamaforpa.com/petitions](https://gmail.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e0968883c931118cab22122d&id=737f7347d6&e=fe97fe84cf) and sign up today!

| Peter, I’m Ryan — campaign manager of Phil Arballo’s campaign.

I’m going to break down the stakes of this race, but first I have to ask: [**Will you donate $3 to elect Phil in California’s wide‐open, battleground seat? I need 178 Cresco supporters to chip in today to stay on top of our lofty goals »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41649734/329743216/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTlmNGJmYi1iOThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toW5oD6R3QZ47kjzvP5AXofox6Tnsn0DOJiEZdptk0U=) | [178 DEMOCRATS NEEDED: RUSH $3 TO ELECT PHIL ARBALLO »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41649735/329743217/982711125?amount=3&refcode=PAFC_20220210_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTlmNGJmYi1iOThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toW5oD6R3QZ47kjzvP5AXofox6Tnsn0DOJiEZdptk0U=)
---

name: John Legend
subject: re: Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7326?t=1007&amount=25&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]A personal message from John Legend

Hello,

We’re at a turning point in our country. Even though Democrats have a thin
majority, Republicans are using the filibuster to block important bills in
the Senate.

50/50 is not enough. It’s clear we must expand the Democratic Senate
majority to abolish the filibuster and make the real progress American
people want. I believe Tim Ryan is our opportunity to do just that.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7326?t=1008&amount=25&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]Will you join me in supporting his campaign? Please, make a donation of
whatever you can afford to help us flip Ohio blue. Anything you give would
mean a lot to me personally.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7326?t=1009&amount=25&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]Donate

I was born and raised in Springfield, Ohio. That’s actually how I got my
start in music—performing in my church choir. I will always have a special
place in my heart for the Buckeye State.

Ohio’s U.S. Senate race in November is one of the most important fights of
our lifetime, which is why I couldn’t just sit on the sidelines. And you
can’t either.

Tim’s right-wing opponents and their billionaire backers are already
spending upwards of $40 MILLION to keep Ohio red and ensure Mitch
McConnell retakes total control of the Senate.

If that happens, friend, voting rights, a higher minimum wage,
affordable health care, high-quality education for all our kids, and more
are in jeopardy. I don’t want to think about the damage that Republicans
could do if they regain their grip on our government.

But the good news is if we win Ohio, Democrats can hold and expand our
Senate majority. Even better news? Tim is neck-and-neck with his GOP
opponents in the polls.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7326?t=1010&amount=25&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]We CAN win, but only if you help Tim fight back against the attacks
heading his way. Can I personally count on you to add a donation now to
help Tim’s campaign win this important race?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/7326?t=1011&amount=25&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]Donate

Tim Ryan is the leader Ohio deserves. He will do whatever it takes to make
sure working families get the support they need. That’s why we’re both
counting on your help to win.

Thank you. I know how much this team means to Tim and it’s incredible to
see so many supporters join this fight alongside us.

—John Legend

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1001&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ][IMG]
We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/Fewer_Emails/?t=1002&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]click here.
If you'd like to make a donation to our campaign, you can do that below!
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/1774?t=1003&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]Donate Monthly
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/49?t=1004&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ]Donate Once

Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
Tim Ryan for Ohio
P.O. Box 189
Niles, Ohio 44446
United States
[ mailto:info@timforoh.com ][IMG] [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11?t=1005&akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt ][IMG]

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.timforoh.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2305%2E3611125%2EjK0Gjt

name: Kate at Jacobs for Congress
subject: Crack Pipes to Advance “Racial Equity”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress
body:
The latest ludicrous Biden administration plan [](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3391c1b7d7f64be5bbe80dbf5a48d494&_e=ABN_iM-ldx4Ars1svSMyHIO2ig2_UUemXfG6TiCbKj-AvRzKqEMcEfVOcEZKxtdlTD9NLm2yimSu-Lxa939Ri7MSC1OOJrK1e2uzhAqfJNQJ2FTBjP4vPHVfEUHio-T4_RJSCvm-AMlhgW2tRpkw-W0V0enDPqidko84vsVC5a7PfbvjsEv9EPM_kqMas-Ae78iNNnWGNsEvjl1e54Z0dJHu0I0gTXKRlq0LS_ouPu8-tfJHeq9B8JAByi8xan5pJrsljTnSdJamRsk4r6nP6w%3D%3D) Peter, The Biden administration is set to fund the distribution of **free crack pipes** to drug users as part of its latest plan to “advance racial equity.” **Yes, you read that correctly. **The same people who want to defund the police believe they can “advance racial equity and support for underserved communities” by spending **federal tax dollars** on “smoking kits” for drug users. [**STOP THE LEFT’S NONSENSICAL DRUG POLICIES**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3391c1b7d7f64be5bbe80dbf5a48d494&_e=ABN_iM-ldx4Ars1svSMyHPlTdfHZx8rrKnQ1hrx6elLxJfeoDFYeA-9TBv38RwE-ioGq5W20q_7dGHc8_AQpRpqMOOlOwT_8BnGAWzRR-Iz4psb6LhXiPK0-CUJEFFIlHqfB-HxzOvhfj4SDePUNuBFxrDBIvX63lmSguui5tCTJkTPuRTuibjgrFZmPitGtxRW8Ocph3EUIUMu8iiFCDIojLfPYwBCjmz9eiXfdyPp-FmopeULNg2wJQt-OJBt0ejrnTPxzV8mYxUGkNE6pnEKnZW7i8RDqTPDh1IHpOg8wlc_G9LSxRfnGFi-duF-t1lYlRdP5YkcljTjIi-LPAE-vsMNgciJ2n0BRrnN_Gr5HT5P1VTiXUmmzSGy2S4-8Ku1LHRZren2W6hMIu7XJpeFKLMFGmMS6cEpho5dTdIik_sLPK5RNE4Kar1LBpO3TJANlmiQ9gVwnFrX1uj-RCe4QpwyLyNObjDKa12DqmAY%3D) This is an insult to law enforcement and first responders on the front lines of the drug epidemic – and a slap in the face to community groups devoted to helping drug users break the cycle of addiction. [**HELP END THE DRUG EPIDEMIC**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3391c1b7d7f64be5bbe80dbf5a48d494&_e=ABN_iM-ldx4Ars1svSMyHPlTdfHZx8rrKnQ1hrx6elLxJfeoDFYeA-9TBv38RwE-ioGq5W20q_7dGHc8_AQpRpqMOOlOwT_8BnGAWzRR-Iz4psb6LhXiPK0-CUJEFFIlHqfB-HxzOvhfj4SDePUNuBFxrDBIvX63lmSguui5tCTJkTPuRTuibjgrFZmPitGtxRW8Ocph3EUIUMu8iiFCDIojLfPYwBCjmz9eiXfdyPp-FmopeULNg2wJQt-OJBt0u3htzA5-kT9ldL_o7I0Tm0yUuYXyZYZkTpdQ6WOFormTZC3LDKgcpyoqmUeONv0H2Yrf04IA40ljz0xgJpkxpn1ySPchxXSGr9z3Cy58xE-ox50oIF7p32RZOPpd8O5J6mLIhU83s7p05CT7g34h9AACKVIPlHhTnx45Y-iQHXYkzceESNDJxMT3YPoLwnKlHznQ1upAtH8KvbGSA6o-0zvKhRr985u-6lyze5UNnR8%3D) Fentanyl overdoses are now******the leading cause of death** for American adults ages 18-45. As a federal prosecutor, Matt Jacobs went after fentanyl traffickers and other drug dealers. He saw firsthand how these criminals devastated families and communities. And he knows that our resources should be spent taking them off the streets – not making their lethal products easier to consume. [**STOP the Democrats’ dangerous and irrational drug policies.**](https://link.mattjacobsforcongress.com/u/click?_t=efc64eece5bd468cad54456b97abcf7f&_m=3391c1b7d7f64be5bbe80dbf5a48d494&_e=ABN_iM-ldx4Ars1svSMyHPlTdfHZx8rrKnQ1hrx6elLxJfeoDFYeA-9TBv38RwE-ioGq5W20q_7dGHc8_AQpRpqMOOlOwT_8BnGAWzRR-Iz4psb6LhXiPK0-CUJEFFIlHqfB-HxzOvhfj4SDePUNuBFxrDBIvX63lmSguui5tCTJkTPuRTuibjgrFZmPitGtxRW8Ocph3EUIUMu8iiFCDIojLfPYwBCjmz9eiXfdyPp-FmopeULNg2wJQt-OJBt0yXhCDCypq7kRBjsLL2F_iYdOl7AjuMYCi9hv5oSqmKgUUZCFaRSDO58G9R0oeMbWk0JGntXJIEhJQqr5ZCHTsLfhTor-DpP8kY_q3cXiO9O9y747Za_R9amj8oTF7G09-L34L-H8-vpScBerp4M9x_9PBcrua9t0UaBbccNKUoFbEq0Gvg4F5cE0_Pgvjcj_pa_veTgysXMq5jLd0dl9UQjenJ7g_vdze3dSgaAQExw%3D) clean_body: The latest ludicrous Biden administration plan Peter, The Biden administration is set to fund the distribution of free crack pipes to drug users as part of its latest plan to “advance racial equity.” Yes, you read that correctly. The same people who want to defund the police believe they can “advance racial equity and support for underserved communities” by spending federal tax dollars on “smoking kits” for drug users. This is an insult to law enforcement and first responders on the front lines of the drug epidemic – and a slap in the face to community groups devoted to helping drug users break the cycle of addiction. Fentanyl overdoses are now****the leading cause of death for American adults ages 18-45. As a federal prosecutor, Matt Jacobs went after fentanyl traffickers and other drug dealers. He saw firsthand how these criminals devastated families and communities. And he knows that our resources should be spent taking them off the streets – not making their lethal products easier to consume. Thanks, Kate Team Jacobs for Congress | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Matt Jacobs for Congress Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Mark Kelly
subject: Sign my petition: Tell Congress that it’s time to pass legislation that would overturn the disastrous effects of the Supreme Court’s Citizens United ruling.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Twelve years ago, Citizens United v. FEC allowed corporate special interest groups to flood our political system with dark money, drowning out the voices of everyday Americans.
#

Friends —
Twelve years ago, Citizens United v. FEC allowed corporate special interest groups to flood our political system with dark money, drowning out the voices of everyday Americans.
Reversing this decision is one of the most important things we can do to strengthen our democracy.
Add your name if you agree:
[**Tell Congress it’s time to pass legislation that would overturn the disastrous effects of the Supreme Court’s Citizens United ruling.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/citizen-united-petition-em-feb22?source=em220210-1-7&t=1&akid=2100%2E6688874%2E2VRWED)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/citizen-united-petition-em-feb22?source=em220210-1-7&t=2&akid=2100%2E6688874%2E2VRWED)**
Corporate PAC money in politics affects everything in a dramatic and negative way.
And I’m not just saying that because of all of the dark money attacks we have and will continue to face.
People should run for office to represent their constituents, not corporations. Which is why I’ll never accept corporate PAC money.
Because if we’re going to break the hold corporate influence has over Congress, we have to stop corporations from spending unlimited money in our elections.
That starts with overturning Citizens United.
If you agree, sign my petition:
[**Add your name to tell Congress that it’s time to pass legislation that would overturn the disastrous effects of the Supreme Court’s Citizens United ruling.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/citizen-united-petition-em-feb22?source=em220210-1-7&t=3&akid=2100%2E6688874%2E2VRWED)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/citizen-united-petition-em-feb22?source=em220210-1-7&t=4&akid=2100%2E6688874%2E2VRWED)**
Thank you for making your voice heard.
Mark Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=5&akid=2100%2E6688874%2E2VRWED).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

subject: Scandals in Loudoun keep getting worse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lawson for Congress]( "Paid for by Lawson for Congress")
body:
It wasn't enough to destroy our children's educations, now Democrats have hired a registered sex offender to work in the Commonwealth Attorney's offic | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/0074b7e85b4e/scandals-in-loudoun-keep-getting-worse?e=fc83fb200d)
---
| |
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=5df134deab&e=fc83fb200d "Donate")
---
| Dear ,

The mess in Loudoun County just keeps getting worse. It wasn't enough to remove our children from school, institute mask mandates, and then cover up sexual assault within the school system. Now the Loudoun County Commonwealth Attorney [hired a registered sex offender, who was convicted of child pornography charges, to work in the Commonwealth Attorney's office.](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=df4d82a7b9&e=fc83fb200d)

I've had enough of our elected representatives taking money from George Soros and the radical left, just to turn around and implement a political agenda that is devastating to our children and our community.

My opponent, Jennifer Wexton endorsed the Loudoun County Commonwealth's Attorney when she ran in 2019. Now, it's complete radio silence on scandals like this.

This comes after Democrats in Loudoun and elsewhere have destroyed our school system, inhibited our children's educations, and turned a blind eye to sexual assault.

I've had enough.

It's time to send a message that we won't allow left-wing radicals like Jennifer Wexton and her Commonwealth's Attorney to ruin our country and our community. I'm running for Congress to send Wexton packing and put an end to this madness, but I can't do it without your help.

I'm counting on your support to help to take back Virginia's 10th Congressional District. [Will you contribute just $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today so that I can do what needs to be done to protect our children and keep our community safe?](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=72c17fa15a&e=fc83fb200d)

This is the year to take back our country and restore commonsense leadership to our elected offices, but I NEED your help to do it.

Please consider supporting my campaign today, and together we can protect our children, hold our elected officials accountable, and stop the madness in Loudoun and across the 10th District.

name: Wes Moore
subject: Every issue is tied to voting rights
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41649943/329744122/-1531988014?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220210votingrights_wm_60da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzVkYTg3YS1iYjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=712zwlsfGhLOMW_-7tBH7lsN9y4F-qqcILrbJUAbAOI=)
---
**[Voting rights are under attack across the country. Help fight back and urge Congress to defend every Marylander’s right to vote now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41649944/329744123/-1017216940?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220210votingrights_wm_60da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzVkYTg3YS1iYjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=712zwlsfGhLOMW_-7tBH7lsN9y4F-qqcILrbJUAbAOI=&emci=ff9d8f73-bb8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=375da87a-bb8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)** Hey team, I had the pleasure of joining Zerlina Maxwell on MSNBC this week to talk about why voting rights — and the nationwide efforts to roll them back — matter. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41649945/329744124/-1017216940?refcode=fl_email_pt_20220210votingrights_wm_60da_xx_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNzVkYTg3YS1iYjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=712zwlsfGhLOMW_-7tBH7lsN9y4F-qqcILrbJUAbAOI=&emci=ff9d8f73-bb8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=375da87a-bb8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635485)
---
**In 2021, 19 states passed 34 laws that restrict access to voting.** I wish I could say that I’m surprised by how deliberate, intentional, and creative we’ve seen people be when it comes to limiting political voice and political power in so many communities, particularly in communities of color, but unfortunately, the right to vote has long been under attack.
We’ve seen the injustice of continued suppression of Black voices through methods like voter ID laws, partisan gerrymandering, purging voter rolls, and so on. And when you consider the fact that Maryland is one of the most diverse states in the country — where nearly 1 in 3 Marylanders are Black — we have a political, societal, and moral responsibility to not just make sure that we’re protecting the right to vote for all our citizens, but also continuing to remind all of our citizens what’s at stake and why their voice and their vote matters so much in these times.
_Everything is at stake._ **There is no single issue that will not be impacted by voting rights** , because it’s voting rights and who is sitting in these seats that are going to help determine the policies — whether it’s housing, transportation, education, criminal justice reform — that shape each of our lives.
In light of the nationwide efforts to roll back the right to vote, it’s crucial that our leaders in Washington defend and expand every American’s right to vote — and they can do so by passing voting rights legislation like the **John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act and Freedom to Vote Act.**

clean_body: | = Hey team, I had the pleasure of joining Zerlina Maxwell on MSNBC this week to talk about why voting rights — and the nationwide efforts to roll them back — matter. | In 2021, 19 states passed 34 laws that restrict access to voting. I wish I could say that I’m surprised by how deliberate, intentional, and creative we’ve seen people be when it comes to limiting political voice and political power in so many communities, particularly in communities of color, but unfortunately, the right to vote has long been under attack. We’ve seen the injustice of continued suppression of Black voices through methods like voter ID laws, partisan gerrymandering, purging voter rolls, and so on. And when you consider the fact that Maryland is one of the most diverse states in the country — where nearly 1 in 3 Marylanders are Black — we have a political, societal, and moral responsibility to not just make sure that we’re protecting the right to vote for all our citizens, but also continuing to remind all of our citizens what’s at stake and why their voice and their vote matters so much in these times. Everything is at stake. There is no single issue that will not be impacted by voting rights , because it’s voting rights and who is sitting in these seats that are going to help determine the policies — whether it’s housing, transportation, education, criminal justice reform — that shape each of our lives. In light of the nationwide efforts to roll back the right to vote, it’s crucial that our leaders in Washington defend and expand every American’s right to vote — and they can do so by passing voting rights legislation like the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Act and Freedom to Vote Act. Thanks for using your voice to call on our leaders to act. I can promise as your next governor, I’ll always stand up for Marylanders’ sacred right to vote. Elevate, Wes | Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650151/329745193/-1943795144?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzYTliZC1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0yafJAPaV_Nn2mQlaSKXKqjXXpri67xMgXLy5yX9xRI=&emci=cfb56103-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3103a9bd-bc8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643047)

| | Our representatives in Congress are there to represent us. They're not there to pad their own wallets. And yet, we see it again and again: They're trading on inside information, confidential (and even classified) briefings, which means that Members of Congress have far better investment returns than the general public. That's just wrong. **[Please sign my petition demanding a law to ban stock trading by Members of Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650152/329745194/-1130404821?source= 2022ConflictedTrading_AS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-02-stocktrading-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzYTliZC1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0yafJAPaV_Nn2mQlaSKXKqjXXpri67xMgXLy5yX9xRI=&emci=cfb56103-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3103a9bd-bc8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643047)** Remember this one? In 2020, just at the beginning of the pandemic, 75 lawmakers held stock in vaccine makers like Moderna, Johnson & Johnson, and Pfizer. Many trades were made while the world watched in uncertainty. Millions of dollars changed hands. **That's a conflict of interest. We should expect our leaders to work for us, not benefit from their positions.** I support tough laws that would bar members of Congress from holding or trading individual stocks. And the majority of Americans do, too. Let's get it done. **[Please sign my petition and urge Congress to take action immediately.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650153/329745195/-1130404821?source= 2022ConflictedTrading_AS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-02-stocktrading-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzYTliZC1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0yafJAPaV_Nn2mQlaSKXKqjXXpri67xMgXLy5yX9xRI=&emci=cfb56103-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3103a9bd-bc8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643047)** That's just wrong. = 2022ConflictedTradingAS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-02-stocktrading-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzYTliZC1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0yafJAPaVNn2mQlaSKXKqjXXpri67xMgXLy5yX9xRI=&emci=cfb56103-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3103a9bd-bc8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643047 Remember this one? In 2020, just at the beginning of the pandemic, 75 lawmakers held stock in vaccine makers like Moderna, Johnson & Johnson, and Pfizer. Many trades were made while the world watched in uncertainty. Millions of dollars changed hands. That's a conflict of interest. We should expect our leaders to work for us, not benefit from their positions. I support tough laws that would bar members of Congress from holding or trading individual stocks. And the majority of Americans do, too. Let's get it done. = 2022ConflictedTradingAS&referrer=group-andrea-salinas&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-andrea-salinas-pet-ty%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2022-02-stocktrading-email%26noskip%3Dtrue&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTAzYTliZC1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0yafJAPaVNn2mQlaSKXKqjXXpri67xMgXLy5yX9xRI=&emci=cfb56103-b28a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=3103a9bd-bc8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=5643047 Andrea Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon. ---|--- | This email was sent by Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 United States Email is an important way for Andrea Salinas to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. subject: Please Sign My Petition TODAY
