body:
| | |
---
| | ,

Arizona requires every statewide candidate to collect **over** **7,000 voter signatures** in order to appear on the ballot this election cycle. _We need to file these signatures_ _by April 4th!_

We can’t afford to send Mark Kelly back to Washington for another term. Under his Leftist regime, Arizona’s Southern border is wide open to cartels, the cost of living and inflation have skyrocketed, violent crime is on the rise, and narcotics are flowing across the border.

It’s time to send Kelly packing. Please forward this email to five like-minded friends and family members who care about defending freedom in Arizona and preserving prosperity for the next generation.
---
| | [SIGN MY PETITION HERE](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=012862132c&e=6dcd2506d1 "SIGN MY PETITION HERE")
---
| ICYMI: [I joined Mark Levin on his show](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=bed9d5a70c&e=6dcd2506d1) recently to discuss the ongoing border crisis. My office issued a legal statement that [Arizona has the right and responsibility to defend ourselves](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=f8960d0a6c&e=6dcd2506d1) against the invasion at our southern border. Also, we recently filed [a lawsuit against the Biden administration](https://brnoforaz.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f2832e79a2cd8992eddbf352a&id=3e1952fcae&e=6dcd2506d1) over his unilateral and unconstitutional federal minimum wage mandate.

I wanted to thank everyone who came out and supported me at the Maricopa County and State GOP Convention. We had a tremendous presence. Check out these photos of Team Brno:
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| Thank you for your support. I am confident we will declare victory this November and take Arizona’s true, conservative, independent values to the U.S. Senate.

For Arizona,
---
|
---
| Mark Brnovich

body:
Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7443ec170c474bcabf290f38b576d541&_e=3cKqw1ZJmxgkqlJXBOONrmePK_OCyzM8mxcOLA2L3isxtEskNyfURPXEZcxT_lHIX5ClEoWsGe03sUBgZRjEhKd5ni9qTqcmzVMdHAbkjlMLA26DemE17AIkm3-nirauXxhueqlJlej9GFZ_6_olr5A4lnOHvJp7EE-fxBR2y3RZLdb1JLoSYN6xn8oDDxRD5eXd-xvYbElQh6JxSgez5DeBzs_u11Wac1kU81KFzGbX34xKoZgUkStNqoHBEWqgqrzSpXBGEiBMQQp6bkuEdUVHOAcx8MVpjhRt3yD15N7kgETyjqXl14D6SQ4WgMPmPKec1lAoBsc2VcmsDMmtlqyrhdi9O0MmGIJo1UX4RF7C1oVn2F8oKFKe525xJqrZk_wzilLtRqyQUahgQqe3CaL02Hpr2yttkJdsgkudx6NSpyat7QycdrbZUfOrPFKQ)

Friend,

People used to travel to Los Angeles to see Hollywood stars, beautiful beaches and an exciting, growing city. But that was then, and this is now...

What changed? Los Angeles County elected District Attorney George Gascón in 2020 and he has spent every day in office endangering the very residents that elected him.

Gascón has embraced radical, pro-criminal, anti-law endorsement policies to fulfill his dangerous ideology. His policies have ratcheted down punishment to its bare minimum and significantly reduced the prosecution of crime. _And what’s been the result?_

**Murders, gang shootings, organized theft and crime rates have skyrocketed.**

Instead of cops, Gascón wants social workers to calm down a bank robber or rapist. Then, instead of prison, he wants the criminals to get therapy instead of a cell.

George Gascón is redesigning the entire criminal justice system to the benefit of criminals at the expense of victims of the crime and at the expense of every resident in Los Angeles County.

[**We are officially circulating the petition to recall Los Angeles District Attorney George Gascón, but we need your immediate help.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7443ec170c474bcabf290f38b576d541&_e=3cKqw1ZJmxgkqlJXBOONrmePK_OCyzM8mxcOLA2L3isxtEskNyfURPXEZcxT_lHIX5ClEoWsGe03sUBgZRjEhKd5ni9qTqcmzVMdHAbkjlMLA26DemE17AIkm3-nirauXxhueqlJlej9GFZ_6_olr5A4lnOHvJp7EE-fxBR2y3RZLdb1JLoSYN6xn8oDDxRD5eXd-xvYbElQh6JxSgez5DeBzs_u11Wac1kU81KFzGbeaqhPvzk-_V2JcW9A7gd7aU9c6NkFT90hig6t72teQwmExDWPTYFQ-zLC-gwtOIScH3-E35XHNUprXhMQTLYvI-YM9Iz5tJcPPJTwkhEzB52Px61e5P8cxmtnwxl13cyFs8Q2a2On454dycMSLMATKLvTpaEM6Ec1USYnR-ztmhkuyD7k_B4pc657gHRHZ4PRzjT01c_hDmhIbNUxEER6) **We need to gather the signature of over half a MILLION registered voters in Los Angeles County, which will be no easy feat.** [**A contribution of $10 from you right now will help us print and distribute 20 petitions today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7443ec170c474bcabf290f38b576d541&_e=3cKqw1ZJmxgkqlJXBOONrmePK_OCyzM8mxcOLA2L3isxtEskNyfURPXEZcxT_lHIX5ClEoWsGe03sUBgZRjEhKd5ni9qTqcmzVMdHAbkjlMLA26DemE17AIkm3-nirauXxhueqlJlej9GFZ_6_olr5A4lnOHvJp7EE-fxBR2y3RZLdb1JLoSYN6xn8oDDxRD5eXd-xvYbElQh6JxSgez5DeBzs_u11Wac1kU81KFzGap2BkT2wYe8uH1HDlm15mSHAWUnDpbSE16qNHkI5QtXsq31B8w3Nbz7pzOn5KwRkz4NinzDQEp6Q-KtUS2fqMKTZXOZYbHCHxYrWOUa5r-ix8fk005WijFUdVk863ujjkrY0aZjQveGz6k8Cy9n_bNBEfldUe30_lkVTO4XQQhIB8lI7WmrNiOj83WfVDV_4eEo89A9u_bNk-d8bIXKx47)

[**Your $10 will help us defeat pro-criminal DA Gascón and send a message to “progressive” District Attorneys across the nation:**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7443ec170c474bcabf290f38b576d541&_e=3cKqw1ZJmxgkqlJXBOONrmePK_OCyzM8mxcOLA2L3isxtEskNyfURPXEZcxT_lHIX5ClEoWsGe03sUBgZRjEhKd5ni9qTqcmzVMdHAbkjlMLA26DemE17AIkm3-nirauXxhueqlJlej9GFZ_6_olr5A4lnOHvJp7EE-fxBR2y3RZLdb1JLoSYN6xn8oDDxRD5eXd-xvYbElQh6JxSgez5DeBzs_u11Wac1kU81KFzGb2HoEoTzIXFdbqTjts7NfQXjh2CcIovQI0t4kUMBi9-nVbuATz16-xluhRSg0_6CrmLEA7WepX6zohN9-tGmGz5To-qkzpCYDEQJMO1A0GzyIv3aSKvtPQQ2w91SbGq-BbRIyYhQUtulFYt2qHgeLAAe9OhcAVo1pvSSqJqEF2DSVIAarneqqQpJF4kwRBdoMARd9uM7cABVkH4Cc5AI0_) **Our safety cannot be sacrificed in the pursuit of your radical agenda and our communities will not be destroyed by your political games.**

We won’t ask for your help or a contribution without giving you the facts, Friend. This is why we’re asking you to fight with us: **Gascón’s policies have created a system that places the needs of convicted criminals over those of victims.**

Upon taking office in December of 2020, Gascón implemented several special directives for his prosecutors in the county to follow...
* Do not pursue the death penalty
* Prevent youth offenders from being tried as adults
* Almost entirely restrict the use of sentencing enhancements in cases

**More than 90% of narcotics involved cases taken to the Gascón’s Office this year have been rejected.**

In the first six months of 2021, over 5,900 of the cases brought to the DA’s office by the Los Angeles Sheriff's Department were rejected as a result of Gascón’s special directives.

We cannot afford to wait another two years to get George Gascón out of office. **The damage he has caused is extreme and in another two years, the damage may be irreversible.**

This is a fight worth investing in, Friend. Because, whether you live in Los Angeles or not, Gascón’s policies are spreading across the nation and it’s only a matter of time until they reach your front door - [**unless, we RECALL GEORGE GASCON now.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7443ec170c474bcabf290f38b576d541&_e=3cKqw1ZJmxgkqlJXBOONrmePK_OCyzM8mxcOLA2L3isxtEskNyfURPXEZcxT_lHIX5ClEoWsGe03sUBgZRjEhKd5ni9qTqcmzVMdHAbkjlMLA26DemE17AIkm3-nirauXxhueqlJlej9GFZ_6_olr5A4lnOHvJp7EE-fxBR2y3RZLdb1JLoSYN6xn8oDDxRD5eXd-xvYbElQh6JxSgez5DeBzs_u11Wac1kU81KFzGYt-dXJEJWMN5q3fop-DEuwurGDDMu__riPfa_c0RX0JP1eycsGa0wQwzp7jDUm6oP0YcXuTmE9sJrDBUs29O-M2RkFMWE1abqnl_trgTyo0w1iQkrqsJLRWEXKZDzalxHW8LsXdTi8UnqO_uRNZ3rwgiwDNa5_Jda3T09kdq-31MfwHyCCIUxSdCgl9WnJiQr1zC_rxCMLPceoDXW7M_xI)

[**So please, pitch in anything you can spare - whether that’s $10 or $100 - to help us Recall Los Angeles District Attorney George Gascón today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7443ec170c474bcabf290f38b576d541&_e=3cKqw1ZJmxgkqlJXBOONrmePK_OCyzM8mxcOLA2L3isxtEskNyfURPXEZcxT_lHIX5ClEoWsGe03sUBgZRjEhKd5ni9qTqcmzVMdHAbkjlMLA26DemE17AIkm3-nirauXxhueqlJlej9GFZ_6_olr5A4lnOHvJp7EE-fxBR2y3RZLdb1JLoSYN6xn8oDDxRD5eXd-xvYbElQh6JxSgez5DeBzs_u11Wac1kU81KFzGYdYKmYguUA1lgv74Bh_VzhGv0IHiISoYyXnwkuORYftKSk7fmqpFFBXpnQuGym_fUNRF3-X6e0B3FK-jP-sAxbcFBVJS8zKZrIh7AK5e2gxfy34dN74TfGspyDNJS6Jnt1_kvGDAQXpEPD2giLf-4NeowLBOt8M4jpg9SAKzBIkZ6S7ldfWK_jDwmRO0hAZqCQKGbrNH0mYQGXa06JbHQk)

Thank you,
Greg Foster
Campaign Manager
Recall DA George Gascón Committee

[**HELP US RECALL GEORGE GASCON -> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7443ec170c474bcabf290f38b576d541&_e=3cKqw1ZJmxgkqlJXBOONrmePK_OCyzM8mxcOLA2L3isxtEskNyfURPXEZcxT_lHIX5ClEoWsGe03sUBgZRjEhKd5ni9qTqcmzVMdHAbkjlMLA26DemE17AIkm3-nirauXxhueqlJlej9GFZ_6_olr5A4lnOHvJp7EE-fxBR2y3RZLdb1JLoSYN6xn8oDDxRD5eXd-xvYbElQh6JxSgez5DeBzs_u11Wac1kU81KFzGbUdCGfXSoZ2fGs_EcZaAMhU_xqFfMoJ9DlGZi_WUdNZBo8QFMdMoS7MSXrEVvoswW_IpaTeNmwSvG1EB63JIxvHfw-21gGN6EvCZHgpMu0g7_GTpXfsqfN7rnjTCQoY-cPcYJtDKBBqbjKVjx-s_GhwiuiEhJmr6Zkywcs7A1_geX8fL_5rKIdO2MVtt5zFof1dihlx02-ufVu2xWcv6wK)

name: Jessica Mason
subject: Texans will start to vote in just 4 days. 📆
body:
I’m tired of the arrogant exclusiveness in Washington, folks. But time is running out.

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650449/329746432/-1288899752?refcode=220210_FR_elitisttweetvideo_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmNmYmZlOS1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GgoB_5y-rXG_dua3SUvIxUGYzpPoBX8EtlzhOc67c4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650450/329746433/-1334661423?refcode=220210_FR_elitisttweetvideo_IMG1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTM0OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZmNmYmZlOS1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GgoB_5y-rXG_dua3SUvIxUGYzpPoBX8EtlzhOc67c4=)
---
**I’m tired of the arrogant exclusiveness in Washington, folks.**

For far too long, politicians and corporations have been putting profit and wealth over the lives of us and the people in our communities. We must break the pattern of electing status quo elites who were raised in complete comfort and are out-of-touch with real Americans — _because they will never truly be fighting for us._

It’s time to elect leaders who won’t cave to corporate special interests for personal or political gain. Leaders who understand the difficult decisions working families have to make just to get by. And leaders who will do everything they can to fight for socioeconomic equity and justice.

I have not only lived and experienced the challenges of the people in Texas-30, but I’ve dedicated my career advocating for those most in need -- from growing up poor in South Dallas to my time in the Navy to my work in affordable housing. I’m running for Congress as a true progressive, championing bold action like a Green New Deal, Medicare For All, student debt cancellation, and so much more. **And unlike some of my opponents, I refuse to accept a dime of corporate special interest money.**

**_The only way we’re going to achieve progress is by being brave enough to demand better and by electing representatives who reflect our people-first values — because that is what we deserve, nothing less._**

**[There are literally 4 days left until early voters make their final decisions and cast their ballots. We cannot leave a single voter behind and let key opportunities slip away — or it could cost us this entire race. clean_body: I’m tired of the arrogant exclusiveness in Washington, folks. But time is running out. | | | = = I’m tired of the arrogant exclusiveness in Washington, folks. For far too long, politicians and corporations have been putting profit and wealth over the lives of us and the people in our communities. We must break the pattern of electing status quo elites who were raised in complete comfort and are out-of-touch with real Americans — because they will never truly be fighting for us. It’s time to elect leaders who won’t cave to corporate special interests for personal or political gain. Leaders who understand the difficult decisions working families have to make just to get by. And leaders who will do everything they can to fight for socioeconomic equity and justice. I have not only lived and experienced the challenges of the people in Texas-30, but I’ve dedicated my career advocating for those most in need -- from growing up poor in South Dallas to my time in the Navy to my work in affordable housing. I’m running for Congress as a true progressive, championing bold action like a Green New Deal, Medicare For All, student debt cancellation, and so much more. And unlike some of my opponents, I refuse to accept a dime of corporate special interest money. The only way we’re going to achieve progress is by being brave enough to demand better and by electing representatives who reflect our people-first values — because that is what we deserve, nothing less. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **********=******** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** | **********=********** ******** ******** | | **********=********** = Your support means everything to me. name: Nan Whaley
subject: Mike DeWine’s fundraising numbers are in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
We’ve known all along that we would be up against some deep pockets.

Team,
Last week, we broke some incredible news: **We’ve raised over $3 million, the largest amount ever raised at this point by any Democratic gubernatorial challenger in Ohio history.**
Today, I’ve got some less-than-ideal news: **Right now, Mike DeWine has more money to spend than we do – money he can spend on tearing our movement down.**
It’s not surprising. We’ve known all along that we would be up against some deep pockets, and that this would be a tough fight.
But I’ve never been afraid of a challenge – not as mayor of Dayton, and certainly not in this race.
**[I know we can take on the Republican money machine, but not without you. Please, if you can, pitch in $5 right now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650616/329746912/1500313133?refcode=nw_em_220210_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDQ4ZGVmZi1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tw8quYh7ErFMUqXnkecBcUVBZzWo9HJ1exElGG1yi6w=)**
We’re building an extraordinary movement together, but we’re facing some major opponents – Mike DeWine’s corrupt cronies and corporate backers are right there, ready to bankroll his campaign.
We don’t have his dark money backing, but we have something far better: A grassroots campaign ready to elect new leadership for Ohio. If we carry out our plan, we can win this race. But if we fall short? Four more years of failed leadership.
**[We’re up against some serious opponents – but together, I know we can fight back and build a better future for Ohio. If you’re in, rush $5 now to support our movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650619/329746915/1500313133?refcode=nw_em_220210_1_t2_b&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDQ4ZGVmZi1iYzhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tw8quYh7ErFMUqXnkecBcUVBZzWo9HJ1exElGG1yi6w=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: re: telehealth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650667/329747131/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220210_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE5NDI0OC1iZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lq0WvKlA8uZG68HOueINhWK8CTEog5Zi-O8qWw_Pndw=&emci=b0a94248-bd8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bda94248-bd8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)
---
Folks in **more than 80% of counties across our country** don’t have access to the quality healthcare services they need. The lack of access to quality care has always concerned me. That’s why I’ve fought for years to make sure more New Mexicans, especially those in rural areas, have access to telehealth. The pandemic brought on even more barriers to care, so I helped pass COVID-19 legislation to expand access to telehealth services for Medicare beneficiaries during the pandemic. Telehealth helps broaden access to care, cuts down healthcare costs, and achieves better patient outcomes. **It’s been instrumental to providing quality care while keeping medical providers safe.** The next step is making the telehealth expansion permanent to ensure Medicare beneficiaries don’t see a sudden halt in telehealth services, and that a wider variety of healthcare providers can offer telehealth services. [**I hope you’ll join me in supporting permanent expansion of telehealth services. Add your name below:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650668/329747132/1275308983?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220210_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE5NDI0OC1iZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lq0WvKlA8uZG68HOueINhWK8CTEog5Zi-O8qWw_Pndw=&emci=b0a94248-bd8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bda94248-bd8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41650669/329747133/1275308983?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220210_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZGE5NDI0OC1iZDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lq0WvKlA8uZG68HOueINhWK8CTEog5Zi-O8qWw_Pndw=&emci=b0a94248-bd8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=bda94248-bd8a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

name: VOTER SUPPRESSION ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: RE: SCOTUS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you CONDEMN the far-right Supreme Court justices' decision? | | | **_BREAKING: _
The Supreme Court Just Blew Up the Voting Rights Act's Ban on Racial Gerrymandering**

---
| ** We're OUTRAGED. **

The Supreme Court just ruled in favor of the GOP's racially gerrymandered Congressional maps in Alabama.

Now, they've set a precedent that could allow Republicans across the country to SILENCE the voices of voters of color at the polls.

At this dire moment for our democracy, we need to know:

**Do you CONDEMN the far-right Supreme Court justices who just voted to seriously undermine voting rights nationwide?**
****
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hvv~)
---|---|---

We can't believe what we're seeing.

After the Supreme Court **GUTTED** the Voting Rights Act in 2013, President Obama warned us that our democracy was under attack nationwide:

[](https://links.e.dccc.)

But since then, Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have packed the Court with **THREE MORE** ultra-conservative judges...

...Paving the way for their GUT-WRENCHING decision just now to APPROVE Alabama's racist, outrageously gerrymandered Congressional map.

**Please understand:** This is a direct attempt to silence the voices of voters of color in Alabama.

With so much on the line in 2022, we can't allow this attack on voting rights to go unanswered.

**[So please, let us know: Do you CONDEMN the far-right Supreme Court justices who just voted to APPROVE Alabama's racist Congressional maps and GUT the Voting Rights Act?](https://links.e.dccc.)** | [YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/We_6hvv~)
---|---|---
****
Thanks,

DCCC

name: Rand Paul
subject: dirty secret about masks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wea
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi7ge6no4e26d03fbnqtfpb155ef5f8acrh0ar38_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s5nc8q7ccb56dor1cb5e3gb2d76c9i36cb4mlqj6t9h6qo6ep72ejim2cpic6rjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup38phhmapm0o3ietj38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf6ercrri43isli8fnaek5728o0otmv38qta23g0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs) | |
---
Friend, aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense?

We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wear masks on federal property. Children must wear masks in the classroom. With no scientific support for it.

That’s what I had a chance to discuss with Fox News recently.
__
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc6thjdocnpl7k46v5q2e9o4u22hpkbidfggbvog_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4c6aq7o9gb2fhoo7turolmf4lmm8bd4rhb8t10g_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs)
Here's the dirty little secret about masks... It's got nothing to do with public heath.

**It’s ALL about submission.****_It's always been more about collectivism. It's been about growing government power over your lives._**

That's never been more clear than now, as these lawless bureaucrats continue with their mask requirements and shaming of the unmasked - despite the fact that the science has been clearly anti-mask for a long time.

**But it's time to draw the line.**

We can't continue to submit forever. We can't let our children be punished for personal health decisions. I'm taking a stand already and I've introduced legislation that will get rid of the federal mandate for masks on planes.

Enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zg74lmokeah8i2hk0trf7g76i14jvfa5g7tlevng_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $75**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsoelpvkotqcs109o2562bq3k81rjqhi4qnrhmv0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z766tua8b1djs9j2jp9k31h4d6ra40fko43l0bf0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z1og1404krpblpa7td446unrr9qlbp22lauvm060_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs)
For too long we’ve heard that this madness is TEMPORARY._We’re told to give up our freedom. Just wear the mask. Just be quiet. It’s only 2 weeks._

Well, it’s been 2 years. And they’ll never give up this game unless WE make them.

**We must stand strong on the side of science, reject needless masks, reject government overreach, and defend our freedom.**

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqvosgual9l7u819a9rfrs1b5r6ajerdhltaln28_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj60pr7c1h2bs)

Thank you, friend.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__
|

|

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Chief=20Bell?=
subject: Joe Biden, Crack Pipes, & Black Folks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAROME BELL FOR CONGRESS
body:
Sleepy Joe is a DISGRACE. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaromebellforcongress/youngkinwonthisseat-4657342?e=af4b86f5c6)
---
| |
---
| | Peter, Have you heard that Joe Biden and the Democrats are planning to distribute crack pipes in urban areas to promote “racial equity”?

The Left is doing all they can to keep Black Americans in chains!

The Democrats hate Black Americans like myself that have walked away from their corrupt party. I am pro-life, pro-second amendment, anti-critical race theory, and running for Congress to _**ACTUALLY**_ put Black Americans _**FIRST**_!

Help me get to Congress so I can encourage ALL Black Americans to walk away from the Democrats!
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=81d2c63839&e=af4b86f5c6)
I’m running for Congress so I can lead a fight against the Democrats so we can make America what it is supposed to be.

For years, Democrats have been the party of handouts, but Black people deserve much more than crack pipes. We, and all of America, deserve a good economy, safe borders, and the right to bear arms.

Join me in my fight to wake up Black Americans nationwide. It is time to abandon the Democrat party and embrace what is best for us and our families!

[By donating $10, $25, $50 or $100, I can win my congressional race and fight for policies that will better America](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=213c59670a&e=af4b86f5c6)!

_**We need FEWER crack pipes in this country, not more**_.

[If you agree, support my campaign](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=0c336bc492&e=af4b86f5c6)!

Support my campaign so we can finally stand up and make our public schools pro-America, make our sports leagues pro-America and strengthen our military’s leadership.

Thank you for your support,
**Jarome Bell
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=2c2b6941f6&e=af4b86f5c6)

Chief Petty Officer, Ret'd.
Republican Candidate for Congress

P.S.**: The Democrats think passing out crack pipes to Black people will keep us voting blue. The time is now to abandon the Democrat party and start fighting for stronger Black families, a stronger economy and stronger country!

[Join my campaign](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=555398681b&e=af4b86f5c6) to tell the Democrats that Black Americans are DONE being held down by their chains!

Please [donate](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=ba28857be0&e=af4b86f5c6) to help us flip this house!
[](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=46b2544ea6&e=af4b86f5c6)

---

name: Team Van Hollen
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VAN HOLLEN FOR SENATE
body:
Let’s say McConnell’s candidate Larry Hogan runs for Senate. This immediately becomes a race to protect the Senate majority, and we’ll need to be ready on day one.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41640011/329698399/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=8053c4fd-948a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&contactdata=pSEtJlrHQ8T2gYPZYPRUmDYqiXSSrorg2PvFSFyPKrW5tsbYhmy2/Hvu5zDTlmcF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MDUzYzRmZC05NDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f7JxnnutvNg8kq0Y6wcsE3M6SiK7w9_P52aVFuvMJ_M=)
$3.
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to Chris Van Hollen’s re-election campaign today.
Why?
Mitch McConnell may have failed to recruit his top choice candidate, Larry Hogan, but we still have a race ahead of us. And with the candidate filing deadline still 12 days away, he isn’t going to give up trying to find a big money challenger to enter this race. If he does, we’ll need to be ready on day one.
Let’s say Mitch can’t do it. Then Senator Van Hollen – as the person at the top of the ticket – can use that donation to run a vigorous statewide campaign to bring out a Blue Wave to elect Maryland Democrats. And as he has done in the past as the Chairman of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee he can work to defend the Senate majority and help colleagues in close U.S. Senate races.
Win-win.
It’s one of the best $3 donations you can make today. So what do you say?
**[Can you please make a $3 contribution to Chris Van Hollen’s re-election campaign today? That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to Chris Van Hollen’s re-election campaign today. Why? Mitch McConnell may have failed to recruit his top choice candidate, Larry Hogan, but we still have a race ahead of us. And with the candidate filing deadline still 12 days away, he isn’t going to give up trying to find a big money challenger to enter this race. If he does, we’ll need to be ready on day one. Let’s say Mitch can’t do it. Then Senator Van Hollen – as the person at the top of the ticket – can use that donation to run a vigorous statewide campaign to bring out a Blue Wave to elect Maryland Democrats. And as he has done in the past as the Chairman of the Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee he can work to defend the Senate majority and help colleagues in close U.S. Senate races. Win-win. It’s one of the best $3 donations you can make today. So what do you say? = Nothing less than control of the Senate, and any chance at progress is at stake in this race. = Thank you for chipping in. granted.

This is a wide-open race, and we have a ton of hard work
ahead to win the primary, take the fight to the Democrat campaign
machine, and put this seat in the Republican column.

Today, I’m asking
for your help to keep up our momentum.

Breaking news: **Donald Trump just endorsed Loren Culp, the most extreme of my right-wing GOP opponents in Washington’s 4th Congressional District.**

I’m running for Congress to take on extremist Republicans like Loren Culp, stand up for Central Washington, and fight for a better future for all of us. I’m ready to help our communities thrive as a strong advocate in the halls of Congress — but that means we’ll have to go toe-to-toe with our GOP opponents.

[Will you help us fight back against Donald Trump and Loren Culp? Rush a donation of any amount to help us flip this seat from red to blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41651350/329749908/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_WL_220210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZiYTNlYi1iZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gu0XBHEMqotBlk0Fezg2fl6Awfab4MX8ug3oNC6kAuM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41651352/329749910/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_WL_220210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZiYTNlYi1iZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gu0XBHEMqotBlk0Fezg2fl6Awfab4MX8ug3oNC6kAuM=) You may remember Loren Culp as the Republican gubernatorial nominee in 2020. He spent his campaign railing against mask mandates and efforts to protect our communities from COVID-19. And after he lost, he joined Trump in promoting the Big Lie, lobbing baseless claims of widespread voter fraud. Yesterday, before the Trump endorsement he sent a message to his supporters about the “Chinese virus.”

**Loren Culp’s dangerous political views are why he was endorsed by Donald Trump — and exactly why we can’t let him get any further.**

[I’m running a grassroots campaign to take on Republicans like Loren Culp and stand up for our priorities in Congress — but I can’t do this without you. Will you rush a donation right now to support my campaign and help defeat Culp?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41651354/329749912/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_WL_220210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZiYTNlYi1iZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gu0XBHEMqotBlk0Fezg2fl6Awfab4MX8ug3oNC6kAuM=) [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41651356/329749914/1604843237?amount=25&refcode=DW_EM_FR_WL_220210_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmZiYTNlYi1iZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gu0XBHEMqotBlk0Fezg2fl6Awfab4MX8ug3oNC6kAuM=) We can’t let up — not for a second. We have to keep fighting for the kind of future that Central Washingtonians deserve.

Thanks for being a part of this.

— Doug

clean_body: Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | ---|---|--- | | | | | ---|---|--- Statements by Donald J. Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump February 10th, 2022 Following collaborative and respectful discussions, the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) openly and willingly arranged with President Trump for the transport of boxes that contained letters, records, newspapers, magazines, and various articles. Some of this information will someday be displayed in the Donald J. Trump Presidential Library for the public to view my Administration’s incredible accomplishments for the American People. The media’s characterization of my relationship with NARA is Fake News. It was exactly the opposite! It was a great honor to work with NARA to help formally preserve the Trump Legacy. The papers were given easily and without conflict and on a very friendly basis, which is different from the accounts being drawn up by the Fake News Media. In fact, it was viewed as routine and "no big deal." In actuality, I have been told I was under no obligation to give this material based on various legal rulings that have been made over the years. Crooked Hillary Clinton, as an example, deleted and acid washed 32,000 emails and never gave that to the government. Then, they took large amounts of furniture out of the White House. And Bill Clinton kept numerous audio recordings that the archives wanted, but were unsuccessful at getting after going to court. We won't even mention what is going on with the White House in the current, or various past administrations. Also, another fake story, that I flushed papers and documents down a White House toilet, is categorically untrue and simply made up by a reporter in order to get publicity for a mostly fictitious book. The Democrats are just using this and the Unselect Committee of political hacks as a camoflauge for how horribly our Country is doing under the Biden Administration. In the United States there has unfortunately become two legal standards, one for Republicans and one for Democrats. It should not be that way! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 For the Old Crow Mitch McConnell to say that the RNC should not censure walking Democrat sound bites, Liz Cheney and Cryin’ Adam Kinzinger, is so against what Republicans are about. It’s not as bad as the two-month extension he gave the Democrats when they were ready to fold, but the censure of Cheney and Kinzinger is a good and very appropriate thing to do as it pertains to our great Republican Party! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 Endorsement of Congressman Warren Davidson Congressman Warren Davidson is a real fighter for the great people of Ohio. A tremendous advocate of our America First agenda, Warren is a former Army Ranger who is fighting hard to save America. Warren is all about action, not just words, pushing Republicans to: defend freedom, America first economy and security, smaller government, sound money. He supports Secure Borders, our Second Amendment, our Military and our Vets, and Law Enforcement. He has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 Endorsement of Loren Culp Loren Culp is running against RINO Congressman Dan Newhouse in Washington’s 4th District. Newhouse joined the Radical Left Democrats to vote for the Impeachment Hoax, angering his constituents and causing the Republican Party of Washington to totally rebuke him. Loren Culp has protected the great people of Central Washington for years as a highly respected Police Chief. A man of the people, Loren will always defend your personal liberty, our under-siege Second Amendment, Election Integrity, and Law Enforcement. Unlike Dan Newhouse, who is absolutely terrible, Loren will never turn his back on Central Washington, or our Country. Loren Culp has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 Endorsement of Katie Arrington Katie Arrington is running against an absolutely terrible candidate, Congresswoman Nancy Mace, whose remarks and attitude have been devastating for her community, and not at all representative of the Republican Party to which she has been very disloyal. Katie Arrington, on the other hand, is liked and respected and a true Republican. Her automobile accident a number of years ago was devastating, and made it very difficult for her to campaign after having won the primary against another terrible candidate, “Mr. Argentina.” Katie is strong on the Military, our great Vets, Law Enforcement, the Border, and will fight very hard for our under-siege Second Amendment and Lower Taxes. Katie is a wonderful woman and has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 Endorsement of Congressman Morgan Griffith Congressman Morgan Griffith is doing a fantastic job representing the people of Virginia’s 9th Congressional District. Morgan is working hard to Grow our Economy and Create Jobs, Champion American Energy Independence, Secure our Border, Support our Military and Vets, Protect and Defend our Second Amendment, and Hold the Biden Administration accountable for their colossal incompetence. Morgan has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 Congressman John Moolenaar is a terrific representative of the people of Michigan in the United States Congress. He is working hard to Lower Health Care Costs, Champion our Farmers and Agriculture, Grow our Economy, Secure our Border, Support our Military and Vets, Defend Life, and Protect our Second Amendment. John Moolenaar has my Complete and Total Endorsement! | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 Read the full article by Ben Feuerherd with the New York Post . | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 9th, 2022 Very much appreciated—but there would have been no January 6 had Nancy Pelosi, as strongly recommended by me, sent in Soldiers or the National Guard days before the event took place. She is in charge of Capitol Security—not the President. The Unselect Committee would have been able to work on another Hoax, Scam, or Witch Hunt had Nancy done her job. The Capitol would have been secure! Read the full article by Bradley Jones . | ---|--- Donald J. name: =?UTF-8?Q?=F0=9F=93=8E_petition_attached_=28Left_Action=29?=
subject: this should be illegal
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign the petition: Ban members of Congress from owning or trading stock >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8533ac53-38c9-480d-afab-e8ad27bbdfef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T611d528a-0523-4a94-a1fa-5bfc292ce327/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Insider trading is illegal – yet some members of Congress buy and sell stock using highly relevant information that everyday Americans don’t have access to. At the beginning of the COVID-19 pandemic, several members of Congress bought and sold stock based on what they learned in closed-door briefings. **They were able to profit from insider knowledge. ** This is not just an unfair advantage, it’s a blatant conflict of interest. Congress can use information to benefit themselves and can make legislative decisions based on their potential profits. We deserve transparency from our representatives. It should be illegal for members of Congress to own and trade stock while they have access to private information. We need to turn up the pressure and hold Congress accountable. [Sign the petition: Ban members of Congress from owning or trading stock >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1387b9c5-98f0-4ca2-88e4-90c628d37d3d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

subject: We need Mo Brooks in the Senate

body:
I’m reaching out today to talk to you about my friend and my top pick for the Alabama Senate seat, Mo Brooks. If we take back
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zdg5ei9vsfncka6uqt54bfj7kc2929ju05umoh5o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkpqj3cpiekor9d1jmoqjcd9jm5p78cdjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboneohimmor9pti66qr1dr3m6oe4d74eqq32d74mirbac77cip62pdnmgqrdcpgsv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjbd1geap6cd74mdhmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5gmapj2c9i66oh5u)
Friend, I’m reaching out today to talk to you about my friend and my top pick for the Alabama Senate seat, Mo Brooks. If we take back the Senate, we’ll be able to flip the balance of power and stop Biden’s radical agenda. We need to elect strong conservative fighters in November who will fight for a free-market, conservative agenda. N _o one is a stronger fighter than Mo Brooks and that’s why I’m proud to endorse him to be Alabama’s next Senator!_
_Friend – can I count on you to join me in supporting Mo?_**[_I’ve been able to count on you every step of the way, so can I ask you once more to chip in $5, $10, $25, $50, whatever you can spare to help Mo win in Alabama?_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqvtp6fk5od1glit22a8s9vrnts8q7cdombu26o8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs)** [**Donate $25 >> Support Mo Brooks!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z10aes5b9ppa78b2gu5fiduscbd7kmee02lrmtb8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) [**Donate $50 >> Support Mo Brooks!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z37f18lplo00f4sb6r2a0i2bbluduc06qenucgdg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) [**Donate $75 >> Support Mo Brooks!**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zpv39pe79eu4jejioofc6e565te7hfaqmuju9n58_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) Mo has been a relentless advocate for liberty and economic common sense in Congress. That’s exactly what we need in the Senate right now to defeat Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. **I know that with Mo in the Senate we can put an end to the far-left’s ridiculous agenda.**
**[_Please consider chipping in $10, $25, $50, or any amount you can spare to support Mo Brooks’ campaign today._](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z9smbohgsubc0pad0aqeftfiu62subfjs5lb09ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs)** [**Donate to Mo Brooks’ election fund**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zsl19eedfuh8aeolvbvobepemgsc2ufvhu9nl8tg_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) [**CHIP IN $100**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z59g5q14fijs42kuo6gnofq76pqjtqiu5fbpdqm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) [**CHIP IN $50**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7vmoj08e0m9atk4o7h6ccog5fgho622veufmj48_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) [**CHIP IN $25**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7gvku3s8r91mg2m0lc3likm7to55b5u04mfm6co_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) [**CHIP IN $10**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4h5pis65dhmg6t5blrqj44ctkr62akhbefl3uno_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) [**CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zcijk0m341l2n7kuua6koa5t5gpn3fu4edtnpjqo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj64oj4cdh2bs) I hope Mo and I can count on your support. name: Conservative Alerts
subject: Did you know this??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
Gas prices have increased SIX straight weeks!
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Ffebruary-2022-general-donation/1/0100017ee4b882a6-e27914ad-2b7f-4f29-9741-ed7b80405a26-000000/MtUwLFHgi6XuTmuZcnfi8a70W2s=257)
Dear Friend,
Are you feeling the strain of filling up your gas tank?? Trust us it is not just you! Gas prices have increased for the past six weeks in a row. **And there is no end in sight.**
In the last **THIRTY** days the average price of gas has increased 12.3 cents bringing the national average to $3.42 which is 97.5 cents higher THAN one year ago today.
We are a a **SEVEN** year high!
We are hearing **CRICKETS** from the Democratic administration from the top down on the plan to combat the detrimental effects on record high gas prices is having on folks across the country trying to get to work.
Trust us New Hampshire Republicans care. And with your help the NHGOP will continue to recruit, train, and support candidates who will care about the issues that affect each and every one of YOU!
We care about Granite Staters. Do you? Chip in today to help us do the necessary work to elect candidates who will fight for you!
_[**Will you contribute $10, $22, $50, $75, $100, or even more right now! **](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Ffebruary-2022-general-donation/2/0100017ee4b882a6-e27914ad-2b7f-4f29-9741-ed7b80405a26-000000/Yi1uHLMlGjOCJ7r1MjBnzIyUn7I=257)_

clean_body: Gas prices have increased SIX straight weeks! Dear Friend, Are you feeling the strain of filling up your gas tank?? Trust us it is not just you! Gas prices have increased for the past six weeks in a row. And there is no end in sight. In the last THIRTY days the average price of gas has increased 12.3 cents bringing the national average to $3.42 which is 97.5 cents higher THAN one year ago today. We are a a SEVEN year high! We are hearing CRICKETS from the Democratic administration from the top down on the plan to combat the detrimental effects on record high gas prices is having on folks across the country trying to get to work. Trust us New Hampshire Republicans care. And with your help the NHGOP will continue to recruit, train, and support candidates who will care about the issues that affect each and every one of YOU! We care about Granite Staters. Do you? Chip in today to help us do the necessary work to elect candidates who will fight for you! | "Donate $10" "Donate $50" "Donate $250" | "Donate $22" "Donate $100" "Donate Any Amount" Thank you for your continued support! \- NHGOP Team Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee. Dear Friend,

With costs rising, it's even more difficult for families to afford to pay their mortgages, and just to make ends meet.
It's unbelievable that with all of this going on there are actually people running for governor proposing billions of dollars in tax hikes and new government spending.

_Our next governor must continue to fight to make our state more affordable by standing up to tax increases and pushing for tax cuts for every Maryland family._
**I know what it's like to be a mom on a budget.** And as your governor, I promise to do everything I can to make Maryland more affordable for you and your family.
Thank you,

clean_body: | | | | I know what it's like to be a mom on a budget. Dear Friend, With costs rising, it's even more difficult for families to afford to pay their mortgages, and just to make ends meet. It's unbelievable that with all of this going on there are actually people running for governor proposing billions of dollars in tax hikes and new government spending. Our next governor must continue to fight to make our state more affordable by standing up to tax increases and pushing for tax cuts for every Maryland family. I know what it's like to be a mom on a budget. And as your governor, I promise to do everything I can to make Maryland more affordable for you and your family. Thank you, | | Follow Us! | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | instagram.com/kellymschulz "Instagram" ---|---|--- Kelly Schulz P.O. Box 6528, Annapolis, MD 21401 Authority: Kelly Schulz for Governor, Inc. Treasurer: Sam Malhotra

body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP01/1/61645/images/VE_Logo_Web.png]
Folks, the economic numbers for President Biden's first year in office are HUGE.

The economy grew 5.7% last year, the most since 1984. For the first time in two decades, American economic growth outpaced China's.

That's not all. 6.4 million Americans went back to work in 2021. That's more new jobs than Donald Trump created in the first three years of his presidency combined.

This data shows what economists have said. The American Rescue Plan helped hard-working Americans rebound from the pandemic. We're building back better.

That's why Veronica is fighting to make sure we pass the Build Back Better Act and continue rebuilding our country from the bottom up. Our nation is stronger when every family can afford healthcare, housing, food, and childcare.

Thank you for always having Veronica's back, friend. We couldn't do this without you.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Deja=20Alvarez?=
subject: What is Going on with Washington Avenue?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=5d820b57f8&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| Before responding to the valid concerns of everyone involved and effected by the Washington Avenue project, I wanted to take the time to review the project blueprints and to speak with residents, bicycle safety advocates, city officials, and business owners to get their perspectives on the project before forming an opinion or making a statement.

Working towards a collective solution is how I have always approached my work in public health and community organizing.

If you have ever driven our streets, you know how deep our potholes go and how dangerous our roads become for cyclists and pedestrians maneuvering, especially on streets such as Washington Ave. We have public schools, supermarkets, auto body shops, stores, freight drop-off zones and a 700-unit building being built at a major intersection. How can the city not want to implement the “safest” plan?

What I learned is that everyone has a very different perspective on what transpired.

Some folks believe public opinion was overruled by last-minute political or business concerns. Some have said that initial outreach fell short of communities of color, leading OTIS to continue their outreach efforts to be more just and equitable before moving forward. Others are happy with the final plan as a compromise that still allows for crucial updates for public safety, pedestrians, and bikers to be made including protected bike lanes, shorter pedestrian crossings, and reduced vehicle traffic.

OTIS made several mistakes along the way that led to feelings of distrust, discord, and a breakdown in communication. Without trust and communication, how do we provide a solution that will meet the need to provide safety for our pedestrians, cyclists, and motorists while also allowing businesses to flourish? OTIS must accept responsibility and be transparent about the mistakes made in the process. We all have a stake in the crucial restructuring of our roads, and we need to reopen the lines of communication so we can continue moving forward on our path to becoming a safe, just, and equitable city for all.
**[Help me Get a Seat at the Table to Bring
Collective Solutions to Harrisburg ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=13f053cb21&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**
---
| | | _Looking forward to seeing you all at our[February fundraiser at the Fitler Club](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=59f61feb6a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)! Thank you all so much for your continued support of our historic campaign._
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=afbc306c8c&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
**Help Get My Name on the Ballot**
We need to collect hundreds of petition signatures in the 182nd District in order to get my name on the ballot – and we need your help!

[Sign up today](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=4374a631f6&e=3f8e2ea1e3) for a quick tutorial on signature collection - even a couple of hours of your time would go such a long way in helping us in our movement for historic representation!
**[Petition Training for Deja for PA Historic Campaign!](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=b632b1b2aa&e=3f8e2ea1e3)**
---
|
**Wear a Piece of History!** Check out our [Swag Shop](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=6a79abdbd8&e=3f8e2ea1e3) where your donations will get you stickers, buttons, T-shirts, and masks to show your support of our historic campaign!
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=ae77a4501b&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
|
### [Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=d23726861f&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=c7a66316a9&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

subject: POLL: Sinema approval higher among Republicans than Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
It's official. But not surprising. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSefEuosMlyzL6pkt-qavlTwJ8nHUvvlhxaeG_13GqAfBvRXqT4M4ILlly9ZMn5BV-Q789CW4c4qMETydtVtP4lbq3E-MV35dY3J6gCS8GioMzLkUczrz8K2P9a9xzLK0JsyIQUtE9iSTHMte7MGg2aZWliyzY5pzALD86kVPWdyJivGJn6IZY1cK4JXPne6_PVCiTElpJqSfOwG_9W5O8vsEegdqIdWWYFNAEfLhYDbWIkib60RkHQEGxr4XKRdI1QRMC45MPjhC_TpqoVqgV0rz2PjkeNxQc4u1jY2XsENYfDnFXkjR1OAbcbq0gBJdoT/3jg/ZwvIoZp1Qaua3aW6PdjskA/h0/IlaIOOrTBNCFfHX-YXl4JxamvH6KFLqX6FJHCYKqguQ)
Peter, A recent poll from a Phoenix-based, nonpartisan pollster showed that **Kyrsten Sinema is seen more favorably by Republicans than by Democrats in Arizona.** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wsEvCNw9RRN8fJ6P2o2MeSRyhYKu_jwMOagxUNaamry3lnFKGwyoC6urgfeSxE2whlWCX-mmLMsdpSH2tW58zo-luNobIjsBIbIjv-QeaajOJ1F_Fw39keBIJkO509AswHAAk-qjULAss82hT3f-UOmIxC1zZCbAuYxsPiQeNd64wolpqCZjxLVchzFRV01owbU5X_br4BNcKA64GJqZivtqs3AanByxl8UwBfTyDi8poGQ_S2_zOvnNXtrinYttrt3qscLf6kJP6_cF95NBNXfVpVD97KikTrdVAS0iNdB_5XrPH0EZvFFJtsVOun_P03JfdTntGRgwKkyVxrXxhJmXsMNyA5RDVGnjTgKdlXIUiRTpPIzI1kIx2tbz20TtWZYwu3DxaVf3NsNqvUG2a1RG6KhMh3nY7yP-2vXyyaDw/3jg/ZwvIoZp1Qaua3aW6PdjskA/h1/IUDu0laVd9ZrdNddtnXTwkXwGb4HnOO80AxNxQ7kWXU) These results are no surprise when you think about Sinema's track record in the Senate. She continues to block key priorities of the Biden administration and refuses to help pass democracy-saving legislation, like voting rights. She lines her pockets with _hefty_ campaign contributions from Republicans — including contributions from at least 6 billionaires who previously donated to Trump, according to an analysis of Federal Election Commission records. clean_body: It's official. But not surprising. | | | Peter, A recent poll from a Phoenix-based, nonpartisan pollster showed that Kyrsten Sinema is seen more favorably by Republicans than by Democrats in Arizona. These results are no surprise when you think about Sinema's track record in the Senate. She continues to block key priorities of the Biden administration and refuses to help pass democracy-saving legislation, like voting rights. She lines her pockets with hefty campaign contributions from Republicans — including contributions from at least 6 billionaires who previously donated to Trump, according to an analysis of Federal Election Commission records. She refuses to meet with constituents but has plenty of time for the Republican billionaires and corporations who finance her political career. Arizonans have been more than patient with Kyrsten Sinema. And frankly, Peter, we're sick and tired of waiting for better, more representative leadership. — Primary Sinema | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hey Peter,
When Dr. Martin visited all 95 counties in Tennessee last fall, one issue kept coming up again and again: **Education.**
Bill Lee’s utter lack of urgency to improve our public education system, even after the pandemic set our students back even further, is appalling. Though he proposed some increases in education spending in his State of the State address last week, those investments are _paltry_ when weighed against the rest of the $52 billion budget, and far, far below what experts and advocates have called for for years.
**It’s time to elect a leader who will take seriously the needs of teachers and students, and who understands that, from cradle to career, we can thrive with improved education for all.**
[**Will you chip in today to help us take back the governorship and elect a leader who will follow through and work for ALL of us?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41641320/329704037/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220210education_TM_op_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzQxOGRmOC05YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A1IjxtelIcAIoww0witZBXSIBVgqulx3kY-QrdMggos=)

Though the pandemic exposed serious flaws in Tennessee's public education system, the truth is that those flaws have been present for a long, long time. According to a September poll, 79% of Tennesseans are worried that schoolchildren fell far behind on math and reading during the COVID-19 pandemic. And the data backs that up, too:_less than 30% of Tennessee students tested on grade-level in English and math in the spring of 2021._
That’s why education is at the center of Dr. Martin’s campaign, and why it will be a priority of this administration when we win. Here are just a few policies we can implement to improve public education for all Tennesseeans:
* Increase funding to address inequities and lift up schools in disadvantaged communities
* Expand voluntary pre-K programs to get our kids on the right track as early as possible; supplement by investing in early literacy programs
* Provide more counselors and nurses in our schools to address absenteeism and our students’ mental health
* Attract and retain the most talented educators by substantially raising teacher salaries, which still lag near the bottom of all states

**Most Tennesseans agree that we need meaningful education reform, and that has to start at the top. [If you’re on board, chip in today to keep fueling this grassroots campaign, so that we can deliver real change from the governorship.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41641330/329704048/1963061330?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220210education_TM_op_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMzQxOGRmOC05YThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A1IjxtelIcAIoww0witZBXSIBVgqulx3kY-QrdMggos=)**

clean_body: | | = Hey Peter, When Dr. Martin visited all 95 counties in Tennessee last fall, one issue kept coming up again and again: Education. Bill Lee’s utter lack of urgency to improve our public education system, even after the pandemic set our students back even further, is appalling. Though he proposed some increases in education spending in his State of the State address last week, those investments are paltry when weighed against the rest of the $52 billion budget, and far, far below what experts and advocates have called for for years. It’s time to elect a leader who will take seriously the needs of teachers and students, and who understands that, from cradle to career, we can thrive with improved education for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Though the pandemic exposed serious flaws in Tennessee's public education system, the truth is that those flaws have been present for a long, long time. According to a September poll, 79% of Tennesseans are worried that schoolchildren fell far behind on math and reading during the COVID-19 pandemic. And the data backs that up, too:less than 30% of Tennessee students tested on grade-level in English and math in the spring of 2021. That’s why education is at the center of Dr. Martin’s campaign, and why it will be a priority of this administration when we win. Here are just a few policies we can implement to improve public education for all Tennesseeans: Increase funding to address inequities and lift up schools in disadvantaged communities Expand voluntary pre-K programs to get our kids on the right track as early as possible; supplement by investing in early literacy programs Provide more counselors and nurses in our schools to address absenteeism and our students’ mental health Attract and retain the most talented educators by substantially raising teacher salaries, which still lag near the bottom of all states Most Tennesseans agree that we need meaningful education reform, and that has to start at the top. = = — Team Martin | Dr. Jason Martin is running for Governor because now more than ever Tennessee needs a leader who will start working to meet all of our needs. As an ICU physician, Dr. Martin has seen firsthand the devastating consequences of lies, corruption, and divisiveness in Nashville. name: Nick Rathod, Beto for Texas
subject: Exciting update re: my last email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
[1]Beto O'Rourke

I have an exciting update
re: the last email I sent you.

At the beginning of Beto’s 12 day, more than 2,100 mile drive to over 20
Texas cities and towns, we set a $100,000 goal to fund our events and all
the travel in between.

One week and 1,418.8 miles later, we’re less than $25,000 away from
reaching our goal — and it’s all thanks to amazing grassroots supporters
like you!

But we still have hundreds of miles and four major events coming up,
including a big rally in Houston where Beto will energize Texas voters in
person. So I’m coming to you to ask:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52782?refcode=ema20220210-175614&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=175614%2E444211%2ELXr-GH ]Will you make a donation right now to put us over the top of our
$100,000 goal?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52782?refcode=ema20220210-175614&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=175614%2E444211%2ELXr-GH ]Keep Beto on the road by helping fill up his gas tank. 77% to goal.
Donate now.

Our Statewide Drive for a Brighter Texas is a chance for Texans to come
together in solidarity on the one-year anniversary of Abbott’s preventable
grid failure, which caused a humanitarian crisis.

Millions were left without heat, water, and power. Hundreds lost their
lives. Thousands were forced out of their homes.

But Beto’s statewide drive isn’t just about remembrance — it’s about hope.
We’re celebrating how Texans came together to take care of each other last
year, because it reminds us how powerful we are when we work together. And
together, we’re building a campaign to elect a Governor who will fix the
power grid, lower utility taxes, and always keep families safe.

So please, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52782?refcode=ema20220210-175614&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=175614%2E444211%2ELXr-GH ]help us
finish strong by pitching in what you can to fund the next four days of
Beto’s statewide drive. Let’s hit our $100,000 goal by midnight.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/52782?refcode=ema20220210-175614&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=175614%2E444211%2ELXr-GH ]Contribute $3

We’re almost there,

Nick Rathod
Campaign Manager, Beto for Texas

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/bft-unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=175614%2E444211%2ELXr-GH

Pol. Adv. Paid for by Beto for Texas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: I thought this might interest you?
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/progressupdate-8132296?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,
**Lunch with Lord Daniel Hannan in Jackson**
Daniel Hannan is a British Lord, a Fox News contributor, and most important of all, a true friend of America. I am delighted to say that he is coming to Jackson.
**Please come to listen to Lord Daniel Hannan speak over lunch here in Jackson at River Hills on March 1 st.**
America was founded on the innovative idea that each of us holds inalienable rights. That helps explain why the United States became one of the first societies on earth where people came to be defined by their character and ability, rather than by hierarchy or what they were born.

With "woke" ideologues demanding that we are defined as either oppressors or the oppressed, the idea of the individual is under attack. This risks ending the Enlightenment and if that were to happen, America would, in the words of Ronald Reagan, "sentence our children to take the first steps into a thousand years of darkness."

Come and hear Lord Hannan explain how we can, as the 40th President put it, ensure the American Republic remains "the last best hope of man on earth."
---
| [BOOK YOUR TICKET NOW](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=befc220f63&e=5703353baa "BOOK YOUR TICKET NOW")
---
| Tickets cost $25 each. Spaces are limited and will sell fast, so please book yours now.

I look forward to seeing you at what promises to be a wonderful event.

---
| |
---
Warm Regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
| |
---

| We Don't Need Another War.
---
| | |
---|---
|
In his farewell address, George Washington said, "It is our true policy to steer clear of permanent alliances with any portion of the foreign world."

Thomas Jefferson later said, "We should be friends with all nations and have entangled alliances with none."

These ideas are completely antithetical to Article 5 of the NATO Treaty which reads, "...an attack on any member country compels other treaty members to come to its aid." Since its signing, NATO has vastly expanded its membership to the 30 nations it has today. Ukraine is NOT one of those member nations and even if it were Americans have no direct interests in Ukraine's conflict with Russia. We don't need another war and I won't support a war unless it passes Constitutional muster and poses a direct threat to American lives.

...But war is a big business and there's money to be made in bombs and bandages.

The Warhawks in Washington DC--including members of BOTH political parties, the intelligence community, the homeland security community, and many of the so-called "Conservatives" paraded on television nightly--all seem to agree that a war with Russia is a good idea.

It's not a good idea. In fact, it's an incredibly bad idea that could lead to war with China, Iran, and other nations who do business and/or have alliances with Russia. In turn, that could lead to a global economic collapse of the US Dollar as the world currency and give the Chinese Communist Party the very thing they want most: to be the world's economic and military leader.

What is the justification for going to war with Russia over Ukraine? Our elected public servants in Washington DC tell us (with a straight face) Russia is threatening the sovereign borders of Ukraine and we can't allow that to happen. Without borders, they say, you don't have a nation.

Really? You don't say?

Since the Biden Administration dismantled the Trump-era border policies and encouraged MILLIONS of illegal immigrants to flood across our southern border, we've completely lost control of OUR OWN sovereignty. To make matters worse, we have Republicans encouraging amnesty for those who've violated our borders. One of those Republicans is right here in Washington Congressional District 4--Dan Newhouse. In fact, Newhouse even co-sponsored an amnesty bill and hasn't been shy about his support of illegals. How does he justify this to voters? He says it targets "farmworkers."

Except it doesn't. There are holes in the legislation to allow others to apply to the program and evade deportation. The bill can be read [here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WE7Rs3fkmLEEn1k_sAZvL5lVKdRPxfWIf123svLjuRRVSEnwFQceZABsdWmrLzbadrrEgk7dp_A_puMeFRjGYKOiF0ZSM2J1TBX6UqqTKK_-qS824-_g2bD4cox66ZHHPuAIRDqOXTMdhNbZmyuHDjUMK7NtPjcApe1HEF1pU8VQk8yXEbhE32YMdY1M_y6s7d1N9N01d3S5jLNKLPasqgN1upTlFKujh6_29HPVFldqBqEk60lLWlcZic2AUC8HgoXwra8LxsHW0Pr-09YbeHyv9vbyeKVP&c=pu5OkENW8Za2gIpuSMZHYNBum67XD5vmjJo5W3Xtj8Byys0ygboiww==&ch=AONL8ROUrNfGY4J2MjSKUfOp1RVaybzzkNyOXtEnflmASrdRI1h_MQ==)

It gives amnesty to potentially millions of people who came to this country illegally while sticking his thumb in the eye of those who have applied to the immigration process correctly. Worse yet, Newhouse has yet to publically call into question our reasons for going to war with Russia over Ukraine.

Why is that?

Maybe it's because numerous defense contractors like General Dynamics have given Newhouse thousands of dollars to fall in line and do what he's told. Don't believe me? Read it for yourself [here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WE7Rs3fkmLEEn1k_sAZvL5lVKdRPxfWIf123svLjuRRVSEnwFQceZABsdWmrLzba5X-LeNuvXGnTG5v_1WSgPY7nMOYJpsOV8AH2TNh4IBT03sdORDU7GbiWVJD8IWxpEKuy0gSuIjtGwfUDo-YRPG53cYmeMeb7BMJe9RMAcjpEkh1_t8UM3rI_AwcsE0KVJlBd4jr2ZoTav772GkRrMOSxkdcPIbYz0u5wmmIXODvDGwF5_4neOvNTy0Xqp7euuo7bNMFHtWESd4zEa4NoPHoXJRPd8VuVL8jGH3Iqq3kZHdpU8-ZGFg==&c=pu5OkENW8Za2gIpuSMZHYNBum67XD5vmjJo5W3Xtj8Byys0ygboiww==&ch=AONL8ROUrNfGY4J2MjSKUfOp1RVaybzzkNyOXtEnflmASrdRI1h_MQ==)

To date, Newhouse has raised over $450,000 in corporate and special interest money. It's clear Newhouse is for sale to the highest bidder.

But my vote is not for sale. NOT ONE DOLLAR OF MY MONEY HAS COME FROM SPECIAL INTERESTS. The only special interest I have is you which is why I'm counting on you to help me catch up with Newhouse in fundraising.

I need your help. This month we need to raise $50,000 to start catching up with Newhouse's fundraising haul. We're already beating him in the polls--by 13% according to a recent poll reported by Breitbart. [You can read it here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WE7Rs3fkmLEEn1k_sAZvL5lVKdRPxfWIf123svLjuRRVSEnwFQceZABsdWmrLzbaX_FxIuM6tYqmWQ3XFIqxc0rAtAu961QT8dSz1grFxp8Tz6IOu8ZLv3GGj2Pm5qbRuSNQHygk4CRrHBFVeIsQJsFm00MTaXvGDe0QK2Zo0aWnZwTJOCYkWTPLbgTMOotmutPp7yDjTY7my4qMCRI0Nv5WL3_CxDbqHIz5EE376N8P6SUHvqPkYkvkIU9vXtPF0ZAle8Shopd-ZPZQP5ko-y_and3wsmayuCUNLAFom1rjpS1xvK0-2ulgP0w-FknX&c=pu5OkENW8Za2gIpuSMZHYNBum67XD5vmjJo5W3Xtj8Byys0ygboiww==&ch=AONL8ROUrNfGY4J2MjSKUfOp1RVaybzzkNyOXtEnflmASrdRI1h_MQ==)

I wouldn't ask if I didn't need your help. Are you with me?

In liberty,

Loren

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Fwd: (My opponent) Re: legitimate political discourse
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
Friend - I'm following up on my message (below) about the Republican National Committee's official vote which labeled the Jan. 6 attack on our Capitol as "legitimate political discourse."
---
**I have further important news on this matter: A new GOP opponent has just entered the race against me for Senate. Not only is this opponent fervently pro-Trump, but she 's actually a member of the RNC's "Executive Committee" - the very same RNC that just issued the absurd resolution making light of the Jan. 6 attack. **
_This is the Republican Party_ that hopes to take back majorities in Congress. _This_ is the party that plans to elevate Donald Trump to the White House in 2024. _This_ is the party that censures its own members like Liz Cheney for seeking truth and accountability for the attack on our Capitol.
Friend, with Trump loyalists lining up to flip this Senate seat red and win back Senate control for Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell, I'm counting on your support to fight back:
I cannot overstate the urgency here. I need everybody on this team to step up like never before to protect this Senate seat.
**[Please, will you rush a contribution of $5 or more- or whatever you can spare to build up resources against my Trump-aligned opponent? Whatever you donate will help me keep this must-win Senate seat blue and protect Democratic control of the Senate. ](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1144-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thanks for your support,
Dick
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Richard Blumenthal**
Date: Mon, Feb 7, 2022
Subject: Re: legitimate political discourse

[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=5hu9yQ5lf8d4zgkwXuGVPffnJ0iChKc%2F&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
It gives me no pleasure in reporting this to you. In fact, it makes me sick to my stomach - but that's all the more reason we must take action.
The Republican National Committee has declared that the individuals which carried out the Jan. 6, 2021 attack on the Capitol are "ordinary citizens who engaged in legitimate political discourse."
_**Legitimate political discourse?**_
Is the vandalization and looting of the United States Capitol legitimate political discourse? Are smashed windows and excrement on the walls of Congress legitimate political discourse? Are erecting gallows, chanting "Hang Mike Pence," and beating police officers legitimate political discourse?
I'll never forget the scenes from that day, Friend. Mobs swarming the Capitol, violently attacking, overwhelming, and injuring Capitol Police. Desecrating and damaging the building, garbed in their red MAGA hats, Trump flags, and in some cases, anti-Semitic clothing. **There was no legitimate political discourse in sight until the Capitol was cleared, Congress was called back into session, and Joe Biden was rightfully certified as the President of the United States of America.**
And now they are censuring their own for speaking that truth. Both Reps. Liz Cheney and Adam Kinzinger have been censured for what the RNC called "participating in a Democrat-led persecution."
This is further proof that the leadership of the national Republican Party has mortgaged its soul to Donald J. Trump. They don't care about facts. They don't care about accountability. And this latest move from the RNC proves that they no longer even care about our _democracy_.
They will say and do _anything_ when it comes to protecting and emboldening the corrupt, disgraced, and dangerous former President. **This is the party that could take back control of Congress - and sabotage all Jan. 6 investigations in the process - if we don't fight with everything we have to stop them.**
[So here's what I'm asking you: Donate whatever you can - $5, $10, $20, every dollar matters - to protect Democratic Senate control. The Republican Party is frankly far too dangerous to be in control, and I need every last bit of grassroots support to protect this must-win Senate seat against a new GOP challenger. Please, donate now to keep this insurrection-supporting party far away from Senate control.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1144-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
Make no mistake, Friend: Just because Donald Trump is out of the White House doesn't mean his and his followers' stranglehold over the GOP has ended. It's only gotten stronger - and that means we need to be stronger. We need to fight twice as hard. Our democratic institutions are counting on us.
Thanks for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=A9VXFkfaG5Glbb6KuB6PcbFbAKS5kYV8&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

# VOLUNTEER AT THE GUN SHOW!
Dear Fellow Patriots!

We need 2,600 signatures to get Melissa Martz on the ballot. One way we are doing this is to collect signatures at the GUN SHOW. Our goal is 50-75 each day. **If you are able to volunteer your time for one or more of the dates listed BELOW \--- PLEASE REPLY to this email. **

_*If you are able to volunteer for an entire day --A stipend for lunch will be provided*_

Have another idea about how to collect signatures?? The forms can be printed from the Campaign website OR we can mail them out to you!

**THANK YOU** to all who have given of their time and talents to help us in the fight to preserve our Republic! We ARE doing it!!
