body:
We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wea
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z90isuocq05ij8t35udn49keakii9q752csu954o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf1d32e1om6obhmcpb8crhmspnecdncapmas3gs5oe6db0ckr6dc3nmcom2s37curt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coqmeddk61pb8phkc2pmadtgmlin49fg)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zep8tio0f0bbjlnfgct5aa5n8dtqkul3m4o69f20_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs) | |
---
Friend, aren’t you fed-up with the COVID hysteria nonsense?

We’ve got 2 years of science telling us paper masks don’t work. But we’re required to wear masks on planes. We have to wear masks on federal property. Children must wear masks in the classroom. With no scientific support for it.

That’s what I had a chance to discuss with Fox News recently.
__
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhsnvpc6itnlgt68snm773k2lt0o37bcve2s2e88_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs)
[**WATCH NOW >>**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh23jrpng8464dvh3ka2p07ks8p45dedl7tl4tlo_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs)
Here's the dirty little secret about masks... It's got nothing to do with public heath.

**It’s ALL about submission.****_It's always been more about collectivism. It's been about growing government power over your lives._**

That's never been more clear than now, as these lawless bureaucrats continue with their mask requirements and shaming of the unmasked - despite the fact that the science has been clearly anti-mask for a long time.

**But it's time to draw the line.**

We can't continue to submit forever. We can't let our children be punished for personal health decisions. I'm taking a stand already and I've introduced legislation that will get rid of the federal mandate for masks on planes.

Enough is enough! If you agree, please chip in today to join my fight.
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0sf510rhel2f629oaa2fsbi2ja8qvni5vof72o_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znlvavf8it77o46np431vsiivn0lvjl2rh6ecfs0_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfmulvomo1pnu00qng7hhiu7bep483e0c3sg8gho_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs)
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76nmabnq45cmtho98g3bts9bppf2f88i6n8u478_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs)
For too long we’ve heard that this madness is TEMPORARY._We’re told to give up our freedom. Just wear the mask. Just be quiet. It’s only 2 weeks._

Well, it’s been 2 years. And they’ll never give up this game unless WE make them.

**We must stand strong on the side of science, reject needless masks, reject government overreach, and defend our freedom.**

I have real power as a U.S. Senator to expose these bureaucrats and their endless theatrics, but I can't do it alone.

I need to show strength against the bureaucracy. [**Would you please chip in $100, $50, $25, or $10 to help out?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z02ehvrk0gjh6gl462dv0r24gj2fnvfrtg55uo20_rp22sh2s8i66ob1clj62o32cth2bs)

Thank you, friend.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__

name: Jamal Raad, Evergreen Action
subject: [NEW AD ALERT] Democrats must deliver.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Our message must cut through the noise and reach the people in power.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-senators-times-up/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&t=2&akid=12942%2E53494%2ECC8e71) Friend, Democrats spent the last year talking about climate action. Now, they have a choice: allow climate change to wreak havoc on our communities and our economy—or forge a new path by passing the historic climate investments in the Build Back Better Act. Earlier this week, we launched a huge new ad campaign to make that choice crystal clear. We're blanketing D.C. and Brooklyn (Majority Leader Schumer's home district) with our powerful new ad to make sure Democrats get the message: _Our time is up. We won't get another chance. They must deliver._ **But to make our ads as impactful as possible, we need your help. Will you take one (or both!) of the grassroots actions below to help us build momentum for passing climate investments at this make-or-break moment?**
1. [**_Call your senators._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-senators-times-up/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&t=3&akid=12942%2E53494%2ECC8e71) Tell them that you support passing transformative climate investments by March 1st. It's quick and easy, and we even have a script for you. They need to know we're laser-focused on this issue—and the best way to let them know is with a phone call. [**_Make a quick and easy call today._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-senators-times-up/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&t=4&akid=12942%2E53494%2ECC8e71)

2. [**_Donate to keep our ads on the air._**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4282?t=5&akid=12942%2E53494%2ECC8e71) A donation of even just a few dollars helps us keep our ads up for longer. We need to make sure our message cuts through the noise and reaches the people in power. Your contribution will fuel this fight and help us execute our strategic plan. [**_Will you chip in right now to keep our ads up?_**](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4282?t=6&akid=12942%2E53494%2ECC8e71)

Democratic leadership in Congress cannot afford to miss this moment. Failure simply isn't an option here, and we have to keep the pressure on and up. **Are you in?** | | [CALL YOUR SENATORS](https://act.evergreenaction.com/call/call-senators-times-up/?utm_source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&source=ema_2022-02-10_choice_ads_call_&t=7&akid=12942%2E53494%2ECC8e71)
---
| | [DONATE](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4282?t=8&akid=12942%2E53494%2ECC8e71)
---
Jamal Raad
Executive Director, Evergreen Action

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Red flags in fundraising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220210&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220210&amount=28]
Team,
Ever seen something like this before?
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220210&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220210&amount=28]
The blinding colors, the over-the-top rhetoric, and – if you look closely – the pre-checked box signing you up to donate every month.
Tricks like these are employed in races all over the country just to make a few extra bucks. They range from misleading, to fear-mongering, to sometimes even deceitful. At best you’re tricked into thinking the sky will quite literally fall if you do not donate. At worst, a donation you thought would be a one-time thing could end up being a monthly expense if you don’t read the fine print. Elissa’s opponent uses exactly this type of box, at best confusing donors as to how much they are actually donating.
Fundraising is unfortunately part of running for office. For Elissa, after working in the national security world for years, it was an entirely new skill. She had never called on strangers to donate their time and money before, but she knew one thing – there would be no shady tactics involved.
Unfortunately, everyone running for office can’t say the same thing, including Elissa’s opponent, who employs the pre-checked box tactic to get multiple donations from his supporters.
Donating your hard-earned money to a candidate you believe in shouldn’t involve scare tactics or come with hidden strings attached. It’s a principle Elissa upheld during her first two elections, and is carrying into her third.
Will you consider chipping in to help ensure Elissa gets reelected to a third term in Congress? (no pre-checked boxes or world-ending rhetoric involved – we promise.)
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq12022?refcode=email20220210&amount=28]
Team Slotkin

# [#]
About Elissa
Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

Contact Elissa
P.O. BOX 244, HOLLY, MI 48442
campaign@elissaforcongress.com [campaign@elissaforcongress.com]

Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress

But Jessica is committed to advocating for reproductive justice. She understands that folks of color are harmed the most by attacks on reproductive rights. **Last time, super PACs and corporate interests, including the anti-choice Koch brothers’ empire and the banking industry’s major PACs, flooded into our race to defeat us.** But this time, Jessica is in a prime spot to win — but only if she has support from grassroots supporters like you, Peter. clean_body: AOC knows Jessica is a better fit to serve TX-28. So we’re going all-in: | | | BREAKING: AOC responds to Henry Cuellar’s attacks on her and Jessica With just 4 days left until early voting and 19 days left until the primary, we need all hands on deck to fend off Henry Cuellar’s attacks. Peter, Henry Cuellar just attacked AOC for coming to Texas to campaign for Jessica Cisneros this Saturday, Feb. 12th. So AOC just issued this epic comeback in less than 280 characters 👇 We couldn’t agree more. Cuellar has spent the past 16 years aligning himself with the anti-choice lobby and was the ONLY Democrat to vote against the Women’s Health Protection Act in Congress. South Texans have had enough of Henry Cuellar. They shouldn’t have to settle for a representative that could care less about protecting their constitutional rights. But Jessica is committed to advocating for reproductive justice. She understands that folks of color are harmed the most by attacks on reproductive rights. Last time, super PACs and corporate interests, including the anti-choice Koch brothers’ empire and the banking industry’s major PACs, flooded into our race to defeat us.** But this time, Jessica is in a prime spot to win — but only if she has support from grassroots supporters like you, Peter. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: We appreciate all you do, Team Cisneros | To give by check: PO Box 660 Laredo, TX 78042

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Shocking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This isn’t right.
#
A new super PAC is setting a goal to raise $8 MILLION to buy PA’s Democratic primary election. We can’t let this happen. **[Please make a donation today to support our people-powered campaign.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43955?refcode=ema20220210-4536&t=1&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)**
[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43955?refcode=ema20220210-4536&t=2&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)
---
Derek, a new super PAC is entering our race, but this time, it’s not supporting one of our GOP opponents.
Instead, this super PAC is supporting Conor Lamb, one of our Democratic primary opponents. **And they’re trying to raise $8 MILLION to buy this seat.**
**Let us be extremely clear, Derek:** This is everything that’s wrong with politics. And quite frankly, it’s no different than our GOP opponents accepting millions from their own super PACs.
A super PAC is a super PAC, no matter who is receiving the money. They exist to undermine the democratic process and pour money into elections that make it nearly impossible for grassroots campaigns like ours to pull through.
**[Will you help us raise $50,000 today to fight back? If about 2,500 of yinz can donate before midnight, we’d raise that much and send an unmistakable message that we will not allow anyone, including the Lamb campaign, to buy this election.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43955?refcode=ema20220210-4536&t=3&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43955?refcode=em20220210-4536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)**
**Let us lay out some facts real quick:**
We have volunteers in nearly 50% of PA's zip codes, and have hosted events across our great Commonwealth to meet voters where they’re at.
Our grassroots campaign has received small-dollar donations from all 50 states + all 67 PA Counties.
We’ve had more than 170,000 donations since launching our campaign one year + two days ago.
And our average donation has consistently been under $30, a number that demonstrates just how much our campaign relies on everyday people like YOU.
We’re a campaign supported by the people, trying to make their voice heard. **And John, Gisele, and our whole team think that’s the right way to do it, Derek.**
**Meanwhile...**
The Lamb campaign is now relying on a super PAC to overwhelm your individual donations.
This shows just how screwed up our campaign finance rules are, Derek. And it’s why John has always supported running campaigns the RIGHT way -- by relying on the people and grassroots donors, instead of super PACs.
It’s why one of John’s litmus tests has always been ending _Citizens United_ , and fundamentally changing the way money influences our political system.
**Because it's not right that you can be the person supported by the vast majority of people, and a handful of rich folks can come in and try to take you out.**
**[But that’s exactly what’s happening here in PA. And it’s why we need every single person who believes in the power of our grassroots movement to take a stand against super PACs and donate to our campaign today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43955?refcode=ema20220210-4536&t=23&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43955?refcode=em20220210-4536&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)**
It’s not an exaggeration to say this campaign would be nowhere without the determination, strength, and love from all of YOU. We think we’re running this race the right way, and we know we can win with your continued support.
More soon,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220210-4536-footer&t=25&refcode2=4536_434096_xuaTqz&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=4536%2E434096%2ExuaTqz)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress
body:
This is our story.
| [](https://links.salazar4florida.com/u/click?_t=693dccc005624731a29983963c1367ea&_m=0415af9536f2473ca6be65f91f220c3c&_e=3OvYYf81t_KphLQGcb5nwjmotHeaMfanZJ8x5uIMwZUmPAHNp3NTqeVHwxL0MQ_hUoDXNzcUehh7Sv56KyhhNZdnA5b4BtLXGRFCZat8CC3UIYWuL_ddctUfoKvpW0ZPXXD7SWp2wSsF3y1s_i_NLvj7sfyG_mAH2DZoqeAEzvHZ7Q3BRiOglI_563sYd1_GX0mGfMHOMWEB3fwEKAo9WpFwkyFSpj6LJxHww9Ik4Wi4jvWZFSpSjJuQ9pUDLMfVn3cmdWqgI46L6dMZTvhlLd-tvQm6_mtdUvfpQO2owNc8C33r9v5tgYObV0QFyYXsNhM2v7tPAgSPvVFaMHTJCnowOIF7bSdIyvx0aS-PY8JyNbvUgMyiZujD81XY21XG1N2iT6Sv_85X43gIMwaK8Ki0izs7wjmMTqCd2duyuozlZYktftbkAAImtq2kTXzYtgW7sa8zDamgiNQWxBajIV_GCD3LAz1FUiX6oXMW5bm7rdVb7SVymz6Lj31_Peq4)
---
Peter,
---
My parents began their American journey with just $5 in their pocket, escaping Cuba and finding freedom at my childhood home in Little Havana.
---
Through their hard work, dedication, and faith, they allowed me to live the American dream and pursue a career holding the corrupt and powerful accountable as a 5-time Emmy Award-winning journalist, television anchor, and eventually, as a member of Congress.
---
**Now, I’m fighting to save the American dream from future generations by defeating Nancy Pelosi and the Left this November – but I can’t do it on my own.**
---
_I’m asking grassroots conservatives across American to contribute the same $5 my parents started with so we can defend our families, our values, and our dreams from the socialist Democrats._
---

clean_body: This is our story. | Peter, My parents began their American journey with just $5 in their pocket, escaping Cuba and finding freedom at my childhood home in Little Havana. Through their hard work, dedication, and faith, they allowed me to live the American dream and pursue a career holding the corrupt and powerful accountable as a 5-time Emmy Award-winning journalist, television anchor, and eventually, as a member of Congress. Now, I’m fighting to save the American dream from future generations by defeating Nancy Pelosi and the Left this November – but I can’t do it on my own. I’m asking grassroots conservatives across American to contribute the same $5 my parents started with so we can defend our families, our values, and our dreams from the socialist Democrats. Democrats like AOC and Ilhan Omar are great at lying to the American people about the reality of socialism. They love to portray it as a utopia where the government solves all your problems. But I’ve spoken to left-wing tyrants like Fidel Castro and Nicolás Maduro, and I’ve seen socialist countries firsthand... ...So trust me when I say that this couldn’t be further from the truth. The TRUTH is that socialism has led to misery and immense human suffering wherever it’s been implemented. It destroys economies, crushes individual freedom, and benefits the corrupt and powerful at the expense of the people.Socialism kills. I'm still fighting for affordable healthcare, strong climate action, lower prescription drug costs, tax fairness and historic investments in housing, education, and childcare. Thank you, friend. — Bill The toughest member of Congress is progressive New Jersey fighter Bill Pascrell. Bill is leading our battle to protect Social Security and Medicare. Bill wants to rebuild New Jersey's aging roads, bridges, and tunnels. And Bill Pascrell is our strongest advocate for tax fairness and restoring the state and local tax deduction for our middle-class families. Thanks for having Bill's back! Prefer to donate by mail? _Joe Biden is DEMANDING that both be required. _
###
We can't believe we are sending you this news... this might be Biden's most outlandish plan ever.

While Joe Biden is masking our kids, shutting down our small businesses, and ignoring the inflation that is crippling our economy, he plans to spend **$30 MILLION** on a program to give crack pipes to addicts for FREE.

_If this doesn 't anger you, we don't know what will! _

| | Peter, I’m Jenny, the Communications Director for Andy Levin’s reelection campaign. As the 2022 election cycle ramps up, I wanted to introduce myself and explain just why this race in Michigan’s new Eleventh District is important. We have a lot at stake with this election, Peter — on top of Democrats’ slim majority in the House, redistricting means that congressional maps look very different. From losing a congressional seat to running in a newly drawn district, we have our work cut our for us. But I’ve been with Andy since his first congressional campaign, and I know he’s up to the challenge. Peter, that's because Andy’s campaign goes beyond a single issue or a single candidate — he is building a movement to make sure working families finally have a fair shot. While Andy’s on the ground in the new 11th District, meeting with voters and spreading our message, we need people like you pitching in however you can to ensure we are successful in this race — [_**Can you pitch in $11 today — or more! — towards Andy’s campaign to represent Michigan’s new 11th District?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41643385/329712715/882283677?refcode=em_20220208_f_j_intro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDg3ZThkMS05ZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c1oz3Chtfcs-WNQ78YSb1n7MiN6xauyTJHfq4co73zU=) I know words matter – but Andy’s actions speak even louder. I have never heard another person be described as "the real deal" more than Andy! (Except maybe his dad and his Uncle Carl. Seriously — it is how everyone describes the Levins) Andy is so motivated by the working men and women of this country rising up to make their voices heard, and I know that he is the best possible candidate to serve us in Congress. The road ahead is difficult, but the support from grassroots donors around the district and the country help sustain this movement. **[Peter, please consider making a donation to Andy’s reelection campaign today. It will take all of us to support Andy as he continues to fight on Capitol Hill for working people and their families. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41643386/329712716/882283677?refcode=em_20220208_f_j_intro&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTM3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDg3ZThkMS05ZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c1oz3Chtfcs-WNQ78YSb1n7MiN6xauyTJHfq4co73zU=)**
In solidarity, Jenny Byer
Communications Director
Andy Levin for Congress

clean_body: Our campaign goes beyond a single issue or a single candidate – we are building a movement to reflect the progressive values Americans want to see enacted in their communities and their lives. | | | | | Peter, I’m Jenny, the Communications Director for Andy Levin’s reelection campaign. As the 2022 election cycle ramps up, I wanted to introduce myself and explain just why this race in Michigan’s new Eleventh District is important. We have a lot at stake with this election, Peter — on top of Democrats’ slim majority in the House, redistricting means that congressional maps look very different. From losing a congressional seat to running in a newly drawn district, we have our work cut our for us. But I’ve been with Andy since his first congressional campaign, and I know he’s up to the challenge. Peter, that's because Andy’s campaign goes beyond a single issue or a single candidate — he is building a movement to make sure working families finally have a fair shot. While Andy’s on the ground in the new 11th District, meeting with voters and spreading our message, we need people like you pitching in however you can to ensure we are successful in this race — = I know words matter – but Andy’s actions speak even louder. I have never heard another person be described as "the real deal" more than Andy! (Except maybe his dad and his Uncle Carl. Seriously — it is how everyone describes the Levins) Andy is so motivated by the working men and women of this country rising up to make their voices heard, and I know that he is the best possible candidate to serve us in Congress. The road ahead is difficult, but the support from grassroots donors around the district and the country help sustain this movement. = In solidarity, Jenny Byer Communications Director Andy Levin for Congress | | | | | = | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Levin for Congress | Andy Levin For Congress P.O. Mike’s up against Grassley’s $3.7 million campaign war chest, but he’s not taking a dime from corporate PACs, so if he’s going to protect our Democratic Senate majority, we need grassroots donors like you to give right now. subject: re: Evers is burning through cash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Rebecca
body:
This stat is alarming...
| Friend – I’ll cut right to the chase. The numbers Colleen shared with me are truly shocking.
---
Tony Evers' radical Democrat Party allies here in Wisconsin have poured MILLIONS into his coffers for this toss-up governor’s race. __But**96%** of those funds in his last period came only after we entered the race.__
---
The Left is terrified that we will FIRE Tony Evers and take back this crucial battleground state.
---
**But with his $10.5 million in cash on hand, he’s drowning out my latest ad on the airwaves.**
---

clean_body: This stat is alarming... | Friend – I’ll cut right to the chase. The numbers Colleen shared with me are truly shocking. Tony Evers' radical Democrat Party allies here in Wisconsin have poured MILLIONS into his coffers for this toss-up governor’s race. But96% of those funds in his last period came only after we entered the race. The Left is terrified that we will FIRE Tony Evers and take back this crucial battleground state. But with his $10.5 million in cash on hand, he’s drowning out my latest ad on the airwaves. We raised enough to compete with Evers and run our ad through last weekend, but now, if we can’t raise another $12,850 by the next ad buy deadline TONIGHT at 9:45 P.M., our ad will be PULLED. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Colleen (Rebecca for Governor) Date: Fri, Feb 04, 2022 Subject: Evers is burning through cash To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I just wrapped up our finance meeting to kick off the month and was reviewing the numbers with Rebecca... Tony Evers already DOUBLED our last ad buy and according to the latest campaign finance reports, he’s still burning through cash to drown out Rebecca’s message on the airwaves. The ad market is a simple calculus... The more ad space Evers can outbid us for, the more voters hear his lying attacks and the less they hear the TRUTH about how he is harming our children with masks and plummeting education standards. Thank you for your continued support, Colleen Coyle \--------- Finance Director Rebecca for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Susan Wild
subject: this email is important for 2022 and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
With the future of our democracy on the line, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41654286/329765207/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220210-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTI4MmFjZS1jZThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqmvXjQ_m73Zf5skGtvNQKBF02E4dz6KdYSZl7kF3Cc=)
---
| Peter:

I’d like to take a moment to explain why it’s so important that we defend this seat, not just for the next two years but potentially for generations to come.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41654287/329765209/-1220490354?refcode=BLU-SWC-20220210-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTI4MmFjZS1jZThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iqmvXjQ_m73Zf5skGtvNQKBF02E4dz6KdYSZl7kF3Cc=)
---
Here’s the situation: the redistricting process is ongoing, but based on 2020 census data we know that Pennsylvania now has 17 congressional districts. That’s one fewer than we previously held, and it’s also an odd number.

**Why does this matter? Because it’s up to the congressional delegation of each state to certify its state’s election results.**

In 2020, eight Pennsylvania Republicans voted against certifying our electors. Now that we’re losing a seat, that margin becomes even slimmer. And as we’ve seen time and time again, Pennsylvania is a crucial swing state in presidential elections.

**Bear with me: this means that what happens in this House election could very well determine the future integrity of our electoral system and whether we have a free and fair presidential election in 2024.**

clean_body: With the future of our democracy on the line, we can’t afford to leave anything to chance. | = | Peter: I’d like to take a moment to explain why it’s so important that we defend this seat, not just for the next two years but potentially for generations to come. | = Here’s the situation: the redistricting process is ongoing, but based on 2020 census data we know that Pennsylvania now has 17 congressional districts. That’s one fewer than we previously held, and it’s also an odd number. Why does this matter? Because it’s up to the congressional delegation of each state to certify its state’s election results. In 2020, eight Pennsylvania Republicans voted against certifying our electors. Now that we’re losing a seat, that margin becomes even slimmer. And as we’ve seen time and time again, Pennsylvania is a crucial swing state in presidential elections. Bear with me: this means that what happens in this House election could very well determine the future integrity of our electoral system and whether we have a free and fair presidential election in 2024. I won one of the closest House races in the country in 2020, and Democratic experts are forecasting an even closer race this year. body:
We're lagging behind.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41654463/329768509/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWYxOWQ1Ni1kMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCgBBNf7CyDKKESJizTiFJmpTkN0m71l_mb27fYL1GM=)
---
Peter, America spends more on health care than almost any other developed nation – and still lags behind in outcomes.

American families struggle to pay the outrageous costs of health care and often go without critical care. And to make things worse, drug costs are out of control leading to life-threatening medication rationing.

**One solution that WILL work? Transitioning to a single-payer health care model like Medicare for All.**

Last week, California’s state legislature introduced a single-payer health care bill – legislation that would give all Californians access to public health care. But, I was sad to see that it failed.

However, at the federal level my colleagues and I continue to work to pass critical healthcare reforms, including Medicare for All, a type of single-payer health care. Because we need a solution that will prioritize the care of ALL Americans – not just those who can afford it.

**But momentum for Medicare for All is dropping and Republicans are DETERMINED to see it fail.** Peter, that’s why I need to confirm with my supporters: [**Do you support Medicare for All? I need 2,000 responses to get a clear image of how many of you support this legislation »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41654464/329768510/394980505?refcode=MTFC_20220210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWYxOWQ1Ni1kMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCgBBNf7CyDKKESJizTiFJmpTkN0m71l_mb27fYL1GM=&emci=87cbaa99-b78a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1f19d56-d08a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18839602) | [YES, I SUPPORT MEDICARE FOR ALL »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41654465/329768511/394980505?refcode=MTFC_20220210_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWYxOWQ1Ni1kMDhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BCgBBNf7CyDKKESJizTiFJmpTkN0m71l_mb27fYL1GM=&emci=87cbaa99-b78a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&emdi=f1f19d56-d08a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&ceid=18839602)

clean_body: We're lagging behind. | = Peter, America spends more on health care than almost any other developed nation – and still lags behind in outcomes. American families struggle to pay the outrageous costs of health care and often go without critical care. And to make things worse, drug costs are out of control leading to life-threatening medication rationing. One solution that WILL work? Transitioning to a single-payer health care model like Medicare for All. Last week, California’s state legislature introduced a single-payer health care bill – legislation that would give all Californians access to public health care. But, I was sad to see that it failed. However, at the federal level my colleagues and I continue to work to pass critical healthcare reforms, including Medicare for All, a type of single-payer health care. Because we need a solution that will prioritize the care of ALL Americans – not just those who can afford it. But momentum for Medicare for All is dropping and Republicans are DETERMINED to see it fail. Peter, that’s why I need to confirm with my supporters: | Your support and activism could mean all the difference for a revolutionary new health care system. – Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. Box 5214, Riverside, CA 92517 www.marktakano.com Mark Takano represents the good people of California's Inland Empire in Congress, fighting for the region's progressive priorities. He's been a voice for veterans, seniors, students, local businesses and hardworking families. But now, our Democratic House Majority is seriously at risk. The leadership of progressive Democrats like Mark will be critical to holding Republicans accountable and ensuring the healing of our country during this challenging time. Grateful to have you with us,

Team Kaptur

clean_body: The GOP-led Ohio Supreme Court has just four days to produce a Congressional map that works for all Ohioans. | \- Marcy Kaptur | | | | Team, Time is flying for the uber-partisan Republican legislature in Ohio; they only have four days to produce a Congressional map that reflects the people of Ohio. These maps will either live up to the demands of the court or double-down on the same partisan hack they rammed through before. We’re not gamblers,but we have a guess. ** | Marcy is the longest-serving woman in Congress. Now, at the behest of Kevin McCarthy , the Ohio GOP is trying to take that all-important seniority away. Frankly, Ohio needs all the seniority it can get. We need to stop them in the courthouse and at the ballot box,but we need your help. [We need to raise[$2,000] by Monday to put an end to these partisan schemes and protect our seat for the people of Northern Ohio. We are up against a flood of special interest money. Will you chip in $10 right now to help us weather the storm? ]() https?linkid=4&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-impeachment-is-on-the-table&emailreferrer=email1438671subject1893385&emailsubject=take-the-weekend If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Grateful to have you with us, Team Kaptur Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. Will you help us deliver it? Friend, If there’s one thing we have seen consistently in our polling, it’s that when Republican voters hear Tiffany Shedd’s story and message she wins OVERWHELMINGLY. We don’t want another politician who has spent their entire life in government or a “former” progressive with ties to Planned Parenthood. **Republicans want an authentic conservative fighter who practices what they preach. And Tiffany is the only candidate for Attorney General who fits the bill:** [](http://links.sheddforaz.com/u/click?_t=aef90635dd7e4e83bfd7b3a79f893ad5&_m=20f5b7b10c2a436eb718d169b1ad2069&_e=HFpSlzBDzcxPQMy1VGNfo0rK4VoC0FfCiDKzJmshl3P0kkmNNWUfwmYXS-WR9f2h97V8GIe2e_xYgFiKN_fG0d6lJbwICI3PfXAgbND8jIt2LuiDIk-lncOiPHECm_wpeSw1q0AjkeIYXXTvdV7HrPFVxzPkJ1A4CHpENOjFsHCDKl4be_cQOQAlvSsPUz0UePgGPEWspqhYJTpPuPGIvLCBhw8yOheg9zqAuNLXZpisqOLn3bb9NUKepXXvLoaz9VqP_5t4HcjzEwcDOH-gmA%3D%3D)✔️ Tiffany is the ONLY candidate who has experienced the Obama and Biden crises first hand living on a major drug and human trafficking route. clean_body: Will you help us deliver it? Friend, If there’s one thing we have seen consistently in our polling, it’s that when Republican voters hear Tiffany Shedd’s story and message she wins OVERWHELMINGLY. We don’t want another politician who has spent their entire life in government or a “former” progressive with ties to Planned Parenthood. Republicans want an authentic conservative fighter who practices what they preach. And Tiffany is the only candidate for Attorney General who fits the bill: ✔️ Tiffany is the ONLY candidate who has experienced the Obama and Biden crises first hand living on a major drug and human trafficking route. She has been fighting for border security for almost two decades. It’s why the ranchers who live and work along the border have endorsed her campaign. They know securing the border isn’t just a talking point for her. It’s personal and they trust her to get it done. ✔️ is the ONLY candidate who is an NRA and 4-H certified pistol and shotgun coach and has spent her entire adult life defending gun rights. She’s also the only candidate that owns a shooting range and has dedicated her range and her time to teaching children the basics of firearm safety and competitive shooting. ✔️ is the ONLY candidate who is a homeschool mom, former school board member, and former teacher who has been fighting indoctrination ever since she first pulled her son out of public school over twenty years ago. She is the STRONGEST candidate on the border, on the Second Amendment, on parental rights, and every other issue we conservatives care about including life and election integrity. But we need your help to reach conservative voters across Arizona and let them know about Tiffany and why she is the conservative choice for Attorney General! Can we count on your help? YES! I would like to help Tiffany win by: Sincerely, Curtis Maples Field Director Tiffany Shedd for Attorney General P.S. Paid for by Shedd for Attorney General. Authorized by Shedd for Attorney General.

subject: Help us Flip the 5th
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Van Someren for WI
body:
Your continued support makes it possible | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3a9e5d99789b/i-am-running-for-congress-8846285?e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=1aaa5bccda&e=356c0699dd)
---
| | | Hey there,

**Let me be frank: we have to replace Scott Fitzgerald.** He cares more about party solidarity than the needs of our district and state, and has done nothing but polarize our communities and pit us against each other.

Just last week the GOP legitimized the deadly January 6th insurrection at our capitol, led by folks emboldened by extremist discourse directly from the mouths of Scott Fitzgerald and Donald Trump.

**This cult-like behavior has to stop.** I don’t care about party solidarity. I care about listening to the needs of all my constituents and working to address their needs.
---
| [ ](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=42b770e2ee&e=356c0699dd)
---
| **We need a leader in Congress who is dedicated to unifying and actually leading, with concrete plans to make the 5th district a place where all families can have a shot at the American Dream. I am that leader. **

If you are ready for a representative who wants to listen to you and work for you representing your interests in Washington, [could you set up a recurring donation of $50, $25, $10 or whatever you can give each month?](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=7556853a9f&e=356c0699dd)
---
| [Set up recurring donation](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=0737d31b06&e=356c0699dd "Set up recurring donation")
---
| For less than the cost of your monthly Netflix subscription, you can help ensure the campaign is able to communicate with voters and get the message out: I’m someone that wants to listen to and work for everyday people like you.
---
| [Donate](https://MikeVanSomeren.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a8d3e4f455e56b0d81700f39a&id=7291c3a78d&e=356c0699dd "Donate")
---
| Your continued support will ensure we have the necessary resources to have a winning campaign. Flipping the 5th won’t be possible without you.

I’m proud to be on this journey with you. Thank you.

Mike
---

name: Friends of Charity Barry
subject: Biden Failure to Lead Expands Growing Drug Epidemic
body:
Free Crack Pipes! What Next?
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
Charity Barry for Congress 437 S. Yellowstone Dr. STE 215 Madison WI 53719
---
| | |
---
| February 11, 2022 Contact: Charity Barry [Charity@charitybarryforcongress.com](mailto:charity@charitybarryforcongress.com)
---
| Joe Biden's Latest Outrageous Proposal
---
| The Biden Administration, in an effort to combat the drug epidemic we face across the country, has proposed the funneling of $30 million in public funds through "The Harm Reduction Program" that will facilitate the continued use of drugs in our communities.
The use of American tax-payer dollars to provide drug users the means to continue their self-destructive habit is not only a betrayal of the public trust; it is an illegal violation of the 1994 Violent Crime Control and Law Enforcement Act, a bill authored by then-Senator Biden himself.
My campaign wholly condemns the Biden Administration for their lack of leadership in tackling the very real issue of drug use in our country while simultaneously refusing to act on the very real threat posed at our southern border where unprecedented levels of illicit drugs flood in unchecked. Furthermore, my campaign condemns the Biden Administration for its use of public monies that exacerbates rampant drug use across the country, thereby decreasing safety and security in our neighborhoods.
This program will in fact increase, not reduce, harm in our communities and in our nation as a whole.
---
| | |
---
| Authorized by Friends of Charity Barry

body:
| Did you see Joe’s message about his father? Joe’s dad ran for office with respect and dignity shown to all, and that’s exactly what kind of governor Joe will be for South Carolina.

**_[Chip in now to stand with Joe, and then read his message below→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41655086/329783389/80455361?amount=10&contactdata=cgbne54tJOf3hHNRjgXDxt3tanAFDtcNXF21SAs4SRWhGKVfcutYI79ByZdG%2BFHPxXV9p8ChrrR4MS%2B9RdCAwM3lWJndRB0DdtOhcEfqoPc%3D&refcode2=3ce90000-d68a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&source=JC_EM_FR_3MO_20220210_2_2&utm_source=jc_em_fr_3mo_20220210_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U5MDAwMC1kNjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sr31EVEIGcKlInLAwoKsyi82Yd951tFnpk_LXf4ws7U=)_**

* * *
**_Original Message from Joe:_**

My earliest political memories come from watching my dad, a judge, on the campaign trail when I was a kid.

I’ll admit, sometimes he had to bribe me (with a DQ Blizzard!) to go campaigning with him, but I got to see firsthand what kind of leader he was for our community. No matter who he met, and what challenges they faced, my father treated everyone with respect and dignity. **_He is the kind of leader I strive to be every day._**

**In my campaign for governor, I am committed to supporting and uplifting South Carolinians from all 46 counties across our state.**

**_[We can get this done, but it’s going to take all hands on deck from here until November. We’ve fallen behind our goal this week. Will you rush $10 right now to stand with our campaign as we fight to deliver for South Carolinians?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41655087/329783390/80455361?amount=10&contactdata=cgbne54tJOf3hHNRjgXDxt3tanAFDtcNXF21SAs4SRWhGKVfcutYI79ByZdG%2BFHPxXV9p8ChrrR4MS%2B9RdCAwM3lWJndRB0DdtOhcEfqoPc%3D&refcode2=3ce90000-d68a-ec11-a507-281878b83d8a&source=JC_EM_FR_3MO_20220210_2_2&utm_source=jc_em_fr_3mo_20220210_2_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTI2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U5MDAwMC1kNjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sr31EVEIGcKlInLAwoKsyi82Yd951tFnpk_LXf4ws7U=)_**

I’m running to raise the minimum wage for the families struggling to make ends meet. I’m running to expand Medicaid to the thousands of South Carolinians who deserve health coverage. And I’m running to fight voter suppression and protect voting rights for everyone.

When I am governor, I’ll use the lessons I learned from my dad to build a stronger, fairer South Carolina for everyone.

Thanks,
Joe

clean_body: | Did you see Joe’s message about his father? Joe’s dad ran for office with respect and dignity shown to all, and that’s exactly what kind of governor Joe will be for South Carolina. = Original Message from Joe: My earliest political memories come from watching my dad, a judge, on the campaign trail when I was a kid. I’ll admit, sometimes he had to bribe me (with a DQ Blizzard!) to go campaigning with him, but I got to see firsthand what kind of leader he was for our community. No matter who he met, and what challenges they faced, my father treated everyone with respect and dignity. He is the kind of leader I strive to be every day. In my campaign for governor, I am committed to supporting and uplifting South Carolinians from all 46 counties across our state. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | | | | | | I’m running to raise the minimum wage for the families struggling to make ends meet. I’m running to expand Medicaid to the thousands of South Carolinians who deserve health coverage. And I’m running to fight voter suppression and protect voting rights for everyone. When I am governor, I’ll use the lessons I learned from my dad to build a stronger, fairer South Carolina for everyone. Thanks, Joe | = | | If you'd like to receive only the most important updates from our team, ** Paid for by Joe Cunningham for South Carolina Joe Cunningham PO Box 21012 Charleston, SC 29413 United States **

Fellow Conservative,

**_FIRST_** , Raphael Warnock won a 2021 special election by about 100,000 votes - out of more than 4 million ballots cast - becoming the first Democrat to win election to the Senate from Georgia since 2000.

**_THEN_** , Senator Warnock, using the national donor list he built during the 2021 runoff race, raised $32 million in his bid for a full six-year term in this fall's midterm elections.

**_NOW_** , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy.

That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves.

_This race is going to be the most expensive race of the 2022 cycle._

We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. **[It's going to take thousands of hours of work to catch up with our opponent's fundraising, which is why we're emailing you today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=9bd5c0065cb140379343c7c2a63bb9b0&_e=hRv2YFjj3vkkY6sitqBH5ZJPSqo5RqzoWbC-42SxJIVFixiJ4maGY2dYPxYOsGzKUuUFPBKqDh-aPZ-XzoTk58PJUiGcFsrvbj0sQGwyDt8VzmhS02vyWjc5YY2BIndZof9s31P-Sc-qCWWOwiFLCreNIrZhSYJ24FAHJ7IPggMErz_ZmQpHMVMkvzceW3oCaCfwNGHAbiLAc732RjgTZIGO-U_bJzvlyZnqiGvkVzJ2G2L4ge0Zgii7BJHltpiKea0ACGlGmKrMTr4-9Zmwd7UIJ4BpUr8KGrj0g15P1Ckv74nVYfCObqOX9FURq0iyKAgtC-lVTxtORN6pPaYcaxlSOnDaPDQ_odG09TAgRMqNscNxyJTl3s6MR3iNjfPzL9BhfI517ulYbeplcefW3ClfkkhwPJmZJcEfCDgPEWKY8Rbohjv0YOqYuaMZ4SWg_lbQJnHaoYvG-jHI1MNfQw%3D%3D)**

name: Charles Booker
subject: I love a good rally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, I love a good rally.

I knew from the moment we rolled out the Kentucky New Deal that we had to
get on the road to share our vision. To be in community with one another.
To listen to one another.

Yesterday, we hit the road to do just that — the first stop on our
Kentucky New Deal tour across the Commonwealth.

First stop: Kentucky State University in our Commonwealth's capital. This
one was special for me. Not only because KSU is one of the oldest HBUs in
the country, but because of the time I spent in Frankfort as a state
representative.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220210?refcode=em20220210-1556&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo ][IMG]

And let me tell you — people showed out!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220210?refcode=em20220210-1556&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220210?refcode=em20220210-1556&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220210?refcode=em20220210-1556&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo ][IMG]

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220210?refcode=em20220210-1556&amp;amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo ][IMG]

Public libraries, university campuses, barber shops, places of worship —
we’re meeting folks in the cornerstones of our community.

This is just the beginning of our tour, and we’re already headed to our
next stop tonight with many more left to go. So, I have a favor to ask
today: [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220210?refcode=em20220210-1556&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1006&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo ]Will you chip in $5 or anything you can to help
support our tour as we travel from the hood to the holler?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220210?refcode=em20220210-1556&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo ]Contribute $5

Our ability to meet folks on this tour is thanks to the support and
generosity from folks like you — chipping in what they can to make it
happen.

We’ll send more updates from the road, and if you’re in Kentucky — I hope
to see you soon.

Together,

Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220210-1556-footer&t=1026&refcode2=1556_346206_ToBPEo&akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1556%2E346206%2EToBPEo

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: American Defense News
subject: Russia Holds This Key Advantage Over The US
body:
American Defense News And UK Sends SAS Commandos to Ukraine as Russia

**One of Dr. Kermit’s opponents, Assemblyman Kevin Kiley, just forced a vote on ending California’s State of Emergency.** _The vote failed — but he knew it would. This was just a PR stunt._ Afterward, he immediately went to Twitter to decry liberals who force people to wear masks. He’ll use this stunt to rake in thousands in campaign contributions. To put it bluntly, we think using a deadly pandemic for a cheap stunt is highly unethical, and shows Kiley is unfit to serve in Congress. body:
Take a look at the results of our most recent issue survey, and submit your own responses! | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41647463/329733572/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZDI3NDhlYi1hZjhhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LQxgKJwhKmsgPfEE5hQfIrCGI25XexGC0HX2QyM9eVY=) Friend,

A couple of weeks ago, we reached out and asked for your input on which issues we should prioritize ahead of the 2022 election. Hundreds of our supporters responded, and we’re so grateful for the thought you put into your answers.

After looking through the results, here are some interesting highlights:
| | **80%** of respondents said we need federal legislation to eliminate the influence of money in politics. **79%** said we need to do everything possible to protect our public lands in Montana and beyond. **63%** of our supporters listed the lack of affordable housing as one of the most pressing issues we face in Montana.
---

Knowing where your priorities stand helps us run a campaign focused on the issues Montanans really care about. So I want you to hear it straight from me:

**I’m committed to advocating for affordable housing, campaign finance reform, and protecting our precious public lands. **

This election cycle is going to be pivotal, and I’m ready to go to bat for working families across Montana and the country.

**[We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st.](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=03981b88bae84a67af7ae4a2ebb967c7&_e=Q6ClAiUps1V-qdUYkQN5qHr_ASWOVA-VgkD-DD3ch3ZWVC9MKJiY6M-_pD0EqeoUtS2nzulOJWC1UsKooHzvHwLzdTTqteQFf9edeA-dYLt9Ud2Jp4YfQqJ86abLVaDT_VOf2kJZaPAXHbzKBBkwE-hr9acegowdscwVyzBcGmCcclhSTE5XWcbH5kkuOELJMCXNYFrjegbkD5pFheIJXJp9mPrMYwnpZKnyYgaXJewfzJicrfRmAMoQ4Lz2c3dcnDMTQ-hTNVkpbD8QJqwhD8lLnOoxzuhNOzHtDTY7lLEzrzWs0hhQ3g0Wv2VbkoOSD4xjgKpGTXraJ6RKSjFTmwxk-V_O9VVcAcWHSBF6ybJexcsYJ8uKOpVMCVi7xDu8mYECs9uFPHXatFNCXu37gJyKGJ6y3BnKTbN8D78n3jo0h0JLXnSEq8AlcROCLpXi8wPYhSPpZkS3vS1wlcWSSS2b2PFBZ1-S6CsI4hKQRplMD-YQQynCTh4kXzNzFsAb15-qj68RvacNeLtWRtJyIw%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=03981b88bae84a67af7ae4a2ebb967c7&_e=Q6ClAiUps1V-qdUYkQN5qHr_ASWOVA-VgkD-DD3ch3ZWVC9MKJiY6M-_pD0EqeoUtS2nzulOJWC1UsKooHzvHwLzdTTqteQFf9edeA-dYLt9Ud2Jp4YfQqJ86abLVaDT_VOf2kJZaPAXHbzKBBkwE-hr9acegowdscwVyzBcGmCcclhSTE5XWcbH5kkuOELJMCXNYFrjegbkD5pFheIJXJp9mPrMYwnpZKnyYgaXJewfzJicrfRmAMoQ4Lz2c3dcnDMTQ-hTNVkpbD8QJqwhD8lLnOoxzuhNOzHtDTY7lLEzrzWs0hhQ3g0Wv2VbkoOSwnApihKB6AtlQmIppgVNNL2qH79bBJytCYh4oXWt8WaULF_6090HVoHcig86WSLn__3D4MbQ6nnHk5Ggr7gon7fxrVm69beZfnnWZJmZOhleJxJ_hA9IWoDH-L5XMhG6kAikgpumkBxSlAiZCrtRYTj6bLYWFILEOnY_iA7OZwrBHBHpqLbErGBVXNFjn8EFhgCVzRigooQpGoE8o3K6Pw%3D%3D)
Fellow American,

The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go.

That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo.

**Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority**.

Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? **Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority.**

Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans.

[](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=03981b88bae84a67af7ae4a2ebb967c7&_e=Q6ClAiUps1V-qdUYkQN5qHr_ASWOVA-VgkD-DD3ch3ZWVC9MKJiY6M-_pD0EqeoUtS2nzulOJWC1UsKooHzvHwLzdTTqteQFf9edeA-dYLt9Ud2Jp4YfQqJ86abLVaDT_VOf2kJZaPAXHbzKBBkwE-hr9acegowdscwVyzBcGmCcclhSTE5XWcbH5kkuOELJMCXNYFrjegbkD5pFheIJXJp9mPrMYwnpZKnyYgaXJewfzJicrfRmAMoQ4Lz2c3dcnDMTQ-hTNVkpbD8QJqwhD8lLnOoxzuhNOzHtDTY7lLEzrzWs0hhQ3g0Wv2VbkoOS065FmTV3x6CmiBHq1VJJTUIs617bkud-6dMssPRAgLxsPEJtyh4Xi9k0W0Irqqb_bJ0phK6OXr7XH2YIaYbmuNem7vOySYoH6uDDCffReI3_96WJTMMydiyMMoSdMayxxn413Ub4N2VsM7AV9GIhljmI0t_R-vZ9zYtmZhCeBe8Zy7ZnwWBOoGekgosQqj1tiG4dpr0KIsfqpJcAx0Wuqg%3D%3D)
That’s a mistake.

I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. **[We only need a few more Conservatives in the House to put the Democrats in the minority and prevent the Biden administration from doing more damage to our nation](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=03981b88bae84a67af7ae4a2ebb967c7&_e=Q6ClAiUps1V-qdUYkQN5qHr_ASWOVA-VgkD-DD3ch3ZWVC9MKJiY6M-_pD0EqeoUtS2nzulOJWC1UsKooHzvHwLzdTTqteQFf9edeA-dYLt9Ud2Jp4YfQqJ86abLVaDT_VOf2kJZaPAXHbzKBBkwE-hr9acegowdscwVyzBcGmCcclhSTE5XWcbH5kkuOELJMCXNYFrjegbkD5pFheIJXJp9mPrMYwnpZKnyYgaXJewfzJicrfRmAMoQ4Lz2c3dcnDMTQ-hTNVkpbD8QJqwhD8lLnOoxzuhNOzHtDTY7lLEzrzWs0hhQ3g0Wv2VbkoOS6ITPikZx958EWo7Pr0IVTYVcoKtiKbTkKvAGzp6BU4lVcfIxa8LYnb_qpdrv-x5lleOuPCRDju80qr7QrLtVBGvux8InHkCNxno4ZFJHI4UNuRGDB5uXYb9yRzuPEBvx8mOkgf248TCVaHhkFJ1LqtVXm2CD_aANkeg1kcI9y_9WuiQkbmMe3WMpujjFrGGkEx5fxJCTuagkWiOM1-lq7g%3D%3D)**.

While the election may not be this month – **we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY**.

A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for **[100,000 conservatives to join our “2022 comeback team”](http://links.ourbestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=80ebb41732384ac087921d8b617f32bf&_m=03981b88bae84a67af7ae4a2ebb967c7&_e=Q6ClAiUps1V-qdUYkQN5qHr_ASWOVA-VgkD-DD3ch3ZWVC9MKJiY6M-_pD0EqeoUtS2nzulOJWC1UsKooHzvHwLzdTTqteQFf9edeA-dYLt9Ud2Jp4YfQqJ86abLVaDT_VOf2kJZaPAXHbzKBBkwE-hr9acegowdscwVyzBcGmCcclhSTE5XWcbH5kkuOELJMCXNYFrjegbkD5pFheIJXJp9mPrMYwnpZKnyYgaXJewfzJicrfRmAMoQ4Lz2c3dcnDMTQ-hTNVkpbD8QJqwhD8lLnOoxzuhNOzHtDTY7lLEzrzWs0hhQ3g0Wv2VbkoOSakY2EOt9gE0V6ECbQbPvTINpyKAn6IQJdBh3a-NViUNZX8JqYKqF4XNniwX98rgP1qtbnWlJZquR4VXFJwTcSPyioND5xJnw6PG2alb71PYIU00Lh2rJC0oM1wks3fw7HyTCESU9YCU5DZXWuzMUVvOfVQAXmcbusoB0GiuYQap7_vCaB5gG5z4JqARklkCx8Rhi0bIQ-oohIqPDwg6G_A%3D%3D)** in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures.

We’re still looking for the additional 13,000 signatures and **we’ve set a goal of finding them by the time President Biden gives his State of the Union address on Tuesday, March 1st**.

Don't want to receive our emails? | FLIP THE HOUSE PETITION: A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress in November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures. Fellow American, The Democrats spent four years trying to stop President Trump from getting anything accomplished for the American people. Now, President Biden and Democrats in Congress are of the mindset that forcing through legislation on party-line votes is the way to go. That just doesn’t fly. In Congress, our mandate from the American people is simple: Don’t do anything dumb. Democrats haven’t gotten the memo. Democrats have the narrowest congressional majority in the last 50 years, yet they’re acting as if they have a supermajority. Clearly Pelosi, Schumer, and Biden don’t remember what happened in 2010 after they went rogue and passed Obamacare without a single Republican vote. Need a reminder? Republicans picked up 63 seats in the House and flipped the majority. Democrats are at it once again. They’ve added more than $2 trillion to our national debt in just twelve months and they’re eyeing an additional $3 trillion in spending in the coming months - with zero plans to negotiate with Republicans. That’s a mistake. I’m writing today because we must start now to win a Conservative majority in Congress. . While the election may not be this month – we must begin the groundwork for a successful campaign cycle. TODAY. A couple of months ago we sent around a petition calling for in an effort to ensure we have the right people in place to take back Congress this November. In the end, we came up short by 13,000 signatures. clean_body: | | | These seats will determine control of the House. | | | Team, new Congressional race ratings updates have dropped for February, and there’s some interesting news. Experts give us a great chance of flipping one of the AZ GOP-held Congressional seats this November! We’re used to competitive elections here in AZ, but getting news that we can FLIP a seat is energizing. Our AZ Dems in Congress have been working hard for us, helping pass infrastructure improvements and recovery act funds during the pandemic. They’ve also passed legislation to bring down prescription drug costs, scale back child care costs, and more. Republicans want to destroy all our progress. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Sincerely, Arizona Democrats For up-to-date COVID-19 information and guidance, visit Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Rick McGuire Treasurer. Arizona Democratic Party 2910 North Central Ave Phoenix AZ 85012 United States | | Sent via . body:
|
---
Hi Peter, I've just published a new blog post: [The Greatest Absurdity](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQzioqvLqgMRdUL1M7OuM0dUvrVVMZqQ_CwIn5tSe87jXj4Lg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_feb_190&n=1) California Democrats just voted to continue the State of Emergency even as we host the Super Bowl. [Here](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Trwmtk_uyVQ0nz6QZoJharPYV7LyubLS-VmNsem4io3JmBGRjnyxFWRl2KQdswy61g&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_feb_190&n=2) is the vote tally. To even get a vote, I had to make use of a special parliamentary procedure. At least now they're on the record – and they will never live this down. The entire press corps came out for [our press conference](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziorCFhzcPKqLK2q4-J0aXOanwjxyejwv78vvOaaiqedGwA&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_feb_190&n=3). Beforehand, I was given a useful prop: a mask with a picture of Newsom and Magic Johnson maskless. I [put it on](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=Bjc8XUdeJ9yV6eR3mI9Z6HRd5urWv8u8i-Pa-jQziop-hlFy8w9Q85jL7R0RQVGrL1_9ERdyx7qt3RnedZ0Utg&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_feb_190&n=4) as I spoke. Newsom attacked me personally in response, saying "Asm. Kiley and Asm. Gallagher believe it would have been better to let Californians die." He and his cronies will now come after us like never before. [I need your help today to fight back](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=09K6E4GvoPozZ73mzf50y5etLj1_9wCfyRoQ3wvVmv-GOhHPWzgYbh54Gph7Pyuk3g2mp41Qa8XyLKk0CnWqFcPhfo-70bh2d9FGRmWv-G0iUqqLQazIF6cOfkGWrQv5&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_feb_190&n=5) [Share this Post on Social Media](https://kevinkiley.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6lpHI-UVcODcFSdMgu5zpAy6DZsKP21vHbdFJ-8P3T8s_3ODEbqYZK1-66otTWvAyQ&e=eff202566bfe6143aa18c9c627e100fe&utm_source=kevinkiley&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=final_feb_190&n=6) Kevin Kiley
California Legislator
Paid for by Kevin Kiley for Congress 9458 Treelake Road, Granite Bay, CA 95746, United States

name: Kelly Schulz
subject: ICYMI: Schulz campaign releases Parental Bill of Rights
body:
| | | |
---
---
---
As governor, making sure that every single child receives a world-class education will always be a top priority.
---
---
It starts with empowering parents and making sure they have a role in the process. That’s why we need real school choice and more public charter schools.
A child’s zip code should never determine the quality of the education they receive. Unfortunately, that is the case in far too many Maryland communities. I will record fund K-12 education and fight to build new schools in every corner of our state.
We also need transparency. Public schools are public and taxpayers have a right to see how their money is being spent. And parents have a right to see what and how their children are being taught. This is common sense and old-fashioned good government.
The past two years have been a disaster for K-12 education and it’s time to recognize that and take steps to fix it. We can no longer ask our children to sacrifice for the sake of adults. It’s been clear for a long time and I will say it again – forcing young children and students to wear masks in school is wrong, clearly unnecessary, and needs to end.
Our Parental Bill of Rights lays out exactly where I stand on the most important issue in our state and is a blueprint to ensuring that every single child is given the best chance to succeed. It's my promise and commitment to both parents and students.
---
---

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Your support is critical to defeating Ron Johnson and flipping Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat from red to blue. Team — I'll cut to the chase:

[**I'm reaching out to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate in Wisconsin. Your support is so critical to defeating Ron Johnson and flipping this seat from red to blue. Click here to pitch in if you can.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/41655634/329791043/-1448701630?refcode=em22_220210_rjcoh_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220210_rjcoh_fndd_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZDdjYmUwNi1kZThhLWVjMTEtYTUwNy0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lAYBeJue9KHQvgP4OSxqNfIK8giYTmoUMiKFiYZALII=)

Election experts are saying this race is winnable because the people of Wisconsin are fed up with politicians who don’t work for them. They’re tired of leaders like Ron Johnson who do the bidding of big corporations, special interests, and their rich campaign donors. And the truth is, I don’t blame them!

There’s too much at stake in this election, and our 50/50 Democratic Senate majority just isn’t cutting it. The future of the Supreme Court, protecting voting rights, tackling the climate crisis, lowering prescription drug costs, and ending the filibuster are on the ballot.

If we want to make progress on these critical issues, we’ll need to flip Republican seats — and the latest head-to-head poll shows our campaign has the best shot to defeat Ron Johnson and grow our majority.

Look, there are a lot of Senate races in 2022, but few are more competitive than Wisconsin. In fact, this will likely end up being the most expensive Senate race in the country. And with $2.1 million cash on hand, Ron Johnson has plenty of resources to work with, which means we need to pick up the pace to hold our own.

Unfortunately, we’re slightly behind on our fundraising goals this week and I’m hoping grassroots donors like you can help us close the gap. The response to these emails has always been so incredible, can I count on you today?

[**I’m humbly asking you to add a contribution of $10 or whatever you can afford ahead of our weekly fundraising deadline. clean_body: Your support is critical to defeating Ron Johnson and flipping Wisconsin’s U.S. Senate seat from red to blue. Team — I'll cut to the chase: = Election experts are saying this race is winnable because the people of Wisconsin are fed up with politicians who don’t work for them. They’re tired of leaders like Ron Johnson who do the bidding of big corporations, special interests, and their rich campaign donors. And the truth is, I don’t blame them! There’s too much at stake in this election, and our 50/50 Democratic Senate majority just isn’t cutting it. The future of the Supreme Court, protecting voting rights, tackling the climate crisis, lowering prescription drug costs, and ending the filibuster are on the ballot. If we want to make progress on these critical issues, we’ll need to flip Republican seats — and the latest head-to-head poll shows our campaign has the best shot to defeat Ron Johnson and grow our majority. Look, there are a lot of Senate races in 2022, but few are more competitive than Wisconsin. In fact, this will likely end up being the most expensive Senate race in the country. And with $2.1 million cash on hand, Ron Johnson has plenty of resources to work with, which means we need to pick up the pace to hold our own. [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a4636cc46f5a4767ab45dfef36fdf534&_e=dca5XtGzrs8zFI7YhHB7riYXLqOWyxyU0YsMe3aBKgSWqYWKaZuHbmMg7DVGcw87VlcOs4Wyh3yL-yMwC7dAT9Slq2TQ9P_Q0gdn2zRqkv5MgheyQE244DS_9R2p95DnA3G90snST5TQRsq5mh5kr3a-rXjQzJTTrh96xzkTNhieojG6HSd74qS5SWGfKUYLBzh_KP6vgKRnV-109vKNZp-f8z5gVIgx86Kla2NoxcxtyLNZXluBfdcJCICWlb7a7S2K53MI4_STCwz6b01s_bk6KQquN9ZPUFjZ1zaSpE1iX2L5QvqjajzN6KThomeFSDuBRzbPvsZuSXWnTUxJxMFisBbC-cGxAlNKea4rS-EI08I4FLPA1cZqOAWJ2imXMotctNvoQdFBLhKqj9XGRUaXox45ZevY4sq1iRtzpwZC_NpwmzSdfc7FD0AvfGuihXCHtwEfCThd-q6bWdCU4d1QKs4Uu0V_cc9tcYYALlI%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**_FIRST_** , Raphael Warnock won a 2021 special election by about 100,000 votes - out of more than 4 million ballots cast - becoming the first Democrat to win election to the Senate from Georgia since 2000.

**_THEN_** , Senator Warnock, using the national donor list he built during the 2021 runoff race, raised $32 million in his bid for a full six-year term in this fall's midterm elections.

**_NOW_** , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy.

That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves.

_This race is going to be the most expensive race of the 2022 cycle._

We know that it's only February, but if Republicans want to retake the Senate, we need your support NOW. **[It's going to take thousands of hours of work to catch up with our opponent's fundraising, which is why we're emailing you today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a4636cc46f5a4767ab45dfef36fdf534&_e=dca5XtGzrs8zFI7YhHB7riYXLqOWyxyU0YsMe3aBKgSWqYWKaZuHbmMg7DVGcw87VlcOs4Wyh3yL-yMwC7dAT9Slq2TQ9P_Q0gdn2zRqkv5MgheyQE244DS_9R2p95DnA3G90snST5TQRsq5mh5kr3a-rXjQzJTTrh96xzkTNhieojG6HSd74qS5SWGfKUYLBzh_KP6vgKRnV-109vKNZp-f8z5gVIgx86Kla2NoxcxtyLNZXluBfdcJCICWlb7a7S2K53MI4_STCwz6b01s_W4EpyQif4xd-ukz4oLfWbYC5eKJ_LNbi1A3k730vtUl0xishkN_isNf3yp8G71hrFffuiWuUXBQauFbNqqq8b89tOY59B_DVIT-UpzrraFbyagyCEGqs4xXm9e8zEZJRCOPc7Lcip7IPqdoOvMic2TLLkcwl-aZW1SP1EbE8yItY7ptrOstu8x7zp9uod2R9FYkLJung4gvkYgY5wR0rR0%3D)**

One of our biggest hurdles is complacency. We must start NOW.

**[Team Herschel is looking for 4,000 conservative patriots to make a gift of $6 or more today to help us close the fundraising gap with our opponent. subject: Democrat Leader Tell Parents to Stay Out of Their Kids Schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=snodgrasstweet_1&n=1)
---
Friend -- Wisconsin Democrat leaders are finally saying the quiet part out loud. The Wisconsin Democrats Vice Chair just told Wisconsin parents they shouldn't have any control over their child's public education. **This is just their latest insult to parents across Wisconsin.** Many areas across Wisconsin are having serious concerns over school curriculum, but it is no shock that Democrats are telling Wisconsin parents to take their concerns elsewhere. **This out of touch rhetoric must not stand!********** There are important School Board primary elections taking place across the state next Tuesday, February 15th! It is imperative that we turn out for those elections so we can fight back against ideas like this! Click **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=6tHPUOz_QyJBsFbb3HDnJj2oXbbIoglmEkF7rO8ZMAeBuay5CGbW87_VUow_ACcN&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=snodgrasstweet_1&n=2) **to find out if you have a primary near you or contact your local county party, **[here](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0a23sM2IsUfkW7JDTb3cKks31us6ZQgMJq21hg5RtYyk&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=snodgrasstweet_1&n=3)**.

clean_body: | Friend -- Wisconsin Democrat leaders are finally saying the quiet part out loud. The Wisconsin Democrats Vice Chair just told Wisconsin parents they shouldn't have any control over their child's public education. This is just their latest insult to parents across Wisconsin. Many areas across Wisconsin are having serious concerns over school curriculum, but it is no shock that Democrats are telling Wisconsin parents to take their concerns elsewhere. This out of touch rhetoric must not stand!****** There are important School Board primary elections taking place across the state next Tuesday, February 15th! It is imperative that we turn out for those elections so we can fight back against ideas like this! Click to find out if you have a primary near you or contact your local county party, **. name: POST OFFICE UPDATE (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Louis DeJoy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Do you SUPPORT President Biden's move to OUST Louis DeJoy and his allies from USPS leadership?
| | | **WASHINGTON POST REPORT:
President Biden OUSTS key Louis DeJoy ally at the Post Office**

---
Did you see this?!

President Biden took a MAJOR step forward in finally removing Louis DeJoy -- _Trump 's hand-picked Postmaster General_ \-- from power at the USPS.

After all DeJoy and Trump have done to undermine this essential service, we're so proud to see President Biden take decisive action.

But we need to know if our best grassroots supporters have President Biden's back.

[**So quickly,****let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden 's move to OUST Louis DeJoy and his allies from USPS leadership?**********](https://links.e.dccc.)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
SURVEY RESPONSE: [MISSING >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/0L9VcXX-)
| [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et66GbWB-)
---

We can't believe what we're seeing.

Louis DeJoy, Trump's hand-picked postmaster general, has been responsible for RUTHLESS attacks on the Post Office -- _making critical deliveries PRICIER and PERMANENTLY slower. _

**But President Biden made a HEROIC decision to oust one of DeJoy 's strongest allies at the USPS -- which means we're one step closer to finally REMOVING this Trump crony from power once and for all.**

The fight isn't over yet, though. And at this pivotal moment for the postal service, we need to know President Biden and our Democrats have strong support from this grassroots team. ****

---
[So quickly, let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden's move to OUST Louis DeJoy and his allies from USPS leadership? ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/4E6Vs33~6mC-)
---

Thanks,

DCCC

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority \-- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all.
