name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Let's get this straight...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We just got some really frustrating news, and we're writing to share with you.
#
Derek, we gotta tell you about something pretty crazy.
Tuesday marked *one* year since John Fetterman officially launched this campaign. It’s been a thrill. Getting to meet people around Pennsylvania. Seeing the outpouring of volunteer support, and more than 180,000 donors stepping up to give.
We're not a campaign that obsesses about polls. Really. But if you're counting, we've been ahead — far ahead — in every primary poll. We're polling above the Republicans, too. We have more grassroots donors than any candidate in the race, one of the highest of any Democratic Senate challenger in the country. We have volunteers in 66/67 counties (if you’re from Sullivan County, please let us know).
**So let's get this straight... You can be in the lead in the polls... Have the most grassroots donors... Raise the most money... Have more volunteers... And STILL a super PAC can come in and try to nuke your chances of winning?**
That's what just happened in our race, Derek. It really sucks. We are winning this race the right way — more voters, more donors, more volunteers. Our opponents in the primary know that. **So now they're resorting to a super PAC to win.**
POLITICO just reported that allies of one of our Democratic primary opponents Conor Lamb are raising $8 million to spend on ads to defeat John in this primary. Even more money than we have in the bank. They're not raising that $25 at a time like we are. They're just getting giant, unlimited checks for a super PAC.
How *insane* is that? If you’re an ultra-rich donor and you see a candidate is winning who isn’t your favorite, you just set up a super PAC and pour $8 million into it, and you can change the race?
Derek, We know we’ve asked each and every one of you for a lot lately. It’s expensive to run a campaign like ours. But John's never needed support more than right now. We’ve got to be able to ensure we can stand up to all the big money — from the Democratic or Republican side.
**Will you make your best donation today to help us respond to this gigantic super PAC attack? Here’s the link to give:**
**[johnfetterman.com/super-pac-fight-back](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/43989?refcode=ema20220210-4537&t=1&akid=4537%2E434096%2EmbI4Zv)**
It's BS how much money is in our politics these days. But in order to win on the issues we care about, we need to be able to respond to the millions of dollars flowing in on both sides of the aisle.
Thank you for sticking by our side. It’s meant a lot to be surrounded by so many good people the past 12 months since we launched. We couldn’t do this without you.
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220210-4537-footer&t=2&refcode2=4537_434096_mbI4Zv&akid=4537%2E434096%2EmbI4Zv)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=4537%2E434096%2EmbI4Zv)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4537%2E434096%2EmbI4Zv)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Jayapal HQ
subject: Did you see this GOP tweet about Medicare for All?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
The fact is, before AND during the pandemic, Medicare for All in the United States would have SAVED lives.
#
Peter,
It is now commonplace for Republican politicians to spread misinformation about elections, COVID, the rule of law, and so much more. Just yesterday, one GOP Congressman tweeted something very misleading (and ridiculous) about Medicare for All.
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9948?refcode=em20220210-1023&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=1023%2E420207%2ETc-x5O)
We know, from the science, that older folks are more susceptible to Covid-19. It has nothing to do with Medicare or Medicare for All. This tweet is just ridiculous (we had to say it again).
The fact is, before AND during the pandemic, Medicare for All in the United States would have SAVED lives. When there’s more public funding for health care and people don’t have to put their health at risk because they’re worried about paying health care bills, people get the treatment they need, people are healthier, and lives are saved.
**Peter, this is why Pramila continues our collective fight for Medicare for All, single-payer universal guaranteed health care in America.**
[**Can you chip in to support Pramila’s advocacy? Not only do we have to counter the misinformation of the GOP, we are also fighting corporate lobbyists from Big Pharma and health insurance companies.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9948?refcode=em20220210-1023&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1023%2E420207%2ETc-x5O)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9948?refcode=em20220210-1023&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1023%2E420207%2ETc-x5O)**
Pramila has 121 co-sponsors on the Medicare for All Act of 2021, the most House co-sponsors ever for M4A. More and more candidates are supporting and running on Medicare for All, and more Democrats in the House are stepping up to co-sponsor single-payer health care.
During the pandemic, we heard stories of people getting stuck with bills for Covid tests even though they were supposed to be free. This will always happen in a system driven by profit and greed. There will always be loopholes and corporations taking advantage of people. In an average year, Medicare for All would save tens of thousands of lives, by guaranteeing people can get the care they need with no cost at the point of service.
Our fight for Medicare for All will continue, and each year we build momentum. We have more than half of the House Democratic Caucus on board for M4A. We need to keep our fight strong and our momentum going.
[**Can you chip in $3 to fuel Pramila’s leadership on Medicare for All. Corporations and the GOP will continue their misinformation campaigns, but we must build our movement for single-payer to fight back.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9948?refcode=em20220210-1023&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=1023%2E420207%2ETc-x5O)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220210-1023-footer&t=23&refcode2=1023_420207_Tc-x5O&akid=1023%2E420207%2ETc-x5O)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

clean_body: No Private Security for Anti-Police Democrats! SIGN THE PETITION NOW! I’m circulating a petition to demand NO PRIVATE SECURITY for anti-police Democrats, will you add your name immediately? | Peter, Rep. Cori Bush is a leading socialist member of Congress who wants to defund the police, yet she spent tens of thousands of dollars on a right-wing private security firm that promotes the Second Amendment. The truth has been revealed: Democrats’ safety matters...but they don’t care about YOURS one bit! This is the Democrat Party’s “finest” in 2022 and candidates across the nation are just like her - especially here in Oregon CD-4. Their agenda has already proven to be deadly. Criminals have been emboldened by the Far-Left's rhetoric, and there’s a crime wave gripping our nation today with a massive surge in homicide rates. Homicides in Portland, Oregon increased 83% from 2020 to 2021. Portland had more homicides in 2021 than some larger cities, including San Francisco, and twice as many slayings as Seattle. I cannot sit back and watch my home state be dismantled by deadly violence as these Leftist politicians hide behind private security from their ivory towers in Washington. Cori Bush represents the Democrat Party right NOW: Increasingly radical, out-of-touch and dangerous. The DNC wants to secure this type of Democrat across the nation and they are running in THIS Oregon race. This is what Far-Left elitism looks like and it's not going anywhere, unless we defeat the Democrats this Fall. I need your immediate help to not only expose the radical-Left’s hypocrisy but END their anti-police agenda and protect the American people. Peter, if the Democrats are willing to spend tens of thousands of dollars on private security, there’s no telling how much they’ll dole out to silence conservatives, like me, who are hell bent on exposing them. I need you in this fight alongside me, Peter. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. clean_body: $293 Hi there, I’m only $293 away from today’s goal! Please chip in here >>> My background as a housing organizer is in direct action. Direct actions I co-led resulted in 200 shelter beds being added to Tacoma’s shelter network, along with other wins. Direct action gets the goods. That’s why I plan to combine my seat in Congress with direct action. When you apply pressure, suddenly the system finds itself able to do things that were “impossible” before. For example, the City of Tacoma claimed it couldn’t provide trash service to homeless camps. So we picked up two moving trucks’ worth of trash from some camps and dumped it in front of City Hall. The trash was gone within hours. Voila! = What got us here won’t get us there. It’s the politicians in power right now who have gotten us to the brink of environmental collapse, mass homelessness, and 30 million people without healthcare. We need new people with a new approach: electoral politics + direct action. That’s how I’m different from politicians who have let you down before. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = Thank you, -Rebecca Parson Candidate for Congress, WA-06 To contribute via check, please address to: Rebecca for Washington PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 Rebecca Parson for Congress PO Box 111388 Tacoma, WA 98411 United States Paid for by Rebecca for Washington If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

clean_body: This is extremely important, so I had to follow up. | Peter, I cannot overstate how crucial this race is. If we don’t win, Nancy Pelosi and her socialist colleagues will keep power in Washington... ...and we’ll be in for at least another two years of open borders, international humiliations, and economic ruin. Juan and I can stop it this November and get our country back on track. But we can’t do it alone. Thank you, Steve Scalise House Republican Whip \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Steve Scalise Date: Tues, February 8, 2022 Subject: This is a MUST WIN for conservatives To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter, Our chances of FIRING Nancy Pelosi have never been better... But control of the House will still come down to a handful of key races – including this toss-up Arizona district where conservative fighter Juan Ciscomani will go toe-to-toe with a radical, Pelosi-backed socialist. With so much riding on the outcome of this one critical race, Nancy Pelosi and her DCCC are gearing up to spend MILLIONS here in Arizona to try and torpedo Juan’s campaign. That’s why I promised him I’d reach out to every grassroots patriot I know to help him marshal the resources he needs to FIGHT BACK. As Republican Whip, I know what a successful conservative fighter looks like, and Juan is exactly the type of Representative we need to get America back on the right track. He embodies the American dream, and I know he’ll fight for YOU each and every day in the halls of Congress. That’s why I was proud to endorse his grassroots campaign: But Nancy Pelosi will stop at nothing to save her House majority, and she’s doing everything she can to destroy all the momentum Juan’s built. I hope I can count on YOU to help power us to victory in this critical race. Thank you, Steve Scalise House Republican Whip PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
subject: National Journal says Cheri is uniquely suited to flip North Carolina!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
North Carolina is one of only two open toss-up seats anywhere in the entire country.
#

National Journal’s Hotline just released their first Senate race rankings of the cycle, and they ranked North Carolina as one of Democrats’ top pick-up opportunities.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220210-1-ma&refcode2=391.357359.cHmz01&t=1&akid=391%2E357359%2EcHmz01)
According to National Journal, North Carolina is one of only two open toss-up seats anywhere in the entire country, and their experts say that Cheri Beasley is uniquely well-positioned to win — even in a tough national environment for Democrats.
**“If any candidate can beat back those strong headwinds, it’s former state Supreme Court Chief Justice Cheri Beasley.”
\- National Journal**
That’s a testament to our grassroots movement and the strength of Cheri’s candidacy. She’s proven herself as a fighter for justice and the people — winning statewide twice already. With your support, we can mobilize the large and diverse coalition of voters we need to flip this seat.
[**Will you donate $3 or whatever you can to our campaign today to keep up our momentum and flip this seat? This is a people-powered campaign through and through — not a dime from corporate PACs, so every dollar counts.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-feb22?refcode=em220210-1-ma&refcode2=391.357359.cHmz01&t=2&akid=391%2E357359%2EcHmz01)

name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Proud to have you in this fight for progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We need all hands on deck. Can you pitch in?
# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
Hello,
There’s a lot on the line with this year’s election. And with our Senate majority hanging in the balance, we need all hands on deck to keep Vermont and the Senate blue.
Peter got into public service early in his life, and learned the best way to serve communities is to listen to the people who will feel the biggest impact of new policies in their day to day lives. As Vermont’s Congressman, he’s listened to Vermonters across the state and has been instrumental in the fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, confront climate change, and protect our imperiled democracy.
If elected as Vermont’s next Senator, Peter will continue to deliver for Vermonters and people across the country — and do it the Vermont way. But we need your help to make it happen.
[**Peter is ready to fight for us on Day One, but he can’t do it alone. Can we count on you to chip in $15 to send his progressive voice to the Senate?**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=3&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, you donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=14&amount=3&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=16&amount=15&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
---
| [$28](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=18&amount=28&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
---
| [$50](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=20&amount=50&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
---
| [$100](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=10&amount=100&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
---
| [OTHER](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=12&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
---

---
This grassroots team we’re building is strong — but to keep our momentum going we need to show the Mitch McConnell Republicans that we won’t allow them to buy this seat just so they can stand in the way of progress.
[**Pitch in $15 or whatever you can to show you’re ready for progress and to keep this seat blue.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/1337?t=7&akid=101%2E61531%2E0XhakB)
Thanks for being a part of this movement. It’s going to take all of us fighting together to win.
Team Welch

---

| Friend,

On Day one of Joe Biden’s regime, he canceled pipelines across our country and enacted anti-energy policies. After four years of energy independence and record low gas prices under President Donald J. Trump, it took Joe Biden less than a year to get us into this mess.

Gas prices in parts of Georgia have risen to $4.09 per gallon! That is a 72% increase in gas prices since Joe Biden took office. Joe Biden promised to build back better, but the people of Georgia can NOT AFFORD his radical left energy policies for one day longer. We need to elect a strong, America First Congress to reverse these disastrous policies and make America energy independent again! [If you are sick of Joe Biden’s gas prices, Join My Team Today!](https://davidcurryforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=852ebb75cc52ccc1113c21207&id=98ec2c120f&e=598f6aa24c) Together, we will get this country back on track and make it affordable for you to drive yourself to and from work, provide for your family, and take a trip to see loved ones. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: FWD - AOC was right about Manchin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, the bulk of
the Democratic policy agenda — health care, fighting climate change, paid
family and medical leave, lowering prescription drug costs, and so much
more — came down to Democratic leadership listening to either the Squad or
Joe Manchin.

Unfortunately, the Democratic establishment listened to Joe Manchin and
now Build Back Better is “dead” according to Manchin. The Squad were the
only ones to vote with the people, while corporate Democrats voted with
Manchin.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93514?refcode=em20220210-21919&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]The Squad and Justice Democrats are the future of politics, but only if
we have the resources to elect more of our candidates and re-elect AOC,
Ilhan, Rashida, Cori, Jamaal, and Ayanna. Can you chip in $3
to fund our progressive fight for the future?

Check out the update we sent last week and make sure to chip in so we can
upend the status quo in the Democratic Party.

- Team JD

-----Forwarded Message-----
Sent: February 2, 2022
From: JusticeDemocrats.com
Subject: AOC was right about Manchin

Peter, Joe
Manchin isn’t interested in passing any of our progressive priorities. And
the Squad knew it from the very beginning. Here’s Manchin joking about
obstructing progressive policies in Build Back Better yesterday:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93514?refcode=em20220210-21919&t=1003&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]Tweet from reporter Manu Raju reads Sen. Joe Manchin, asked about Build
Back Better, said: 'What Build Back Better bill? I don’t know what you
guys are talking about.' I asked him if he’s had any talks on the matter
since December. 'No, no, no, no. It’s dead.'

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez didn’t like Manchin’s apathy in the face of
millions who need Democrats to act. Here’s her response:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93514?refcode=em20220210-21919&t=1004&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]Tweet from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez reads Seniors, kids, & people with
disabilities in my community have been sleeping with bubble jackets on in
18 degree nights, despite paying rent, bc the NYCHA funding to fix their
heating and capital needs is in BBB. Where should I direct them to wait
out the cold? Manchin’s yacht?

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan
Omar, and Ayanna Pressley all urged Democrats to make sure Manchin
couldn’t pass his bipartisan infrastructure bill WITHOUT also passing
Build Back Better. The Squad even voted against the establishment. But the
corporate Democratic Party passed the infrastructure bill anyways. And now
the core social and economic reforms of the Democratic agenda are (still)
being blocked by Manchin.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93514?refcode=em20220210-21919&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]We need to show that Justice Democrats and the Squad are the future of
politics, and the ones that will truly fight for economic, social, racial,
and environmental justice. Can you chip in a $3 donation
today to stand with the Squad and highlight the failures of the Democratic
Party?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93514?refcode=em20220210-21919&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1024&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]Contribute $3

Last year, corporate Democrats joined with Republicans to put climate
action, universal pre-K, paid leave, and Medicare expansion at risk. The
Squad voted against the political establishment, and for good reason.

The Squad was right not to trust corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin.
Corporate Democrats promised the people they would pass Build Back Better
if Congress just passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill first. Now,
Manchin simply sneers at Build Back Better.

Cori, Jamaal, Alexandria, Rashida, Ilhan, and Ayanna were the only
Democrats to vote WITH THE PEOPLE.

When it comes down to it, corporate Democrats do not want to pass popular
progressive policies. It’s on the Justice Democrats in Congress — and the
grassroots movement behind them — to hold the line in the fight for
working people.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/93514?refcode=em20220210-21919&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1025&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]We need to back up the Squad. We need to show that we are the future
of the Democratic party, not the same old politicians voting with
corporate lobbyists and maintaining the status quo. Can you make a
$3 donation to Justice Democrats today to protect and
expand the Squad in Congress?

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1026&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1027&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4 ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220210-21919-footer&t=1028&refcode2=21919_1203867_ncnmh4&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1029&akid=21919%2E1203867%2Encnmh4

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, the bulk of the Democratic policy agenda — health care, fighting climate change, paid family and medical leave, lowering prescription drug costs, and so much more — came down to Democratic leadership listening to either the Squad or Joe Manchin. Unfortunately, the Democratic establishment listened to Joe Manchin and now Build Back Better is “dead” according to Manchin. The Squad were the only ones to vote with the people, while corporate Democrats voted with Manchin. [ ]The Squad and Justice Democrats are the future of politics, but only if we have the resources to elect more of our candidates and re-elect AOC, Ilhan, Rashida, Cori, Jamaal, and Ayanna. Can you chip in $3 to fund our progressive fight for the future? Check out the update we sent last week and make sure to chip in so we can upend the status quo in the Democratic Party. - Team JD -----Forwarded Message----- Sent: February 2, 2022 From: JusticeDemocrats.com Subject: AOC was right about Manchin Peter, Joe Manchin isn’t interested in passing any of our progressive priorities. And the Squad knew it from the very beginning. Here’s Manchin joking about obstructing progressive policies in Build Back Better yesterday: [ ]Tweet from reporter Manu Raju reads Sen. Joe Manchin, asked about Build Back Better, said: 'What Build Back Better bill? I don’t know what you guys are talking about.' I asked him if he’s had any talks on the matter since December. 'No, no, no, no. It’s dead.' Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez didn’t like Manchin’s apathy in the face of millions who need Democrats to act. Here’s her response: [ ]Tweet from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez reads Seniors, kids, & people with disabilities in my community have been sleeping with bubble jackets on in 18 degree nights, despite paying rent, bc the NYCHA funding to fix their heating and capital needs is in BBB. Where should I direct them to wait out the cold? Manchin’s yacht? Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Cori Bush, Jamaal Bowman, Rashida Tlaib, Ilhan Omar, and Ayanna Pressley all urged Democrats to make sure Manchin couldn’t pass his bipartisan infrastructure bill WITHOUT also passing Build Back Better. The Squad even voted against the establishment. But the corporate Democratic Party passed the infrastructure bill anyways. And now the core social and economic reforms of the Democratic agenda are (still) being blocked by Manchin. [ ]We need to show that Justice Democrats and the Squad are the future of politics, and the ones that will truly fight for economic, social, racial, and environmental justice. Can you chip in a $3 donation today to stand with the Squad and highlight the failures of the Democratic Party? [ ]Contribute $3 Last year, corporate Democrats joined with Republicans to put climate action, universal pre-K, paid leave, and Medicare expansion at risk. The Squad voted against the political establishment, and for good reason. The Squad was right not to trust corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin. Corporate Democrats promised the people they would pass Build Back Better if Congress just passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill first. Now, Manchin simply sneers at Build Back Better. Cori, Jamaal, Alexandria, Rashida, Ilhan, and Ayanna were the only Democrats to vote WITH THE PEOPLE. When it comes down to it, corporate Democrats do not want to pass popular progressive policies. It’s on the Justice Democrats in Congress — and the grassroots movement behind them — to hold the line in the fight for working people. [ ]We need to back up the Squad. We need to show that we are the future of the Democratic party, not the same old politicians voting with corporate lobbyists and maintaining the status quo. Can you make a $3 donation to Justice Democrats today to protect and expand the Squad in Congress? In solidarity, Justice Democrats Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [ ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [ ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department. Contribute to Justice Democrats:

**_NOW_** , we're in a “statistical dead heat” in the race for Georgia's Senate seat. BUT Warnock's got more than $23 million in the bank (cash) that he is using to make an $861,000 ad buy.

That's why we're asking you to help us close the gap between what our opponent has in the bank and what we've got in our reserves.

name: Official AOC Campaign
subject: Smart moves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria never shies away from fighting for what is right.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220210-2783-header&t=1&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)
This is big news.
In response to mounting pressure from Alexandria, our movement, and others in Congress, **House Democratic leaders, including Speaker Nancy Pelosi, announced support for legislation to address ‘conflicted stock trading’ for Members of Congress.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220210?refcode=em20220210-2783-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2783_2526796_9iEhdc&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)
Alexandria never shies away from fighting for what is right. She along with Reps. Krishnamoorthi and Neguse and Senator Merkley introduced a bill _three_ years ago to ban stock trading because Members of Congress should not have an unfair advantage to profit off the ups and downs in the stock market. Period.
Over the last few years, Alexandria has repeatedly stated that Members of Congress should not have access to privileged information and be able to hold and trade individual stocks at the same time. Her voice in conjunction with all of us is moving the needle forward and we’re so grateful, but there’s still a ways to go.
[With Alexandria’s primary coming up this June, can we count on you to chip in $3 to keep our momentum going to ban stock trading for good and reelect Alexandria to Congress this year?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220210?refcode=em20220210-2783-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&refcode2=2783_2526796_9iEhdc&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220210?refcode=em20220210-2783-P_FND_ANO_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2783_2526796_9iEhdc&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)**
Every dollar helps our movement continue to fight for what is right and allows Alexandria to focus on what’s most important.
Thank you for your support.
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220210?refcode=em20220210-2783-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=23&refcode2=2783_2526796_9iEhdc&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20220210-2783-P_FND_ANO_LEG&t=24&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2783%2E2526796%2E9iEhdc)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Fellow American,

**The elitist politicians in Washington D.C. have gone soft and taken our nation off track.** That's why I'm ready to go to war again for the values we cherish, the future of our children, and the soul of America.

[**My name is Tony Cowden and I'm running for Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4Os19zZDtPF6l_tP1gG-atN4ARWWBQNBSW6VSmLeSvVmHIFfuswVJEie8VBIKwdTL_7Lnn2swOtIB0MdvU7lltQRtLNmZuse6SjIfJZsF6hCJrs2mr7YzfJP7A10x2MN6OLdUYAFQr_FsLxR8azTV7LF8QI0uhPW6Y4bZis8F-DwE02AaeLdXeR5LZ8CtDc3iYAjiGAx1XOJ2zpNM9jF6pg1A%3D%3D) I'm a former Special Forces Soldier and CIA Operative that served for years on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan. **If I learned anything from my time fighting America's enemies, it's that** _**corrupt intentions will thrive when good people do nothing.**_

[**That's why I need your help Fellow American, because we need to win back our nation from the D.C. Politicians that sell their souls to enrich themselves. Are you willing to fight by my side?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4Os_TPvDxjFmDvxFhHuvdjG3FYh8QIp04mfgofyk_IOcW05GnQ2yabWBel7Z2Iep5kNbvwQnNmp6uKUuV6ObNgyi570yfOZMyj9j9xCizJOgjGB07NEAThchm8_yvtdUnUDB986FE9Z6Vgbihi3iEko2-pP4oED7aUAaE4ZXY8WAlS2XmGidwDue6-_UrD0lvQlXsgGHGxdsrkX3QZC2zdrPA%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH TONY >> FIGHT FOR AMERICA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4OsX0hTrMZGPSCVGA2Oc5Hg-1us1B1ZvWxkcZ-XcGhvm88kfO43mfRUvrRqIlYxPvakEbPqzx525Bho5URih1uAbs0p8hKL-MpYvfQGQOF3vvSh8OUbSBhSi9Ckxv8rcnXKrQh-mDIM9DYHJ8swbBIyiAT7dv-zzxs8O8LFcvOh17W3-JGMKchOr3J9jH66tMouPZqUpPzvh-QG41JtP4B94g%3D%3D)
**I didn't face down Osama bin Laden's terrorists in Tora Bora, Afghanistan or survive the killing fields of Fallujah, Iraq just to come home and watch America descend into hate and divide.**

Politicians like Biden and Pelosi have done nothing but push radical politics while lunging for more power and control over our lives. _**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!**_

I'm running for Congress to represent you Fellow American, because America needs people like us from all over this nation to fight this political war for America's future. [**If you're willing to stand by my side, then please chip in $5, $15, or more if you can, to make sure Pelosi and Biden don't stop our efforts to win back Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4OsB9r_Qd-FboaWV9c5o50AnmkI_Ec7cCC7A4DBEip22uE30aY0x5T-LJMvzE7a39FVO0biZneV8Or51uJ3m0xAuzTOEDKlJJC23QBJ2HP-GdXPyK5nyqF4lQZSpCPeHi_eJApS0nTO0CUfFO_A_a-30VPdlC55v--1hBtIZQK2raUiAXFEulypOGBIKTTUIFxqC0L9msPkfo5ncihRUUCZfA%3D%3D)

I need to know you're with me if we're going to win this thing, [**so let me know if you're in or not.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4Os_ClQHRzNJSSQB--Xpg1LJxqM3KmklM7sNMjwCF9KWfnquq1KTmbPaeF8HiVYHscAMuEi0UHxixNcLoD2GnnV2Q5BCAQUGA2xch8vQV0lxTNbesgIqfd0ofRNr7fpLggJzJ5gZksZltMSVx_ncP1Izb1qb33jc25zHgCeWJjPpGz54D3gWJyTWH-Q2RW6XW6-8Ivoy-i7GqUYZtc9D699eA%3D%3D)

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4OshgaJCc1CDQX1TY7zqvEbIAlAeUb_nLMbfRlhArEHuo_RgA015oHqN3grn56wAYIM1qspTWBZbWTBRe95w3CnKAoofnTUkzfR6ylDLvmpBaRcwOgfx48KCQvif0eU-AiILdEpEUCpo-HL5leocia7OI9nHCDuYG8BOHsI4RR0gWtsoQ7aOKhPjDRzcB13MjNstWInKGRAir8hJk52VenIGg%3D%3D)
**Tony Cowden**
Candidate for Congress (NC-4)

[** STAND WITH TONY >> FIGHT FOR AMERICA **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4OsbSB86xBURlk4JHaMx6IDq5UmHZfa7SJARqEIOqILYpJ-zN1-nVEJon0G-WlBZO9NfVcCdtlirPPqSSxqDxD0yGhFum3jwL1yr9MidSxohDNRX2jNFL-7yCTNdMUqIY4adcFoiTzfCni5rcvmb7pYorRbdik7cZ3wzNbTNFcyKa5nIkaj6q5SMQ8vbIaaUp_jIbXZp8M1k2QK8SY8EJojVA%3D%3D)

* * *
Tony Cowden spent over 20 years of his life fighting America's enemies with the U.S. Army Green Berets and eventually the CIA, but Tony's service didn't stop there.

When he came home, Tony became an activist for his fellow veterans as well as small business owner in his community. Now there's a new battle in Washington D.C. where we need principled Conservative leaders like Tony Cowden, serving in Congress.

[**If you believe we need to get America back on track and serving the American people, then please stand with Tony Cowden, and support his campaign to win back Congress.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4Os0W86Wl28JCUC9ewdDqp2xcV4SPWb5v8XNrODy8T_KQ2mFt7v-PuH-oKbRRbdV8ZBxAxb3JGEuMDGhKpKv-jvDkLsE3sND6Tz_tkANfAgbOpjVTFtZjx0riQHuPIi9mKiTtJT39X18cgyyjhAKGBjU7_Mofst6kaRzKEiKeNw8U3Jk5YvOEV4sLb8wcEj749Gi_L9RnM9su-PWF_ljil6ag%3D%3D)

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f16d490fbf6344c693321421005f7ebc&_e=t8a7p-CiMpkxb2qoVdZHY57M9I_G-BrAcTdbq74ie8CRetHZ03wofMj4hwtccCKWWxVZ3UI_mt2Zc2ZCpFjYj3RGnluWGsiM6IU5EquahBeIPibpvo8jNrLG1cHB3JyEUhSwit21mRIORmaKjF5RF8_SZF-erYO4SRtV_vv1XTEamtlV1_fl1CJ5ok5n5D7xOroHjI1rlCcFlVMXke3H_iuFxh9vJD90us-vX568COSYrFZg4g8ifk43U4UWH4OsE99G3fHaLJnVNNc7m_iyruqMM_nP1RIdJ6CFaeU9savxEQiS8-JtVY5CVP6z4HmAAB0-B-a4OHAznJ8A4KZuoSxPfpH9CmhVQSI_4Nzoc4UXPI872SC_Pa9GPAuDZ24-qJAGAFtRMrXUUSTdtuLzTjRkK81oAoY-0911L-kYs_gmhUYpJqntVFKViWXpxylyg7Dgl6_9Gq6XLzG3hnK5Kg%3D%3D)

| | | PAID FOR BY
TONY COWDEN FOR CONGRESS

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yRkW_Sw2xr1MvIXEt6jooTbMnsVYqhUO8Xwt4ORz78OfUg7g0bT3KWj5PFlOrwylcmVHgVhvfe2ZPl5W7AdMasK_Os345HBjPZ8s-FPFsGI22iaftmlDS1kzE1HYUdzrNV4l3ckFEnDSlEFqEsa5zgt1q89y4hqsVZULUyIfpYK8jchNOEPl1f7m7ZjYf3d4eGhzzH0KVe_7psIIwcZunjNPoyKWZeCVuC775vfjcbNZK0eTYyJby9-zLvDGgOPcNUPjG5-rhx8v6unA6Ax4A1yaLSTkBNTL8hERQqvzRlYjM6tCBDtEZIoI9bCCDZoZJPAKAm7TJrp5t7dQwZDYPz0UW276Mz-l-UFkGDe0HkwQ/3jg/KhVbzhDUQw2C7yeKAKknpQ/h0/oDvqhiFzPc87L0sfCCGgDiZoSv6OIrRNVjsRtLvOeR4)
| | Dear Peter, While every day on the campaign trail is different from the next, one thing that seems to remain true in politics is that things change quickly. We’re grateful this week to stand in a remarkably different position than we did only just a few weeks ago, when many observers still falsely presumed that Pelosi would retire, creating an open seat. The various career politicians described as her potential replacements in the press are all committed to their careers before the issues, which is why none of them are willing to face the incumbent. Business Insider pa | | | | | Dear Peter, While every day on the campaign trail is different from the next, one thing that seems to remain true in politics is that things change quickly. We’re grateful this week to stand in a remarkably different position than we did only just a few weeks ago, when many observers still falsely presumed that Pelosi would retire, creating an open seat. The various career politicians described as her potential replacements in the press are all committed to their careers before the issues, which is why none of them are willing to face the incumbent. Earlier this week, Business Insider published a profile about me and our 2022 campaign observing our long history of calling out conflicts of interest, particularly insider trading by Members of Congress. The article explores congressional insider trading, quoting me as saying, “She spent 34 years enriching herself at the public's expense. And this is how.” While Buttar...said he's glad the rest of the world has finally caught up, he's also apoplectic that it took everyone so long. He called Pelosi out about her finances in April 2021, inquiring on social media whether she was serving "her constituents or her $140-million portfolio." "This is unapologetic, open corruption," Buttar said.... "It's a conflict of interest that invites corporate influence into their substantive decision making," he said of the status quo, casting the fossil fuels distributors, drug makers, and defense contractors packed into lawmakers' financial portfolios as powerful puppeteers. "Members of Congress are more committed to those industries than their constituents precisely because they make money off it," Buttar said. "It is that simple." Then, just this morning, SF Gate published a profile and lengthy Q&A; making clear our position vis-a-vis the Democratic Party. The SF Gate story was notable for several reasons. First, it reviews long suppressed by San Francisco journalists aligned with the Democratic Party, exposing a smear campaign orchestrated to insulate an oligarch from public accountability. It also featured our critique of the incumbent, and the better alternatives that we offer on policy issues. Or do we want an advocate who has long stood for our communities? Plenty of people who've stood for our communities get smeared. Ilhan Omar is smeared routinely. Dr. King got smeared. I mean, they've done everything short of killing me to shut me up. Every kind of lie you could imagine, leveraging racial stereotypes and religious stereotypes.... name: Team Erica Smith
subject: Our brand new yard signs →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
[1]Erica Smith

This is pretty exciting!

We just got a first look at our Erica Smith for Congress yard signs, and
we wanted to make sure you saw them too:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39758?refcode=em20220210-867&t=1001&akid=867%2E3698%2EP3g8Hh ][IMG]

Our primary election is nearly three months away and brand new
congressional maps are coming in a matter of days.

It’s critical we’re prepared to hit the ground running as soon as the new
lines are approved — that means blanketing our yard signs across the
district and making them *FREE* for voters! But we absolutely can’t do it
without your help right now.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39758?refcode=em20220210-867&t=1002&akid=867%2E3698%2EP3g8Hh ]One yard sign costs $15 to produce and distribute. So, we set a goal of raising $3,000 to
order our first batch of 200 union-made signs. Will you chip in $15 or
whatever you can to our Official Yard Sign Fund right now?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39758?refcode=em20220210-867&t=1021&akid=867%2E3698%2EP3g8Hh ]Donate $15

Our team is working hard to build a powerful grassroots campaign to send
Erica to Congress, one rooted in community and service — not personal
power.

We don’t accept a dime from corporate PACs of any kind, so we’re truly
relying on generous grassroots supporters (like you!) to fund critical
voter outreach, from our on-the-ground organizing program and digital ads
to our yard signs!

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/39758?refcode=em20220210-867&t=1022&akid=867%2E3698%2EP3g8Hh ]Will you chip in $15 or more today to
help us buy our first batch of union-made campaign yard signs?

Thank you,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20220210-867-footer&t=1023&refcode2=867_3698_P3g8Hh&akid=867%2E3698%2EP3g8Hh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=867%2E3698%2EP3g8Hh
